translations.english: There is strength and courage in your eyes. You have the spirit of a great hunter.
translations.chinese: 你的眼中折射出力量和勇气，你有当一个好猎人的品质。

translations.chinese: 这把法杖给你，而且我还想让你加入我的家族，成为泰瓦尼家的一员。

translations.english: Well, well. You have proven to be a more valuable ally than I anticipated.
translations.chinese: 好啊。你证明了自己，是个比我原来认为还有用的盟友。

translations.english: No need to thank me. I know you are overwhelmed with gratitude.
translations.chinese: 用不着感谢我，我知道你已经感激得说不出话了。

translations.chinese: 解剖木灵让我相信心石可以被植入人体胸部，赐给他们巨大的力量。

translations.english: I was considering replacing my heart with a heart stone. Fortunately Ildari offered to let me operate on her first.
translations.chinese: 我原本打算把自己的心脏换成心石，幸好伊达利提出先给她移植。

translations.english: Of course this was before your briarheart expedition. Now I know that I did the surgery all wrong.
translations.chinese: 当然这些发生在你探险荆棘之心之前，现在我知道手术完全搞错了。

translations.english: I've come to know those ruins so well, I could draw you a map from memory. That's why I noticed the new passage the moment I laid eyes on it.
translations.chinese: 我对那些废墟非常了解，可以凭记忆给你画张地图。这就是为什么我扫一眼就看出那里多了一条通道。

translations.english: Good. Now maybe Neloth will get off my back about it.

translations.english: Truly? Well done.
translations.chinese: 真的吗？干得好。

translations.english: I'll just keep two of them for myself. No need for Neloth to know.

translations.english: It's special to the Spriggans. They seem to like to gather there.

translations.english: Although sometimes you can buy them from alchemists.
translations.chinese: 除非去炼金术士那里碰碰运气。

translations.chinese: 他的无能造成了这场混乱，让我们看看他怎么收拾残局。

translations.english: What? That fool.
translations.chinese: 什么？那个白痴。

translations.chinese: 我老了。走不了那么远。路上太危险了。

translations.english: Three taproots soaked in the headwaters of the Harstrad river.
translations.chinese: 要三株浸泡过哈斯垂德河水的直立根。

translations.english: If you get some taproots, I'll pay you to dip them in the headwaters and bring them to me.
translations.chinese: 你要是有直立根，就去河源浸泡后再带给我，我会付钱的。

translations.english: If you cast the spell without a heart stone, it attacks anything in sight.
translations.chinese: 你施法时要是缺了心石，那它就会攻击视线内的任何人。

translations.english: I need to tell Master Neloth about that Ash Guardian, but I don't dare leave my home.
translations.chinese: 我要告诉内洛斯大师灰烬守卫的事情，但我不敢出门。

translations.english: I presume you've already seen some of what I've accomplished. There is so, so much more to be done. I'm glad you're here.
translations.chinese: 我想你已经见过我的一些成就了。但还有太多霸业未成，很高兴你能来这里。

translations.english: And here you are, just as I asked. How very kind of you.
translations.chinese: 你出现这里，正如我所愿。真是太慷慨了。

translations.chinese: 米拉克……米拉克……听起来很耳熟，但我没法确定……

translations.english: Miraak's been dead for thousands of years.
translations.chinese: 米拉克已经死了几千年了。

translations.english: Oh. Wait, I recall. But that makes very little sense.
translations.chinese: 哦，等下，我想起来了。但这说不通啊。

translations.english: You there... You don't seem to be in quite the same state as the others here. Very interesting.
translations.chinese: 那边儿的……你看起来和这儿的其他人很不一样，真有意思。

translations.english: In order to subdue this chaotic world, to set things right, I must return to this realm in full.
translations.chinese: 为了征服这个混沌世界，扶正一切，我必须以完全体回归现世。

translations.english: If only it could be so.
translations.chinese: 但愿如此。

translations.chinese: 除非找到这邪恶之源，不然我不会回村子的。你要和我一起进这该死的神殿吗？

translations.english: But still, this temple stands. The Tree Stone remains tainted. How can we be sure the Skaal will remain free?
translations.chinese: 但是，这个神殿还在。树石依旧被污染着。我们怎么确保斯卡尔不会被再次奴役？

translations.english: Our people are lost to the madness that infects this island. Perhaps Storn has been lost as well...
translations.chinese: 我们的人都被岛上传染的狂热所影响了。可能斯托恩也疯了……

translations.english: I do not understand. Why would he send you, an outsider, to find me when he knows why I have come here?
translations.chinese: 我不明白。为什么他会派你这样一个外人来找我。他应该知道我此行的目的。

translations.english: I'm sure Talvas won't mind being my test subject again.
translations.chinese: 我肯定塔瓦斯不介意再当回我的实验品。

translations.english: Now stand still... it's my first time casting this spell, and I don't need any additional distractions.
translations.chinese: 那么站着别动……这是我第一次施放这个法术，不想受任何干扰。

translations.english: Oh, nothing too dangerous.
translations.chinese: 哦，没什么危险的。

translations.english: At least I think it will. Probably. Almost certainly. Of course, you never can tell.
translations.chinese: 至少我是这么认为的，也许，几乎确定是这样。当然了，总有意外。

translations.english: It should provide an additional spectral tether from your own lifespark to the aedric realm.
translations.chinese: 这应该会让你的生命之源，多一条通往伊德拉位面的光谱链接。

translations.english: You would experience it as a sort of... increased vigor. You would fight longer, feel stronger, that sort of thing.
translations.chinese: 你会感觉到那就像……活力增幅。你能战斗地更久，感觉更壮之类的。

translations.chinese: 我还是留一份抄本吧。拿着原本在外走动太危险了。

translations.english: Excellent!
translations.chinese: 太好了！

translations.english: Now, take this for your efforts, and we'll call the matter closed.
translations.chinese: 那么，这是你的报酬，这件事就告一段落了。

translations.chinese: 有。赫麦尤斯·莫拉城府很深，但我也不差。

translations.english: Now, it's only a rumor of a whisper of a conjecture. But I think this is the place.

translations.chinese: 如果能恢复蒸汽供应，那我肯定能打开书的保护装置。

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I know it isn't the best place to start, but we know they've been coming from this direction. | ZH: 我知道这里并不是最好下手的地方，但它们是从这个方向来的。 | SID: 002018

translations.english: Have you found something?
translations.chinese: 找到什么了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201BFD2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Have you found something? | ZH: 找到什么了吗？ | SID: 000746

translations.english: There has to be a clue around here somewhere.
translations.chinese: 这附近一定有线索。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201BFD3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: There has to be a clue around here somewhere. | ZH: 这附近一定有线索。 | SID: 000906

translations.english: I hope you've reconsidered lending me a hand. Could really use it right now.
translations.chinese: 希望你能重新考虑下，帮我一把。现在真的很需要。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201BFD4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I hope you've reconsidered lending me a hand. Could really use it right now. | ZH: 希望你能重新考虑下，帮我一把。现在真的很需要。 | SID: 0008FA

translations.english: We were searching the farm when the ash spawn ambushed us. Have a look around and see if you can turn up anything useful.
translations.chinese: 我们在搜查农场的时候被灰烬怪伏击了。四处看看能不能找到有用的线索。

translations.english: Finally.
translations.chinese: 终于。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201BFD5]

translations.english: I need you to head out to Fort Frostmoth and check it out. I'm going to head back to Raven Rock and prepare the men for further assaults.
translations.chinese: 我需要你前往霜蛾堡去查一下。我要回鸦石镇组织人手为接下来的袭击做准备。

translations.english: If General Carius is still alive, there must be something keeping him that way.
translations.chinese: 要是卡里乌斯将军还活着，一定有什么东西维持了他的这种状态。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: If General Carius is still alive, there must be something keeping him that way. | ZH: 要是卡里乌斯将军还活着，一定有什么东西维持了他的这种状态。 | SID: 0029FD

translations.english: I am. Have you reconsidered?
translations.chinese: 对。你重新考虑过了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201BFD7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I am. Have you reconsidered? | ZH: 对。你重新考虑过了吗？ | SID: 000935

translations.english: Well, Carius was the Imperial garrison commander at Fort Frostmoth, but he died over 200 years ago when the Red Mountain leveled the place.
translations.chinese: 嗯，卡里乌斯曾经是霜蛾堡的帝国要塞指挥官，但他在两百年前红山喷发掩埋这里的时候就死了。

translations.english: There's no way he could still be alive.
translations.chinese: 他绝不可能还活着。

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: There's no way he could still be alive. | ZH: 他绝不可能还活着。 | SID: 0024E3

translations.english: Suit yourself.
translations.chinese: 随你便。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201BFD9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Suit yourself. | ZH: 随你便。 | SID: 0007DE

translations.english: What news do you bring from Fort Frostmoth?
translations.chinese: 你从霜蛾堡带回来什么消息？

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201BFDA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What news do you bring from Fort Frostmoth? | ZH: 你从霜蛾堡带回来什么消息？ | SID: 001825

translations.english: Since you're brimming with self-confidence, maybe you'd care to take over for me?
translations.chinese: 既然你充满自信，要不帮我处理这事儿？

translations.english: It's easy to criticize when you're just a visitor here.
translations.chinese: 当个过客说风凉话当然简单了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: It's easy to criticize when you're just a visitor here. | ZH: 当个过客说风凉话当然简单了。 | SID: 000974

translations.english: Oh have you? Well, let me just extract those memories and I'll see if you found anything useful.
translations.chinese: 哦，是吗？好吧，我来提取那些记忆，看看你是否发现了什么有用的东西。

translations.english: Here, you deserve a bit of reward for your efforts... that was a lengthy trip for you, I'm sure!
translations.chinese: 拿着，你的努力配得上我打点儿赏……肯定是场漫长的旅行吧！

translations.english: I promise that any unrelated memories I run across will be kept in the strictest of confidences.
translations.chinese: 我保证会严格保密看到的任何不相关记忆。

translations.english: Back in the homeland, there are other Telvanni wizards that have them as well.
translations.chinese: 在我的家乡，其他的泰瓦尼法师也有这种塔。

translations.english: This is a Telvanni tower. It's my citadel, grown from the spores of the giant fungus trees found in Morrowind.
translations.chinese: 这是一座泰瓦尼塔。我这座城堡，是由在晨风发现的巨型真菌树的孢子长出来的。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201C04C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Back in the homeland, there are other Telvanni wizards that have them as well. | ZH: 在我的家乡，其他的泰瓦尼法师也有这种塔。 | SID: 000789
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: This is a Telvanni tower. It's my citadel, grown from the spores of the giant fungus trees found in Morrowind. | ZH: 这是一座泰瓦尼塔。我这座城堡，是由在晨风发现的巨型真菌树的孢子长出来的。 | SID: 0009DB

translations.english: Among the debris were heart stones. Even two centuries later, they still smolder with the heat of the mountain.
translations.chinese: 残骸中就有心石。即使两个世纪后，它们依然在被红山的余温炙烤。

translations.english: These are the molten rocks that lay next to the Heart of Lorkhan for millennia. Some vestige of its power must have seeped into them.
translations.chinese: 这些火山岩在洛克汗之心旁埋了几千年，一定是它的部分残余能量渗透过去了。

translations.english: When Red Mountain erupted almost two hundred years ago, it flung ash and rocks for hundreds of miles.
translations.chinese: 大约两百年前，红山喷发时，火山灰和岩石被抛到数百里外。

translations.english: I do know that heart stones sometimes raise ash spawn from the bits of bone buried in the nearby ash.
translations.chinese: 我可以确定心石有时会用埋在附近灰烬里的碎骨，召唤出灰烬怪。

translations.english: Everything that can go wrong is going wrong. Ash spawn attacks, my house, and even my steward is assassinated.
translations.chinese: 凡是可能出岔子的事儿都出了。灰烬怪袭击、我的房子，就连我的管家都被暗杀了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201C04E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Everything that can go wrong is going wrong. Ash spawn attacks, my house, and even my steward is assassinated. | ZH: 凡是可能出岔子的事儿都出了。灰烬怪袭击、我的房子，就连我的管家都被暗杀了。 | SID: 0009A6

translations.english: It's as if Tel Mithryn is cursed. Spoiled food, ash spawn attacks, my servants constantly getting sick. What's next?
translations.chinese: 泰尔·米斯瑞恩就像被诅咒了。食物腐坏、灰烬怪袭击，连仆人们都不断地生病。还会有什么呢？

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

translations.english: I wonder if a dragon could be captured alive? It would make a fascinating test subject.
translations.chinese: 龙有办法被活捉吗？那肯定会是很棒的研究样本。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201C050]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I wonder if a dragon could be captured alive? It would make a fascinating test subject. | ZH: 龙有办法被活捉吗？那肯定会是很棒的研究样本。 | SID: 0007F3

translations.english: Here. Have some septims.
translations.chinese: 这些塞普汀拿去。

translations.english: Excellent. I'll take it.
translations.chinese: 好极了，给我吧。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201C051]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Here. Have some septims. | ZH: 这些塞普汀拿去。 | SID: 000836
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Excellent. I'll take it. | ZH: 好极了，给我吧。 | SID: 000902

translations.english: Well, I'm hoping to do something similar... if I could connect a living being to the forces of the Red Mountain well... that would be formidable.
translations.chinese: 嗯，我希望能做点相似的……如果我能把某个生物与红山之力联系起来……那将是令人生畏的力量。

translations.english: I've done some experiments in this area, but, well, my test subjects are far too fragile.
translations.chinese: 我已经在这个领域做了些实验，但是，我的试验对象太脆弱了。

translations.english: I'm hoping to learn some of the Briarheart techniques, their methods.
translations.chinese: 希望能学到些荆棘之心的技术和方法。

translations.english: I would venture out myself, but long voyages and dangerous risks are precisely what people like you are for.
translations.chinese: 我很乐意自己跑一趟，但还是你这种人适合去跑长途冒险。

translations.english: I'm running low on heart stones.
translations.chinese: 我的心石快不够了。

translations.english: If you have any with you, I'll buy one. Otherwise, I can tell you where you might find one.
translations.chinese: 你要是有我就买了。或者我告诉你上哪儿找得到。

agentText:

translations.english: From there, you're on your own. I'm given to understand that they are not difficult to find, if you gather my inference.
translations.chinese: 到了那边就靠你自己了。要是根据我的推断来，就不难找到他们。

translations.english: The Forsworn live in the hills on the western edge of Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 弃誓者部落就在天际西部丘陵上活动。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201C054]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: From there, you're on your own. I'm given to understand that they are not difficult to find, if you gather my inference. | ZH: 到了那边就靠你自己了。要是根据我的推断来，就不难找到他们。 | SID: 0009A1
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: The Forsworn live in the hills on the western edge of Skyrim. | ZH: 弃誓者部落就在天际西部丘陵上活动。 | SID: 000A11

translations.english: You didn't have to speak a word. I could sense it the moment you came in.
translations.chinese: 你没必要说出来，我从你进门就感觉到了。

translations.english: You've proven your worth, and I'm as good as my word. Take this staff from my personal collection. I think you'll find it useful.
translations.chinese: 你证明了自己的价值，我也会遵守承诺。这把法杖是我的私人收藏，你应该用得上。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201C055]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: You didn't have to speak a word. I could sense it the moment you came in. | ZH: 你没必要说出来，我从你进门就感觉到了。 | SID: 0006F3

translations.english: They are fierce warriors of the Forsworn tribes.
translations.chinese: 他们是弃誓者部落的凶猛战士。

translations.english: I need you to examine one of them. Just investigate as much as you can.
translations.chinese: 我需要你去检查一个，不要错过任何细节。

translations.english: They actually remove their own hearts, and replace them with large briar seeds. It puts their lifesparks in direct connection to the natural forces.
translations.chinese: 摘除了自己的心脏，换成了荆棘种子。这样就把生命之源和自然之力直接联系起来了。

translations.english: I'm going to put this memory trace spell on you, so you won't have to worry about taking notes. I doubt you could know what was important anyway.
translations.chinese: 我要给你放个记忆追踪法术，这样你就不需要做笔记了。反正你也抓不到重点。

translations.english: The connecting soul thread is knotted three times, once for the heart, once for the spirit, and once for the body.
translations.chinese: 灵魂连结丝线打了三个结，一次在于心脏，一次在于精神，一次在于身体。

translations.english: The knot gives the connection a strength that may be the key that I've been looking for.
translations.chinese: 这种结点给了连结一种力量，可能是我一直在找的关键。

translations.english: Don't waste your time. Those things are for the weak and foolish.
translations.chinese: 别浪费时间了。只有弱者和傻子才会需要那些玩意儿。

translations.english: Oh. Were you fishing for a compliment? A sign of gratitude?
translations.chinese: 哦，你想听我夸你吗？表达感激之情？

translations.english: However, he seems to run the place well enough.
translations.chinese: 不过，他把这儿管的还不错。

translations.english: The man makes a dreadful cup of canis root tea.
translations.chinese: 那家伙泡的犬根茶难喝的要死。

- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: Oh. Were you fishing for a compliment? A sign of gratitude? | ZH: 哦，你想听我夸你吗？表达感激之情？ | SID: 0007D8

translations.english: I've been having difficulties with my heart stone experiments.
translations.chinese: 我的心石实验有个难关。

translations.english: Have you heard of the Briarhearts?
translations.chinese: 你听说过荆棘之心吗？

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201C059]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I've been having difficulties with my heart stone experiments. | ZH: 我的心石实验有个难关。 | SID: 0007DD
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Have you heard of the Briarhearts? | ZH: 你听说过荆棘之心吗？ | SID: 0009E7

translations.english: Oh yes. You rather rudely walked away. As I was saying then, have you heard of the Briarhearts?
translations.chinese: 哦好嘛，你就那么无理地走开了。我刚才问过了，你听说过荆棘之心没有？

translations.english: You were saying something about heart stones?
translations.chinese: 你刚才提到了心石？

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

translations.english: There are some sealed doors up ahead. Perhaps you can figure out how to get them open.
translations.chinese: 前面有几道锁住的门。也许你能找到开门的方法。

translations.english: Lead the way, then! I'll follow along behind.
translations.chinese: 带路吧，我会跟在后面。

translations.english: Remarkable, isn't it? This tomb has been hidden for... well, who knows how long. Many centuries, I would think.
translations.chinese: 很惊人，对吧？这座墓穴被埋藏了……嗯，天晓得有多久。几百年吧，我猜。

translations.english: I am Hermaeus Mora, the Gardener of Men, knower of the unknown, master of fates. You stand in my realm, mortal.
translations.chinese: 我是赫麦尤斯·莫拉，凡人的园丁，未知的知者，命运之主。你现在身处我的领域，凡人。

translations.english: My servant Miraak would have found a way to bring me what I want. So will you, if you wish to surpass him.
translations.chinese: 我的仆人米拉克总会找到办法满足我的要求。你要是想超越他，也会的。

translations.english: Miraak served me well, and was rewarded. I can grant you the same power as he wields, but all knowledge has its price.
translations.chinese: 米拉克是个优秀的仆人，也获得了奖赏。我能赐予你他所运用的力量，但知识是有代价的。

translations.chinese: 干得好，我的勇士。你的启蒙之路最终指引你到了这里，我的领域，正如我所料。

translations.english: All seekers of knowledge come to me, sooner or later.

translations.english: Knowledge for knowledge.
translations.chinese: 以知识，换知识。

translations.english: Your progress since obtaining my Oghma Infinium has been rapid. And now, I find you here, following in my servant Miraak's footsteps.
translations.chinese: 自从你得到我的无限智典后，进步飞速。如今，你已经在追随我的仆人米拉克的脚步。

translations.english: You also are Dragonborn. You also seek to learn how to bend the world to your will.
translations.chinese: 你也是个龙裔，也在寻求如何让世界屈服于你的意志之下。

translations.english: You please me, champion. Your loyalty will be richly rewarded.
translations.chinese: 你让我很满意，勇士。你的忠诚会得到丰厚的奖赏。

translations.english: You could spend a hundred lifetimes searching my library, and you will never find what you seek.
translations.chinese: 你可以花上几百辈子在我的图书馆里查找，但是永远也找不到你要的。

translations.english: No. Look around you. You have done nothing here on your own.
translations.chinese: 错，看看周围吧。你在这儿什么都做不了。

translations.english: You are following in the footsteps of my servant Miraak. Like him, you are Dragonborn, and seek the power that is your birthright.
translations.chinese: 你正在走过我仆人米拉克所走的路。你们都是龙裔，你和他一样都在追求那与生俱来的力量。

translations.english: No. Not yet. I have watched your progress through my realm with growing interest.
translations.chinese: 不，还不是时候。我一直在透过领域观察你的进展，也越来越感兴趣。

translations.english: You will serve me, willing or not. All who seek after the secrets of the world are my servants.
translations.chinese: 你会侍奉我的，无关意愿。世上所有探求秘密之人都是我的仆从。

translations.english: Now I think I'll spend some more time studying this word wall. What a book this will make!
translations.chinese: 现在我想要花更多的时间研究这面龙语墙。这写出来会是怎样的书啊！

translations.english: Indeed. I knew that the Dragon Priests were thought to have been powerful men of great will, but I had no idea.
translations.chinese: 确实。我知道龙祭司们被认为是力量强大，意志坚定的人，但没想到是这样。

translations.english: Well, I suppose I've seen everything I came for, and you kept up your end of the bargain. I promised payment, and here it is.
translations.chinese: 嗯，我已经看完了此行的目的，你也履行了承诺。这是我答应你的报酬。

translations.english: I suppose that was Vahlok. He must have had this entire place built for him so that he could maintain his vigil, even beyond death.
translations.chinese: 我猜那是瓦洛克。他一定是为自己建了这整个地方，以便能保持警戒，至死不休。

translations.english: How amazing! A real Dragon Priest! In all my years as a historian, I never thought I'd see anything like that.
translations.chinese: 太了不起了！一位真正的龙祭司！当了这么多年的历史学者，从没想过能看到那样的东西。

translations.chinese: 那看来这真是危险的东西。我们应该回村里，让我父亲看看。

translations.english: Perhaps Storn can make sense of what is going on.
translations.chinese: 也许斯托恩知道发生了什么。

translations.english: What happened to you? You read the book and then...
translations.chinese: 你出了什么事？读了那本书后就……

translations.english: It seemed as though you were not really here. I could see you, but also see through you!
translations.chinese: 像是不在这里真实存在了。我看得到你，但视线也可以透过你！

translations.chinese: 那你我都有理由去看看下面有什么。

translations.english: Let us go. There is nothing more I can do here. The Tree Stone and my friends are beyond my help for now.
translations.chinese: 我们走吧。在这儿也做不了什么。目前我也帮不了树石和我的朋友。

translations.english: We need to find a way into the temple below.
translations.chinese: 我们得找到一条进入下面神殿的路。

translations.english: Send him back where he came from.

translations.english: And it is only a matter of time before Solstheim is also mine. I already control the minds of its people.
translations.chinese: 索瑟海姆为我所控也是指日可待。我已经控制了人们的心智。

translations.english: It makes them forget themselves, and work on these horrible creations that corrupt the Stones, the very land itself.
translations.chinese: 他们忘记了自我，来建造这些腐化了圣石和这片大地的恐怖造物。

translations.english: I am unsure. Something has taken control of most of the people of Solstheim.
translations.chinese: 我不确定。总之是控制了索瑟海姆大部分人的某个东西。

translations.english: My father Storn, our shaman, says Miraak has returned to Solstheim, but that is impossible.
translations.chinese: 我父亲斯托恩是我们的萨满，他说米拉克已经重返索瑟海姆了，但那不可能。

translations.english: I am Frea of the Skaal. I am here to either save my people, or avenge them.
translations.chinese: 我是斯卡尔村的芙瑞雅，来这儿是要解救我的族人，或是为他们报仇。

translations.english: I'm still waiting for that ash sample from an ash spawn.
translations.chinese: 我还等着从灰烬怪身上拿来的火山灰样本呢。

agentText:

translations.english: Well that's unexpected.
translations.chinese: 那可真是出乎我意料的情况。

translations.english: I presume you are blind, given the state of your eyes.
translations.chinese: 我猜你是瞎了吧，从你眼睛的情况来看。

translations.english: I've made this special tool that will extract... well, you don't need to know the details. Just go harvest a sample.
translations.chinese: 我做了这个特殊工具来萃取……嗯，你没必要知道细节，只管采集样本就行了。

translations.english: Hmm. I do have a new spell I'm working on. I hope to be able to conjure ash spawn.
translations.chinese: 嗯，我在研究一个新的法术。希望可以用来召唤灰烬怪。

translations.english: If I could get a sample of ash from an ash spawn, that would be quite useful.
translations.chinese: 要是我有灰烬怪身上的火山灰样本就好了，那东西应该很有用。

translations.english: Of course, the creature will have to be dead first, but I trust that's something you can... bring about.
translations.chinese: 当然了，得先宰了那种生物才行，但我相信对你来说……不成问题。

translations.english: That's unfortunate.
translations.chinese: 那就可惜了。

translations.english: I'll have to use Talvas again, and he's a bit of a screamer.
translations.chinese: 我只好再用一次塔瓦斯了，但他喜欢大呼小叫。

translations.english: Although... maybe this could solve two problems...
translations.chinese: 或者……也许我能一箭双雕。

translations.english: My mother put me on a boat to Skyrim. The last time I ever saw her, she was standing on the dock as my ship sailed away.
translations.chinese: 我的母亲将我放到一艘开往天际的船上。她站在码头上目送我的船离开的样子，是我看到的最后一眼。

translations.english: Yes. That was a lifetime ago.
translations.chinese: 对啊。就像上辈子的事情了。

translations.english: I was just a young girl when Red Mountain erupted. Master Neloth was already old.
translations.chinese: 红山喷发时我还只是个小女孩。而内洛斯大师已经很老了。

translations.english: Excellent. If this works, I'll prepare a version that you can cast yourself, if you ever wish to inflict... er, study silence.
translations.chinese: 好极了。有效果的话，我会帮你准备一个能自己用的版本，你可能会想整蛊……呃，研究沉默。

translations.english: What do you say?
translations.chinese: 你怎么看？

translations.english: Well, I believe I've discovered a new form of silence. Some philosophers postulate seven orders of silence, but I believe there's an eighth.
translations.chinese: 嗯，我认为我发现了一种新的沉默形式。一些哲人假定有七种沉默，但我认为有第八种。

translations.english: If you allow me, I'd like to envelop you in the eighth form, to study the mental effects.
translations.chinese: 你愿意的话，我会把你笼罩在第八种沉默中，来研究对你的精神影响。

translations.english: Together we form House Telvanni, one of the great houses of Morrowind. The great houses rule what is left of our once proud nation.
translations.chinese: 我们一起建立了泰瓦尼家这个晨风大家族。大家族们统治着我们那个曾经为之骄傲的国度剩下的一切。

translations.english: The Telvanni are the master wizards of Morrowind.
translations.chinese: 泰瓦尼是晨风的法师大族。

translations.english: The greatest of us grow magical towers like this one from the mighty fungus trees.
translations.chinese: 我们中最伟大的法师会将巨型真菌树栽培为这种魔法塔。

translations.english: Unfortunately you don't appear to be suffering from any side effects.
translations.chinese: 再说，你也没表现出任何副作用。

translations.english: I suppose I do. It's too bad it wore off so quickly though.
translations.chinese: 我想是的。可惜它失效太快了。

translations.english: Anyway, take this for your time.
translations.chinese: 不管怎样，这是你的酬劳。

translations.english: The spell that is. I think I can fix the spell. It should only take a couple more years.
translations.chinese: 这个法术也一样，我想是能修正的。应该只需要几年。

translations.english: It's nothing that can't be fixed.
translations.chinese: 没什么是我不能修正的。

translations.english: But first, I need some data. Try wiggling them.
translations.chinese: 但首先，我需要一些数据，试着摆动它们。

translations.english: No, don't shake your fist. Wiggle the tentacle things where your eyes used to be.
translations.chinese: 不，不是让你晃拳头。扭动你眼睛原处的触手。

translations.english: Give me a moment. I still have flashback from when Master Neloth changed you.
translations.chinese: 给我点时间。我还记得内洛斯大师改变你时的情景。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201CDD6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Give me a moment. I still have flashback from when Master Neloth changed you. | ZH: 给我点时间。我还记得内洛斯大师改变你时的情景。 | SID: 0008E0

translations.english: Thank you for keeping that matter of the Ash Guardian just between us. I shudder to think what would happen if Master Neloth had found out.
translations.chinese: 谢谢你替我保密了灰烬守护者的事儿。要是被内洛斯大师知道了简直不堪设想。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201CDD7]

translations.english: Master Neloth was furious when the tower withered. It just seemed to happen overnight.
translations.chinese: 塔枯萎那会儿内洛斯大师气疯了。就像是一夜之间发生的。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201CDD8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Master Neloth was furious when the tower withered. It just seemed to happen overnight. | ZH: 塔枯萎那会儿内洛斯大师气疯了。就像是一夜之间发生的。 | SID: 000742

translations.english: You'd think Neloth was still a clan leader in House Telvanni the way he carries on.
translations.chinese: 你看内洛斯的作风会以为他还是泰瓦尼家的领袖。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201CDD9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You'd think Neloth was still a clan leader in House Telvanni the way he carries on. | ZH: 你看内洛斯的作风会以为他还是泰瓦尼家的领袖。 | SID: 0008E8

translations.english: After what you did for me, you are always welcome here. Just try to stay out of Master Neloth's way.
translations.chinese: 你为我做了这么多，这儿永远都欢迎你。只要注意别妨碍到内洛斯大师。

Addon: Dragonborn

translations.english: I just can't seem to get the hang of making a decent cup of canis root tea.
translations.chinese: 好像我就是不懂把犬根茶泡的好喝的窍门。

translations.english: I heard you fought a dragon. That must have been terrifying.
translations.chinese: 听说你跟一条龙战斗过。那场面肯定很恐怖。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201CDDC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I heard you fought a dragon. That must have been terrifying. | ZH: 听说你跟一条龙战斗过。那场面肯定很恐怖。 | SID: 0008C7

translations.english: I have my doubts. But the city was a marvel of Dwemer engineering. Now... reduced to this.
translations.chinese: 我对此有些怀疑，但这座城市是锻莫工程的一个奇迹。现在……降到这儿了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201D3AA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I have my doubts. But the city was a marvel of Dwemer engineering. Now... reduced to this. | ZH: 我对此有些怀疑，但这座城市是锻莫工程的一个奇迹。现在……降到这儿了。 | SID: 000959

translations.english: In the old stories, when the Nords came to conquer it, it's said the Dwemer submerged the entire city beneath the sea until the invaders gave up.
translations.chinese: 古老传说中提到过，当诺德人入侵时，据说锻莫将整座城市沉入水中，直至入侵者们撤退。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

translations.english: Nchardak. The 'City of a Hundred Towers'. In its day, it was the largest of the great Dwemer Archives, and perhaps the most advanced.
translations.chinese: 尼查达克。意为“百塔之城”。在那个年代，它是最大的锻莫档案馆，或许还是技术最先进的。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

translations.english: So? Do you have it? Did you get my book?
translations.chinese: 怎么样？你拿到了吗？拿到我的书了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201D8CC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: So? Do you have it? Did you get my book? | ZH: 怎么样？你拿到了吗？拿到我的书了吗？ | SID: 000955

translations.english: Don't just stand there. Go get my book!
translations.chinese: 别光站在那儿啊，去把我的书拿来！

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201D8CD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Don't just stand there. Go get my book! | ZH: 别光站在那儿啊，去把我的书拿来！ | SID: 0009C8

translations.english: Yes, yes. I'll write it out, and you can pick up a copy from Talvas in a few days.
translations.chinese: 好，好。我要把它写下来，几天后你就可以找塔瓦斯要本抄件。

translations.english: In any case, this is truly amazing. I think I can adapt this into a sort of whirlwind vortex energy.
translations.chinese: 无论如何，这可太棒了。我想可以把这个改造成某种旋风涡流能量。

translations.english: In the mean time, take this for helping me.
translations.chinese: 还有，这是你帮我的酬劳。

translations.english: Perhaps this particular source was worth more than I thought he was. Pity.
translations.chinese: 可能这个线人比我想的有价值。可惜了。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: In any case, this is truly amazing. I think I can adapt this into a sort of whirlwind vortex energy. | ZH: 无论如何，这可太棒了。我想可以把这个改造成某种旋风涡流能量。 | SID: 000950

translations.english: I have some associates and correspondents who find things for me. One of them has a credible rumor on where this book might be.
translations.chinese: 我有些合伙人和联络人为我找东西。其中一个可信的传言提到了这本书可能的下落。

translations.english: I've been trying to adapt Redguard magic to the ash.
translations.chinese: 我在尝试把红卫魔法和火山灰联系起来。

translations.english: Can you? Of course you can. What took you so long to ask?
translations.chinese: 你能帮吗？当然可以了。怎么现在才问？

translations.english: I think the key concept I'm missing is recorded in Afa-Saryat's book, Wind and Sand.
translations.chinese: 我想缺少的那个关键素材就记录在阿法-萨亚特的书《风与沙》里。

translations.english: And I'd like you to find the truth of the matter.
translations.chinese: 我希望你能帮我查个水落石出。

translations.english: I am in no mood to talk, outsider. One of the Skaal has gone missing.
translations.chinese: 我没心情闲聊，外来者。有个斯卡尔人失踪了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201D928]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I am in no mood to talk, outsider. One of the Skaal has gone missing. | ZH: 我没心情闲聊，外来者。有个斯卡尔人失踪了。 | SID: 000819

translations.english: South and west. If your road takes you that way, perhaps you could search for any sign of Baldor. The Skaal would be grateful.
translations.chinese: 西南方向。你要是往那边走的话，或许可以帮我们留意下鲍德尔的下落。斯卡尔人会感激你的。

translations.english: I saw two elves in the far distance, dragging something behind them. Hunters often visit our lands, so I thought little of it.
translations.chinese: 我远远地看见两个精灵背后拖着什么东西。因为这里常有猎人们造访，我就没想太多。

translations.english: Hm, I do not remember Baldor acting strangely. Although, now that you ask, I did see something in the woods on the day he disappeared.
translations.chinese: 嗯，印象里鲍德尔都很正常。但是，你这么一问，他失踪那天我确实在林子里看到了什么。

translations.chinese: “塑铁者”鲍德尔。作为我们中唯一的铁匠，鲍德尔对村子来说很重要。

translations.english: I don't want to have my spirit outstripped by some wanderer. So let's get up there and kill us some Rieklings!
translations.chinese: 我不希望我们的斗志输给一个漫游者。我们现在就上山杀几个瑞克灵吧！

translations.english: Too much mead. Too many stories. Too few battles.

translations.english: With tenacity and numbers. Didn't help that we'd grown a little too comfortable up there.
translations.chinese: 他们韧性很强且人多势众。而我们也确实在上面过的太安逸了。

translations.chinese: 你想要我给瑟斯科大厅首领的赐福吗？

translations.english: I was afraid you might say that. Well, looks as though I'll have to prove my mettle against you now.
translations.chinese: 就怕你会这么说呢。那么，看来我得向你证明我的勇毅了。

translations.english: All I need is for you to back me up. You don't even need to lie... just don't tell anyone else what you heard here.
translations.chinese: 我只需要你的支持。都不需要你去撒谎……不要把在这儿听到的告诉任何人，这就够了。

translations.english: Anyway, he's dead and we're alive. It's time to begin a new tradition for Thirsk. And I'm going to do that.
translations.chinese: 无论如何，他已经死了，而我们还活着。现在瑟斯科需要一个新的传统了。而我会为此努力的。

translations.english: Look what's happened to us so far under his watchful eye. He gave his blessing to all the leaders who brought us to this point.
translations.chinese: 看看在他的监视下我们至今都遇到了什么吧。每位首领都曾得到过他的赐福，但在他们的带领下我们却走到了这一步。

translations.chinese: 是的。是我，布约德。你曾赐福于我，如今我赶走了大厅里的瑞克灵，让它得以回归原主。

translations.chinese: 再说了，你需要的知识只有赫麦尤斯·莫拉才知道，那这么做就相当愚蠢了。你自己也清楚吧。

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: And, since you need secrets that only Hermaeus Mora knows, it seems like a rather foolish thing to do. But I'm sure you know best. | ZH: 再说了，你需要的知识只有赫麦尤斯·莫拉才知道，那这么做就相当愚蠢了。你自己也清楚吧。 | SID: 0006F0

translations.english: Hermaeus Mora learns some fascinating new ways to skin a horker, and you become the second most powerful Dragonborn that ever lived.
translations.chinese: 赫麦尤斯·莫拉会得到新的海象剥皮法，而你会成为有史以来第二强大的龙裔。

translations.english: Hmph. What secrets could they have worth keeping from old Mora? Sounds like a bargain to me.
translations.chinese: 哼。他们的秘密怎么会值得向老莫拉隐瞒呢？听起来很值得换啊。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

translations.english: Father! No, stop!
translations.chinese: 父亲！不，快停下！

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201D9A8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Father! No, stop! | ZH: 父亲！不，快停下！ | SID: 000915

translations.english: No wonder the Dwemer were so interested in that book. It was indeed one that Miraak used to advance his power as Dragonborn.
translations.chinese: 难怪锻莫对那本书如此感兴趣，米拉克确实是用了它来强化龙裔的力量。

translations.english: But I assume there's some bad news. It would be unlike Hermaeus Mora to allow anyone to gain such knowledge without exacting a price.
translations.chinese: 但我想你也带回了些坏消息吧？赫麦尤斯·莫拉可不像是会允许别人不付代价白拿这种知识的主。

translations.english: You will be either a worthy opponent or his successor, as the tides of fate decree.
translations.chinese: 你会成为他不可小觑的对手，或是继任者，一切由命运之潮来决定。

translations.english: You should read the book again until you reach what appears to be the "end" - then you will have fully understood the knowledge it contains.
translations.chinese: 你应该再把书看一遍，直到你到了它的“终章”——那会儿你才能完全理解里面蕴含的知识。

translations.english: You were in Apocrypha. Or at least your consciousness was - your body remained here of course.
translations.chinese: 你去了异典。或者至少你的意识进去了——身体当然还留在这儿。

translations.english: That's a fairly common experience, at least for those who remain coherent enough to report what they've seen.
translations.chinese: 这是一种相当普遍的经历，至少对那些还足够清醒，能汇报自己看到了什么的人来说。

translations.english: In return, I keep my promise, as befits a Prince of Oblivion: I give you the Word of Power that you need to challenge Miraak.
translations.chinese: 作为回报，我会遵守我的承诺，以湮灭君王的名义：把你挑战米拉克所需要的力量之语给你。

translations.english: You're still acting surprisingly sane, too. What did he have to say? He must have wanted something from you.
translations.chinese: 你的神志还出奇的清醒。他说了什么？一定是想从你身上得到什么吧。

translations.english: Dragonborn, you have delivered me the gift I requested.
translations.chinese: 龙裔，你把我要的礼物给带来了。

translations.english: At last, the Skaal yield up their secrets to me.
translations.chinese: 结束了，斯卡尔人将他们的秘密献给我了。

translations.english: What happened? What did you see? Different people have very different experiences when reading these books.
translations.chinese: 怎么样？你看到了什么？不同的人看了书会有非常不同的体验。

translations.english: Did you actually learn what you needed to know by reading that Black Book?
translations.chinese: 读了黑暗经书后你学会了需要的知识了吗？

translations.english: The Tree Stone is still corrupted... the land is still out of balance. But with the other five restored... it may be enough. It will have to be.
translations.chinese: 树石依然处于腐化中……这方水土平衡还未恢复。但是其他五座圣石已经恢复了……这样应该就够了，不够也不行了。

translations.english: Are you ready to trade your secrets to Hermaeus Mora?
translations.chinese: 你准备好拿你们的秘密和赫麦尤斯·莫拉做交易了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201DFB3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The Tree Stone is still corrupted... the land is still out of balance. But with the other five restored... it may be enough. It will have to be. | ZH: 树石依然处于腐化中……这方水土平衡还未恢复。但是其他五座圣石已经恢复了……这样应该就够了，不够也不行了。 | SID: 0007BF

translations.english: Father! What have you done!
translations.chinese: 父亲！你做了什么！

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201DFB4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Father! What have you done! | ZH: 父亲！你做了什么！ | SID: 0007E7

translations.english: That is my hope as well. I am trusting that you will make this sacrifice worthwhile.
translations.chinese: 我也这么想呢。希望你能让我的牺牲有所价值。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201DFB5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: That is my hope as well. I am trusting that you will make this sacrifice worthwhile. | ZH: 我也这么想呢。希望你能让我的牺牲有所价值。 | SID: 0006DE

translations.english: Give me the book. I will read it, and speak to old Herma-Mora myself. I will make sure he lives up to his part of the bargain.
translations.chinese: 把书给我吧，我来读，然后和老赫玛-莫拉谈谈。我会确保他遵守承诺。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

translations.english: How to talk to the wind, how to listen to the earth - these are our secrets. Nothing of power or mastery.
translations.chinese: 如何与风对话，如何聆听大地——这就是我们的秘密，与力量或统治都无关。

translations.english: Ancient lore, handed down from shaman to shaman since the All-Maker first gave Solstheim to the Skaal.
translations.chinese: 啊，是祖传的知识，当造物主最初将索瑟海姆交给斯卡尔人时，就由萨满们代代相传了。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Ancient lore, handed down from shaman to shaman since the All-Maker first gave Solstheim to the Skaal. | ZH: 啊，是祖传的知识，当造物主最初将索瑟海姆交给斯卡尔人时，就由萨满们代代相传了。 | SID: 000980

translations.english: I believe that time is now. If I am wrong, may my ancestors forgive me.
translations.chinese: 我认为时候到了。如果我错了，希望先祖们宽恕我吧。

translations.english: As shaman, it is my duty to guard these secrets, but also to decide when it is necessary to give them up.
translations.chinese: 作为萨满，我有职责守护这些秘密，但也要决定什么时候该放弃它们。

translations.english: Yes. The Skaal also tell of the day when we must finally give up our secrets. When Herma-Mora finally wins.
translations.chinese: 对，斯卡尔人也曾提及我们终有放弃保守秘密的一天，也就是赫麦尤斯·莫拉获胜的那天。

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: As shaman, it is my duty to guard these secrets, but also to decide when it is necessary to give them up. | ZH: 作为萨满，我有职责守护这些秘密，但也要决定什么时候该放弃它们。 | SID: 0008C1

translations.english: They have a ship. They took me there and showed me the map. You will find it on the northern coast of the island.
translations.chinese: 他们有条船，之前还把我带到那边去给我看地图。你会在岛东北海岸上找到那条船。

translations.english: Please, do not let Ancarion make his weapons. Kill him or let him live, but take the map from him. It belongs with the Skaal.
translations.chinese: 拜托了，不要让安卡利昂打造他的武器。杀了他或者放了他，但是一定要拿走他的地图。那属于斯卡尔。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

translations.english: Enchanted ice as hard as iron and cold as death. Stalhrim can be forged into deadly weapons, but the art is known only to smiths of the Skaal.
translations.chinese: 是附魔过的冰，铁一般硬，死亡一样冰冷。魔冰可以被铸造成致命武器，但只有斯卡铁匠才知道这种技术。

translations.english: No, no, my wounds are not serious. I don't think the elves were trying to harm me. Perhaps they intended to frighten me.
translations.chinese: 没，不用，我的伤都不严重。我不认为那些精灵是要伤害我。可能他们只想吓唬我。

translations.english: At worst, I have a few bruises to show for my ordeal.
translations.chinese: 顶多就是几处瘀伤罢了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201E161]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: At worst, I have a few bruises to show for my ordeal. | ZH: 顶多就是几处瘀伤罢了。 | SID: 0023EE

translations.english: Outsider! I remember you. You are the one who freed the Skaal from the dark spell.
translations.chinese: 外来者！我记得你。就是你把斯卡尔人从那黑暗法术拯救出来。

translations.english: Thank the All-Maker that you have come. These accursed elves have taken me from my home.
translations.chinese: 感谢造物主送你来了。那些该死的精灵把我从家里绑走了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201E162]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Outsider! I remember you. You are the one who freed the Skaal from the dark spell. | ZH: 外来者！我记得你。就是你把斯卡尔人从那黑暗法术拯救出来。 | SID: 0008AB
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Thank the All-Maker that you have come. These accursed elves have taken me from my home. | ZH: 感谢造物主送你来了。那些该死的精灵把我从家里绑走了。 | SID: 0023C6

translations.english: It makes my heart heavy that you don't believe me, Fanari. Baldor could be in danger, and you will do nothing.
translations.chinese: 你不相信我可太让我失望了，法娜丽。鲍德尔可能身处险境，而你什么也不做。

translations.english: If you won't help me, then I'll ask the All-Maker to send someone else who can.
translations.chinese: 你要是不帮我，那我就请造物主派别人来。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201E163]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: It makes my heart heavy that you don't believe me, Fanari. Baldor could be in danger, and you will do nothing. | ZH: 你不相信我可太让我失望了，法娜丽。鲍德尔可能身处险境，而你什么也不做。 | SID: 0008BB
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: If you won't help me, then I'll ask the All-Maker to send someone else who can. | ZH: 你要是不帮我，那我就请造物主派别人来。 | SID: 000918

translations.english: Something isn't right, Fanari. I feel it in my bones and I smell it in the air. Baldor wouldn't leave without telling someone.
translations.chinese: 事情不对劲，法娜丽。我骨子里能感觉到，空气也闻得出来。鲍德尔不会瞒着大家离开。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201E164]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Something isn't right, Fanari. I feel it in my bones and I smell it in the air. Baldor wouldn't leave without telling someone. | ZH: 事情不对劲，法娜丽。我骨子里能感觉到，空气也闻得出来。鲍德尔不会瞒着大家离开。 | SID: 00093D

translations.english: Don't worry yourself over nothing, Deor. Do you want a head full of gray hairs before you've seen forty winters?
translations.chinese: 别太担心了，迪乌尔。你想在度过四十个冬季前就满头华发吗？

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201E165]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Don't worry yourself over nothing, Deor. Do you want a head full of gray hairs before you've seen forty winters? | ZH: 别太担心了，迪乌尔。你想在度过四十个冬季前就满头华发吗？ | SID: 00078F

translations.english: Deor, you must be calm. I'm sure there's a good reason Baldor left us.
translations.chinese: 迪乌尔，你要冷静下来。我敢肯定鲍德尔离开我们是有原因的。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

translations.english: We brought ourselves out here, along with our shame.

translations.chinese: 我承认你是斯卡尔的朋友，铸造魔冰的知识也可以传给你了。

translations.chinese: 有魔冰就带到我这儿来吧，工具和炉子都随你使用。

translations.chinese: 蒂莉苏？你确定？

translations.english: Oh, excuse me! I didn't realize there was anyone else here.
translations.chinese: 哦，抱歉！我不知道这里有人。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201F2BF]

translations.english: What makes you think I haven't?
translations.chinese: 你怎么知道我没说过？

translations.english: Any time Adril and the Redoran Guard made a move, the Ulens must have been one step ahead and didn't show up.
translations.chinese: 每次阿德尔和瑞多然卫兵采取行动时，乌伦家的人都先他们一步，从来没出现过。

translations.english: Without Councilor Morvayn, Raven Rock has no future. Keep that in mind next time you decide to help or not.
translations.chinese: 少了莫尔凡议员，鸦石镇就没有未来可言了。下次你决定是否要帮忙时，要记住这点。

translations.english: Then... it's finally over.
translations.chinese: 那么……终于结束了。

translations.english: What of the Redoran Guard I sent to assist you?
translations.chinese: 我派去协助你的瑞多然卫兵呢？

translations.english: Now, if you'll excuse me, I'd like to meditate a bit.
translations.chinese: 嗯，请让我静一静，我要冥想一下。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201F2C3]

translations.english: If you were to wait inside for whomever that is, I'm betting they'll have some of the answers you're looking for.
translations.chinese: 你要是在里面等那个人，我赌他们会有你要找的答案。

translations.english: There's an Ulen Ancestral Tomb near the Temple. Someone's been leaving ash yam offerings on the altar inside.
translations.chinese: 神殿附近有一座乌伦家的祖坟，有人在里面的祭坛上放了灰烬薯。

translations.english: When everything was said and done, they were no longer recognized as a Great House and were dismissed from the Council.
translations.chinese: 当尘埃落定后，他们不再被视为大家族，并从议会中除名了。

translations.english: They had welcomed the Empire with open arms, and benefited from it.
translations.chinese: 他们张开双手迎接了帝国，也因而从中获利。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

translations.english: Their collaboration with the Empire may have given them unrivaled political and economic strength, but their hearts weren't with the Dunmer people.
translations.chinese: 他们在与帝国的合作中可能赢得了无与伦比的政治和经济力量，但是却不把心放在丹莫人民上。

translations.english: Traitors. The lot of them.
translations.chinese: 叛徒，全是叛徒。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

translations.english: As second councilor, it's my responsibility to protect Councilor Morvayn from harm.
translations.chinese: 作为副议员，我有责任保护莫尔凡议员不受伤害。

translations.english: Now that's just ridiculous!
translations.chinese: 这么说也太荒谬了！

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Now that's just ridiculous! | ZH: 这么说也太荒谬了！ | SID: 00222A

translations.english: If you have the evidence and it places your life in peril, I would expect you to do whatever you must to keep yourself alive.
translations.chinese: 如果你拿到了证据，且因此受到生命威胁，希望你采取一切必要手段保证人身安全。

translations.english: Here, this key should open the front door of the manor in case they've locked it. Good luck.
translations.chinese: 拿着，为防他们上锁，这把钥匙应该能打开宅邸的正门。祝你好运。

agentText:

translations.english: Oh, no bother. We all have a right to be here.
translations.chinese: 哦，没关系。我们都有来这里的权利。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201F2C9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh, no bother. We all have a right to be here. | ZH: 哦，没关系。我们都有来这里的权利。 | SID: 000A3F

translations.english: However, any information we can glean in times like this I consider vital to House Redoran's survival.
translations.chinese: 但是，我认为在这种时候收到的任何消息，对瑞多然家的存亡都是关键的。

translations.english: Sending the occasional message back and forth is all we can manage, and sometimes takes months or more to arrive.
translations.chinese: 顶多就是偶尔互通消息，有时候得等上数月或者更久。

translations.english: Most of my contacts live leagues away from Solstheim.
translations.chinese: 我的联络人都离索瑟海姆很远。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

translations.english: I do. I've received some information from my sources that there could be elements of Ulen's house, House Hlaalu, already in Raven Rock.
translations.chinese: 是的。我从线人那里得到了些消息，鸦石镇可能已经有一伙乌伦家或者哈拉鲁家的人了。

agentText:

translations.english: People have mentioned it's a bit odd about how close in age Mirri appears to be to her father, but that's hardly a cause for alarm.
translations.chinese: 有人说过，米莉看上去和她父亲的年纪太相近了，但这并不值得大惊小怪。

translations.english: Just make sure that you find solid evidence. If I accuse them without it, I'll be the laughingstock of the colony.
translations.chinese: 务必要找到确凿的证据。要是没有证据就指控他们，我会成为整个聚落的笑柄。

translations.english: I'm simply honoring a fellow departed Dunmer.
translations.chinese: 我只是来祭奠一位逝去的丹莫同胞。

translations.english: What do you mean? I thought I was clear.
translations.chinese: 你在说什么？我已经说得很清楚了。

agentText:

translations.english: He underestimated the Redoran Guard. They were organized and brought a swift end to the coup.
translations.chinese: 他低估了瑞多然卫兵。他们训练有素，迅速平息了这场政变。

translations.english: Vilur tried to run, but he was caught by Captain Veleth himself.
translations.chinese: 维勒试图逃跑，但被维黎斯队长亲自逮到。

translations.english: Vilur Ulen was executed a short time later and his remains placed in the Ulen Ancestral Tomb.
translations.chinese: 不久后维勒·乌伦就被处决，骨灰安放在乌伦家祖坟里。

translations.english: If you want to catch those slippery slaughterfish, you need to let them come to you.
translations.chinese: 如果想抓到那些滑溜溜的食人鱼，就得让它们主动来找你。

translations.english: Actually, I do.
translations.chinese: 实际上，我有。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201F2D1]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Actually, I do. | ZH: 实际上，我有。 | SID: 000AFC

translations.english: I maintain a few contacts in other Dunmer settlements across Tamriel.
translations.chinese: 我和全泰姆瑞尔的一些丹莫聚落都有联系。

translations.english: Most hail from House Redoran, but there are a few from other houses.
translations.chinese: 大多数是瑞多然家的，但也有少部分别家的。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

translations.english: As second councilor, it's my responsibility to explore the possibility of any threat, no matter how paranoid it might seem.
translations.chinese: 作为副议员，深入考虑各种威胁是我的责任，无论看上去有多偏执。

translations.english: They've contributed coin, food, supplies... even helped repair a few of the buildings in town with their own hands.
translations.chinese: 他们捐了钱、食物和物资……甚至还亲手帮助修复了镇上的几座建筑。

translations.english: They're quite wealthy and they've been quite generous by sharing their fortune with the community.
translations.chinese: 他们很富有，也非常慷慨地与社区分享他们的财富。

translations.english: No, I just think he's going about this the wrong way.
translations.chinese: 不，我只是认为他的方法错了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201F2D6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No, I just think he's going about this the wrong way. | ZH: 不，我只是认为他的方法错了。 | SID: 000A5E

translations.english: Before you dismiss this entirely, I was hoping you might be able to lend a hand by investigating on the councilor's behalf.
translations.chinese: 在你拒绝之前，我还是希望你能为了议员帮忙调查一下。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201F2D7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Before you dismiss this entirely, I was hoping you might be able to lend a hand by investigating on the councilor's behalf. | ZH: 在你拒绝之前，我还是希望你能为了议员帮忙调查一下。 | SID: 000B6F

translations.english: It may be justified, but it certainly isn't appreciated. Councilor Morvayn simply feels that I'm being paranoid.
translations.chinese: 可能合理，但肯定不被重视。莫尔凡议员就觉得我有些多疑。

agentText:

translations.english: Tilisu is wife to the family patriarch, Vendil. They have a single child, a daughter named Mirri.
translations.chinese: 蒂莉苏是这户人家的家长文德尔的妻子。他们育有一女叫米莉。

translations.english: They arrived here ten years ago, and have been nothing but a benefit to Raven Rock ever since.
translations.chinese: 他们大约在十年前来到这里，从那以后就一直在为鸦石镇做贡献。

agentText:

translations.english: I'm simply honoring a fellow departed Dunmer, and you hurl baseless accusations at me?
translations.chinese: 我不过是在祭奠一位逝去的丹莫同胞，你就无缘无故地污蔑我？

translations.english: What kind of nonsense is that!?
translations.chinese: 你在胡扯什么？！

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201F2DA]
Translations:

translations.english: He arrived alone, but spread enough coin around to start changing people's minds.
translations.chinese: 他来时是一个人，但是在这儿花了很多钱来改变人们的想法。

translations.english: Half the bloody town joined his side. Can you believe that?
translations.chinese: 结果半数刁民都站到他那边儿去了，你敢信吗？

agentText:

translations.english: Summoning you here was part of my plan. I was hoping you'd be interested in investigating for me.
translations.chinese: 把你找来是我的计划之一，我希望你有兴趣帮我调查一下。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Summoning you here was part of my plan. I was hoping you'd be interested in investigating for me. | ZH: 把你找来是我的计划之一，我希望你有兴趣帮我调查一下。 | SID: 000B4F

translations.english: It's a private matter. Let's just say they seek revenge for the execution of one of their own... ordered by Councilor Morvayn himself.
translations.chinese: 某种私人恩怨。简单来说就是想为他们被处决的某人报仇……命令是莫尔凡议员亲自下的。

translations.english: The problem is I don't have any solid proof that anyone from House Hlaalu is hidden among us... only my suspicions.
translations.chinese: 问题是我没有哈拉鲁家在我们当中安插奸细的确切证据……只是有些猜测。

translations.english: Since there aren't any Ulens left on this island, I've taken it upon myself to leave the traditional offering in their stead.
translations.chinese: 因为岛上已经没有乌伦家的人了，所以我自愿为他们送上传统供品。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201F2DF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Since there aren't any Ulens left on this island, I've taken it upon myself to leave the traditional offering in their stead. | ZH: 因为岛上已经没有乌伦家的人了，所以我自愿为他们送上传统供品。 | SID: 000A76

translations.english: Back in 95, Vilur Ulen came to Raven Rock with a plan to take over our town.
translations.chinese: 在95年，维勒·乌伦带着一个接管鸦石镇的计划来到了这里。

translations.english: The fetcher thought he could stir up the locals and use them against the Redoran Guard and then murder Councilor Morvayn when we weren't looking.
translations.chinese: 那个费彻以为他能煽动本地人，让他们对付瑞多然卫兵，然后在我们没注意到的时候刺杀莫尔凡议员。

translations.english: Well, well. Adril's got himself a spy, does he?
translations.chinese: 嘿嘿。阿德尔都有密探了，是吧？

translations.english: Azura knows he needs all the help he can get. He's been chasing the Ulens for years now.
translations.chinese: 连阿祖拉都知道他需要任何能得到的帮助，他追逐乌伦家已经好些年了。

translations.english: I had a feeling you'd be willing to listen to me.
translations.chinese: 我就觉得你会听进去。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201F2E2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I had a feeling you'd be willing to listen to me. | ZH: 我就觉得你会听进去。 | SID: 002239

translations.english: If you're wrong about Tilisu, things would quickly go downhill around here and the real culprits might slip away. I can't afford for that to happen.
translations.chinese: 要是你错怪了蒂莉苏，事态会迅速恶化，真凶也可能会溜走。我负不起这种责任。

translations.english: I'm not kicking down anyone's door until I have solid evidence in hand.
translations.chinese: 除非已有确切的证据，不然我不会去踹任何人的家门。

translations.english: Since the ash yam is born of the very same soil, it represents rebirth and renewal... the fact that life ends and begins anew.
translations.chinese: 因为灰烬薯是相同土壤上长出来的，也就象征着重生和更新……即生命周而复始的真相。

translations.english: When a Dunmer is laid to rest, the body is burned and returned to the ashen soil.
translations.chinese: 当丹莫去世后，遗体会被火化，然后回归灰质土壤。

translations.english: The best place to start would be Geldis Sadri over at the Retching Netch Cornerclub.
translations.chinese: 最先找的应该是呕吐气母街角吧的吉迪斯·萨德利。

translations.english: If he provides you any leads, check them out before bringing them to my attention. I can't afford to make any mistakes.
translations.chinese: 要是他给了你什么线索，最好确认一下再来找我。我没有犯错的余地。

translations.english: I need you to start out by being my eyes and ears... search Raven Rock and see if you can root out these traitors.
translations.chinese: 我需要你来做我的耳目……搜查一下鸦石镇，看看能不能抓到这些叛徒。

translations.english: Raven Rock is a small settlement, so it's hard to accomplish anything in secret.
translations.chinese: 鸦石镇是个小聚落，在这里很难进行秘密行动。

translations.english: If any of them is from House Hlaalu, I wouldn't be able to make a move without them knowing.
translations.chinese: 要是我们当中有哈拉鲁家的人，不管做什么他们都会知道。

agentText:

translations.english: The Ulen Family of House Hlaalu, a rival Great House, has placed a deathmark on the councilor's head.
translations.chinese: 作为竞争对手的大家族，哈拉鲁家族中的乌伦家给议员发了一个死亡标记。

translations.english: Wonderful, simply wonderful! Councilor Morvayn will be quite pleased when he hears about this.
translations.chinese: 太好了，真是太好了！莫尔凡议员听到这消息肯定很高兴。

translations.english: If Tilisu's involved in any sort of plot to harm Councilor Morvayn, I'm going to need hard evidence to prove it.
translations.chinese: 如果蒂莉苏参与了某种危害莫尔凡议员的阴谋，我就需要确凿的证据来揭露它。

translations.english: So Geldis's plan worked, eh? Everytime we tried it, no one would ever show up.
translations.chinese: 所以吉迪斯的计划起作用了？我们每次尝试，从没人出现过。

translations.english: Nice to see a fellow Dunmer following the traditional customs.
translations.chinese: 很高兴看到一个遵循传统习俗的丹莫同胞。

translations.english: I presume the same thing you're doing... leaving an offering for the departed.
translations.chinese: 可能和你做的是同一件事……给死者送祭品。

translations.english: Forgive my surprise, it's just that I wouldn't expect that sort of behavior from someone who isn't Dunmer.
translations.chinese: 请原谅我的惊诧，我只是没想到这种行为会发生在外族人身上。

translations.english: I presume the same thing you're doing... leaving an offering for the departed.

translations.english: You can thank me if it works. Until then, I'd head to the tomb and wait until your visitor shows up.
translations.chinese: 有用的话再谢吧。在那之前，我要是你就会去坟里等着客人现身呢。

translations.english: I'm pleased you've reconsidered.
translations.chinese: 很高兴你改变了心意。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0201F2EF]

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm pleased you've reconsidered. | ZH: 很高兴你改变了心意。 | SID: 000A6A

translations.english: Hlaalu deserved every bit of the hatred they received once the Empire released its grasp on Morrowind.
translations.chinese: 在帝国放松了对晨风的控制后，哈拉鲁所受的憎恶都是活该。

translations.english: Having past ties to the Empire immediately turned them into the scapegoat for the Dunmer people's suffering.
translations.chinese: 由于过去和帝国的关系，他们立马被指为丹莫人民遭受苦难的替罪羊。

translations.english: I'm afraid that one day I'll awaken and discover him dead, and I don't want it to come to that.
translations.chinese: 我就怕某天醒来发现他死了，我不希望事态发展到那种地步。

translations.english: You should warn the others.
translations.chinese: 你该警告下其他人。

translations.english: Master Neloth is going to be casting some rather loud spells in the next day or two.
translations.chinese: 内洛斯大师会在接下来一两天施放一些噪音很大的法术。

translations.english: Oh, and if the tower door suddenly gets icy cold, don't come in.
translations.chinese: 哦，要是塔门突然开始结冰，就别进来了。

translations.english: Elynea is waiting for fresh taproot before she can regrow that chamber.
translations.chinese: 艾琳娜需要新鲜的直立根才能重新培植房间。

translations.english: You have some tea, but I'll get you a fresh cup.
translations.chinese: 您先喝点茶，我过会儿再帮您倒一杯。

translations.english: I don't know how he drinks that stuff.
translations.chinese: 不懂为什么他要喝那玩意儿。

translations.english: And suffered twice as much.
translations.chinese: 受的苦也是两倍于以往。

Translations:

translations.chinese: 那个房间已经枯萎很久了。

translations.english: Oh, and remind Elynea that she needs to fix my tower.
translations.chinese: 哦，提醒艾琳娜记得给我修塔。

translations.english: Varona, get me some canis root tea.
translations.chinese: 瓦罗纳，帮我倒杯犬根茶。

translations.english: If you're here about the canis root tea, it's almost ready.
translations.chinese: 你要是来拿犬根茶的话，马上就好了。

translations.english: I'm sick of all this ash. I know dunmer aren't supposed to mind the ash, but I hate it.
translations.chinese: 真受够这些火山灰了。我知道丹莫应该习惯了，但就是非常讨厌。

agentText:

translations.english: I really can't put this trip off for much longer.
translations.chinese: 我真的不能再拖下去了。

translations.english: That's what you said yesterday!
translations.chinese: 您昨天也这么说！

agentText:

translations.english: Well you'll just have to wait. Last time I brought his meal up late he asked if I wanted to be a part of one of his experiments.
translations.chinese: 你还是等着吧，上次给他送饭送完了，他就问我要不要当他的试验品。

translations.english: Bah! Patience is for the young. An old dunmer like me can't afford it.
translations.chinese: 呸！只有年轻人才有耐心，我这个老丹莫等不起。

agentText:

translations.english: I've already learned more than I would have in twice the time at the College of Winterhold.
translations.chinese: 我在这边学到的东西是在冬堡学院的两倍多。

translations.english: Neloth is a master wizard of the House Telvanni.
translations.chinese: 内洛斯是泰瓦尼家族的高等巫师。

translations.english: Let me get you the rest of the list tomorrow. I'm just too busy to think about this right now.
translations.chinese: 我明天再跟你说其他的，现在太忙了，没空想这个。

translations.english: Maybe some daedra heart. Elynea never seems to stock it.
translations.chinese: 可能还要些迪德拉心脏，艾琳娜从来不多留些。

translations.chinese: 我不能一直等啊，内洛斯大师不停问我买到灵魂石了没。

translations.english: What with all the ash spawn on the road these days, I'm not leaving until the trip is worth it.
translations.chinese: 现在路上都是灰烬怪，要是没必要我也不想去。

translations.english: Soon. Be patient. Ulves is still making his list. And of course Master Neloth keeps adding to his.
translations.chinese: 快了，你要耐心点。乌尔维斯还在开他的单子，内洛斯大师当然还要加些东西。

translations.chinese: 他们说里面还埋藏着比龙族更可怕的东西。难以想象，但如果是真的……

translations.english: The legends speak of that place. Terrible battles fought at the temple. The dragons burning it to the ground in rage.
translations.chinese: 传说中曾提到过那个地方。那座神殿曾有过一场大战。龙族盛怒之下将其夷为平地。

translations.chinese: 那么，你看到了什么，对吧？我的魔法在逐渐变弱，围绕村子的屏障也是如此。时间不多了，把你知道的都告诉我吧。

translations.english: I'm afraid I can't give you any answers. But there are ruins of an ancient temple of Miraak's toward the center of the island.
translations.chinese: 恐怕我给不了你什么答案，不过岛的中央有一座米拉克的古代神殿遗址。

translations.english: I'm not sure, but it is fascinating, isn't it?
translations.chinese: 我不确定，但是很值得探究，不是吗？

translations.english: If I were you, I'd look there.
translations.chinese: 我要是你就会去那边看看。

translations.english: Perhaps it has some relation to what's going on here. Quite unexpected.
translations.chinese: 可能和这儿发生的事情有所联系呢，真是意想不到。

translations.english: You may be able to break the hold on our people there, and free them from control.
translations.chinese: 也许你能破除我们在那里的族人所受的束缚，将他们从奴役中解救出来。

translations.english: But our time here is running out. The few of us left free of control cannot protect ourselves for much longer.
translations.chinese: 但时间不多了，我们这些剩下来的人没法长时间保护自己。

translations.english: You must go to Saering's Watch. Learn there the word that Miraak learned long ago, and use that knowledge on the Wind Stone.
translations.chinese: 你得前往瑟林看台，学会很久以前米拉克在那儿学的龙语，运用那些知识来解放风石。

translations.english: I am unsure. It may mean that you could save us, or it may mean that you could bring about our destruction.
translations.chinese: 我不确定。可能意味着你能救我们，也可能是指你会带来我们的灭亡。

translations.english: It means what I feared has come to pass. Miraak was never truly gone, and now has returned.
translations.chinese: 这代表我所畏惧的事情已经发生了。米拉克从未真正灭亡，现在他回归了。

translations.english: Dead? Oh, merciful ancestors!
translations.chinese: 死了？哦，仁慈的先祖啊！

translations.english: Best tell Neloth. I'm sure he'll mourn for all of two seconds.
translations.chinese: 最好跟内洛斯说一声。他最多就会哀悼两秒钟。

translations.english: That blasted wizard couldn't be bothered to give her some protection for those trips. This is all his fault.
translations.chinese: 那个混蛋法师根本就没想过为她的路途提供保护，全是他的错。

translations.chinese: 哦，瓦罗纳。她死的真不值。这是泰尔·米斯瑞恩的黑暗时光。

translations.chinese: 我从没见过她，内洛斯大师收我也是因为她死了。

translations.english: I heard it was messy.
translations.chinese: 听说她死的很惨。

translations.english: Master Neloth's old apprentice? The one before me?

translations.english: Her lust for power was her undoing.
translations.chinese: 对力量的贪欲让她走向了灭亡。

translations.english: She let Master Neloth do some ritual thing to her. We buried her out back.
translations.chinese: 她让内洛斯大师对她进行某种仪式，我们把她埋在后面了。

translations.english: That was some twenty years ago now.
translations.chinese: 那是二十年前的事情了。

translations.english: She was a headstrong one. Always pushing Master Neloth to teach her more.
translations.chinese: 她是个固执的人，总是催着内洛斯大师多教教她。

- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: She let Master Neloth do some ritual thing to her. We buried her out back. | ZH: 她让内洛斯大师对她进行某种仪式，我们把她埋在后面了。 | SID: 000D91
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: That was some twenty years ago now. | ZH: 那是二十年前的事情了。 | SID: 000F1D
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: She was a headstrong one. Always pushing Master Neloth to teach her more. | ZH: 她是个固执的人，总是催着内洛斯大师多教教她。 | SID: 000FE6

translations.english: I tried to court her, but she had no interest in me.
translations.chinese: 我追求过她，但她对我不感兴趣。

translations.english: She died in some experiment Master Neloth did on her. He claimed she wanted him to.
translations.chinese: 她死于内洛斯大师某次在她身上做的实验，内洛斯大师坚称她是自愿的。

translations.english: Ildari? She was a beauty, she was.
translations.chinese: 伊达利？她以前很漂亮，真的。

translations.english: She was only interested in magic and power.
translations.chinese: 她只在乎魔法和力量。

translations.english: Mogrul isn't someone you can ignore.
translations.chinese: 莫古尔不是你能放着不管的人。

translations.english: Ugh! The heart stone protects me!
translations.chinese: 啊！心石保护我！

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [020200B3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ugh! The heart stone protects me! | ZH: 啊！心石保护我！ | SID: 000F57

translations.english: Try Raven Rock. They are in awe of me there. I'm sure almost anyone would be willing to serve me.
translations.chinese: 去鸦石镇看看，那边的人都敬畏我。我确信几乎每个人都愿意服侍我。

translations.english: I suppose you'll have to find me a new steward.
translations.chinese: 看起来你要帮我找个新管家了。

translations.english: There are more and more of those things showing up around here lately.
translations.chinese: 那玩意儿最近越来越常冒出来了。

translations.english: Varona goes to Raven Rock all the time. I'm sure she's fine.

translations.english: It takes a strong will to command a dragon's soul. Perhaps you aren't as powerful as you think.
translations.chinese: 掌控龙魂需要强大的意志。也许你没有想象中那么强大。

translations.english: Not this time, Dragonborn. This one's mine.
translations.chinese: 这次不行，龙裔。这条是我的。

translations.english: This dragon's soul belongs to me.
translations.chinese: 这条龙的灵魂属于我。

translations.english: Do you ever wonder if it hurts? To have one's soul ripped out like that?
translations.chinese: 你有想过那会痛吗？像那样把灵魂硬生生扯出来？

translations.english: Thank you for your help. We will meet again soon.
translations.chinese: 感谢你的协助。我们后会有期。

agentText:

translations.english: One step closer to my return.
translations.chinese: 我的回归又近了一步。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

translations.english: I grow ever stronger, Dragonborn.
translations.chinese: 我更强大了，龙裔。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [020200D7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I grow ever stronger, Dragonborn. | ZH: 我更强大了，龙裔。 | SID: 000F58

translations.english: So it is. You have proven yourself an ally to the Skaal, and so the Skaal shall be allies to you.
translations.chinese: 确实如此。你证明了自己是斯卡尔人的盟友，斯卡尔人也会如此待你。

agentText:

translations.english: I don't have any gold to pay you with, but I can give you this staff.
translations.chinese: 我给不了你钱，但我可以给你这把法杖。

translations.english: What a relief. Master Neloth surely would have punished me had he found out.
translations.chinese: 真是松了口气。内洛斯大师要是知道了，我肯定会被他惩罚的。

translations.english: Yes, but don't tell Master Neloth. I'd have to give him your payment.
translations.chinese: 是的，但别告诉内洛斯大师。不然我得把你付的钱给他了。

translations.english: Not so much with, as for.
translations.chinese: 不是一起，是为他工作。

translations.english: I am Master Neloth's apprentice. He's teaching me the art of sorcery.
translations.chinese: 我是内洛斯大师的学徒。他教我法术之道。

translations.english: This is Master Neloth's tower. He's a Telvanni Wizard.
translations.chinese: 这里是内洛斯大师的塔楼。他是个泰瓦尼法师。

translations.english: Deer, bear and horker provide most of what we need for skins and meat.
translations.chinese: 鹿、熊还有海象提供了我们需要的大部分皮和肉。

translations.english: Sometimes, when the wolves grow too bold and threaten the village, we must hunt them to cull their numbers.
translations.chinese: 有时，狼群会莽撞到成了村子的威胁，我们必须猎杀它们，减少它们的数量。

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Sometimes, when the wolves grow too bold and threaten the village, we must hunt them to cull their numbers. | ZH: 有时，狼群会莽撞到成了村子的威胁，我们必须猎杀它们，减少它们的数量。 | SID: 000DE7

translations.english: I doubt that an outsider could truly understand, but I hope my words have helped to answer your question.
translations.chinese: 我想作为外来者你可能无法完全理解，但希望我的回答能为你解惑。

translations.english: When we stalk large game, I lead our hunters in tracking the beast. It is also a way of saying that I am the most skilled hunter in the village.
translations.chinese: 当我们要追踪大型猎物时，我会带着其他猎人盯紧那野兽。这也代表我是村里最有经验的猎人。

translations.english: I suppose it's been nearly a year now. My goodness, how the time has flown!
translations.chinese: 我想快一年了，天啊，时间过得好快！

translations.english: Well, let me think...
translations.chinese: 嗯，让我想想……

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

translations.english: Oh no, most certainly not. I'm a historian. I'm here to learn about the history of Solstheim.
translations.chinese: 哦，不是，当然不是。我是个历史学家。来这儿研究索瑟海姆的历史。

translations.english: Solstheim is a fascinating place, but we know so little about its past. There are many mysteries that remain unsolved.
translations.chinese: 索瑟海姆是个迷人的地方，但我们对这儿的历史几乎一无所知。还有很多谜团尚未解开。

translations.english: Many hunters pass through our village, and sometimes the Dark Elves of Raven Rock visit us.
translations.chinese: 很多猎人会路过我们的村子，有时鸦石镇的暗精灵也会来拜访。

translations.english: They bring us things from their homeland that we can't find on the island, such as spices, fine cloth and ores that we cannot mine here.
translations.chinese: 他们从自己家乡带来了很多这个岛上找不到的东西，比如香料、上等布料和我们这儿挖不到的矿石。

translations.english: It's true we Skaal prefer a simpler life than some, but we do still enjoy a luxury from time to time.
translations.chinese: 我们斯卡尔人确实更喜欢简单的生活，但偶尔也会享受一些奢侈玩意儿。

agentText:

translations.english: I was a soldier for a time, and then a mercenary, but I was never truly happy until I came here.
translations.chinese: 我以前参过军，也当过佣兵，但来这儿后才找到了幸福。

translations.english: It's true that my heart has always been restless, and fighting was the only way I could find peace.
translations.chinese: 而我也确实静不下来，打架成了唯一能让我静下来的事儿。

translations.english: Well, my mother used to say that I was born an angry child.
translations.chinese: 嗯，我妈常说我生来爱发火。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Well, my mother used to say that I was born an angry child. | ZH: 嗯，我妈常说我生来爱发火。 | SID: 000ECB

translations.english: You are an outsider, and I don't know if I can make you understand. I will try.
translations.chinese: 你是外来者，我不确定是否能够让你理解，试试看吧。

translations.english: As all rivers must return to the sea, so all life returns in time to the All-Maker.
translations.chinese: 就像所有河流终汇成海，所有生命最终也会回归造物主。

translations.english: The All-Maker is the maker of all things, and it is from the All-Maker that life flows like a great river.
translations.chinese: 造物主创造了一切，生命就是从它而来，像江河那般滔滔流淌。

translations.english: I know our ways must seem strange to you, but the nine gods of the Empire are equally strange to us.
translations.chinese: 我知道我们的传统对你来说很奇怪，但是帝国那九个神在我们眼中也很奇怪。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: As all rivers must return to the sea, so all life returns in time to the All-Maker. | ZH: 就像所有河流终汇成海，所有生命最终也会回归造物主。 | SID: 000DA2

- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: I know our ways must seem strange to you, but the nine gods of the Empire are equally strange to us. | ZH: 我知道我们的传统对你来说很奇怪，但是帝国那九个神在我们眼中也很奇怪。 | SID: 000EC2

translations.english: The less we disturb the land and the beasts within it, the more we respect the wishes of the All-Maker.
translations.chinese: 我们越少干扰这片土地和其中的野兽，就越尊重造物主的意愿。

translations.english: We believe that all creatures have a right to live as they will, and when we take what we need from them, we thank the beast for its gifts.
translations.chinese: 我们认为所有生物都有以自己想要的方式生活的权利。当我们从野兽身上获得所需之物后，会感谢它们的赠予。

translations.english: The Skaal hunt not for sport, but to survive.
translations.chinese: 斯卡尔人狩猎不为娱乐，只为谋生。

translations.english: You risked your life to save Baldor. Your name will be honored in our village.
translations.chinese: 你冒着生命危险救了鲍德尔，村子里会称颂你的大名。

translations.english: I'm relieved that you were able to save Baldor. I admit, I wasn't ready to become smith of the Skaal.
translations.chinese: 你救了鲍德尔让我松了口气。我得承认，还没准备好成为斯卡尔的铁匠。

agentText:

translations.english: I suppose I've always spoken my mind and tried to do what's best for the Skaal. That's why the others call me Fanari Strong-Voice.
translations.chinese: 我想是因为我总是心直口快，做对斯卡尔最有利的决定，所以他们才会叫我“强音”法娜丽。

translations.english: I was chosen by the people of the village when our last leader, Skaf the Giant, departed the cold world to join the All-Maker.
translations.chinese: 当上一位首领，“巨人”斯卡夫离开这寒冷世界去陪伴造物主后，村里的族人就推举我为领袖。

translations.english: The first piece of wisdom I teach to any hunter of the Skaal is to ask the simple question, should I truly kill this beast?
translations.chinese: 我教给所有斯卡尔猎人的第一课，就是问自己一个简单的问题：我真的应该杀死这头野兽吗？

translations.english: We take only what we need, and so we preserve the oneness with the land.
translations.chinese: 我们只拿自己需要的，这样才能与这片土地合一。

translations.english: We live as one with the land, for the land provides all that we need.
translations.chinese: 我们与这片提供了一切生活所需的土地合为一体。

translations.english: Also, like the Nords of old, we embrace the All-Maker. We do not worship the nine gods of the Empire.
translations.chinese: 我们与古早诺德人一样，信奉造物主，从不拜帝国的那九个神。

translations.english: We are Nords, much like those you'll find in Skyrim. Long ago our path diverged from that of our cousins on the mainland.
translations.chinese: 我们是诺德人，跟你在天际看到的那些一样。很久以前，我们和内陆的远亲们渐行渐远。

translations.english: Aren't you going to read the book? I didn't go to all this trouble just to stand around admiring it.
translations.chinese: 你不打算读这本书吗？我这么大费周章不只是为了站在它面前欣赏封面。

translations.english: In the city's days of glory, it was reputed to be able to assemble a complete automaton in a single day.
translations.chinese: 在这座城市的光辉岁月里，号称是一天就能组装一台完整的百夫长。

translations.english: These must be the "Great Workshops of Nchardak". Impressive even in ruins.
translations.chinese: 这里一定是“尼查达克大工坊”了。即使成了废墟也很壮观。

translations.english: Much of the Dwemer army at the Battle of Red Mountain must have come from here.
translations.chinese: 红山之战的锻莫军队应该大多都来自于此。

translations.english: It is a dark thing, unnatural. I would have nothing to do with it. But the Dark Elf Wizard, Neloth...
translations.chinese: 这是非自然的黑暗造物，我不想和它有任何接触。但那个暗精灵法师，内洛斯……

translations.english: He came to us some time ago, asking about Black Books. I believe he knows a great deal about them. Perhaps too much.
translations.chinese: 不久前他来找过我们，询问关于黑暗经书的事情。我相信他对于它们的了解非常丰富。可能丰富的过头了。

translations.english: Seek him out to the south. Be cautious, Dragonborn. There is something else at work here.
translations.chinese: 去南边找他吧。但是当心啊龙裔。除此之外还有他物。

translations.english: Miraak had this? This does not look like something of the Dragon cult.
translations.chinese: 米拉克的东西？这看来不像是拜龙教的。

translations.chinese: 这我帮不了你，这里没人能帮你。你需要米拉克学过的那些知识。还得更透彻地了解这本黑暗经书。

translations.chinese: 肯定有危险，但要是你能处理这些小贼，我们都会感激你。

translations.english: Bandits sometimes come at night to steal our food. They think that stealing from us is easier than hunting for themselves.
translations.chinese: 夜间有时会有强盗来偷我们的食物，他们认为从我们这里偷比自己打猎来的简单。

translations.english: What can I do to help the Skaal?
translations.chinese: 我有什么能帮上斯卡尔的？

translations.chinese: 愿造物主赐你巨熊之力，让你的意志坚如磐石。

translations.english: Very good. By my count, we've found a total of four cubes. I have one that you forgot to pick up. I hope you didn't leave any others lying around.

translations.chinese: 信里描述了挖掘工人们在矿里发现的东西。他们想让格瑞希安去瞧个仔细。

translations.english: The East Empire Company must have felt it was of great value, as they locked that section of the mine off from everyone else.
translations.chinese: 东帝国公司一定是觉得那玩意儿很珍贵，所以把那片矿区封锁起来不让别人进去了。

translations.chinese: 听着，我老婆唠叨我太老了，不能在这矿里磨蹭着找我妄想出来的东西。

translations.english: Time's my enemy... it's caught up with me before I could find the answers that I'm looking for.
translations.chinese: 时间在和我作对……在我还没找到答案前就追上我了。

translations.chinese: 我想我这辈子最多也就见过一两块吧，锻造可是我吃饭的本事。

translations.english: If you're looking to learn more, you should head over to the Skaal Village. Someone there's bound to know more about it than I do.
translations.chinese: 你要是想了解更多，就该去斯卡尔村。那儿肯定有人比我懂得多。

translations.chinese: 我看看！

translations.english: Now that I have his journal in hand, I can get some closure from the East Empire Company. Make them pay for lying to everyone.
translations.chinese: 既然我拿到了他的日志，也就可以和东帝国公司做个了断了。让他们为向大家撒谎付出代价。

translations.english: Ha, I knew it! Gratian's death wasn't because of a rockfall, it was just a story to keep people away from the tombs.
translations.chinese: 哈，我就知道！格瑞希安绝不是死于塌方，那只是让人远离墓穴的托词。

translations.english: Crescius, you're an obstinate old fool and you're going to get yourself killed.
translations.chinese: 克雷修斯，你这顽固傻老头子迟早把自己害死。

translations.chinese: 哼，也许吧。但我很难再信任何人了，大家都觉得我疯了。

translations.chinese: 格瑞希安·凯利乌斯。他一生都在勘探全泰姆瑞尔的古代遗迹，大约200年前死在了这矿里。

translations.chinese: 有些人说它是“附魔过的冰”，但我不认为就那么简单。

translations.english: Calling stalhrim an ore is like calling my forge a campfire.
translations.chinese: 把魔冰叫作矿石的话，那我的锻炉就是营火了。

translations.chinese: 这才叫讲道理嘛。采矿工具就该属于矿工家庭。

translations.english: Just tell him I lost it or something.
translations.chinese: 你告诉他我弄丢了就行。

translations.chinese: 我需要。我想知道格瑞希安出什么事儿，还有东帝国公司在隐瞒什么。

translations.english: It's the only tool tough enough to crack stalhrim, is what it is.
translations.chinese: 那是唯一可以敲碎魔冰的强韧工具。

translations.english: Not many of those beauties left in the world... forging them is a lost art.
translations.chinese: 这种好东西在世上不剩几把了……它们的锻造方法已经是门失传的技术。

translations.chinese: 为什么要跟你说？我甚至都不认识你。

translations.english: That was almost two centuries ago. There may be nothing left to find.
translations.chinese: 那差不多是两百年前的事了。下面可能找不到什么东西了。

translations.chinese: 你回来了！

translations.english: Please, tell me what you found.

translations.english: Exploring, huh? Most folks think this place isn't worth the effort.
translations.chinese: 探查，哈？大多数人都觉得没必要费这个力。

translations.english: Look, if you see Crescius, tell him to give me that pickaxe back and I'll pay you for the trouble.
translations.chinese: 听着，要是你看到克雷修斯，跟他说把鹤嘴锄还给我，我会付你跑路费的。

translations.english: Um, I prefer to handle these things on my own.
translations.chinese: 嗯，这些事情我宁愿自己来。

translations.english: And I'm telling you that I'll do whatever it takes to find my great-grandfather's remains. He's down here, I can feel it.
translations.chinese: 我告诉你，我会不惜一切代价找到曾祖父的遗体。他就在下面，我都感觉得到。

translations.english: Here's everything I have. The letter, the key. Please, do this for me so I can finally regain the respect that I've lost.
translations.chinese: 这些是我的全部的了。信，钥匙。拜托了，帮我做这件事，让我最后能挽回失去的尊严。

translations.chinese: 虽然我很喜欢这个地方，但我也想知道到底能不能打开书的保护装置。你还没忘我们来的目的吧？

translations.english: How am I supposed to get anything done with part of the tower withered like this?
translations.chinese: 塔的某处枯萎了，我怎么有工作的心情呢？

translations.english: He never sleeps. I don't know how he does it, but he never rests for even a moment.
translations.chinese: 他从来不睡觉。我不清楚是怎么做到的，但是他从来不休息。

translations.english: I hope Elynea has something for headaches.
translations.chinese: 希望艾琳娜有治头痛的药。

translations.english: Then this will be over soon for you.
translations.chinese: 那么很快就结束了。

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Then this will be over soon for you. | ZH: 那么很快就结束了。 | SID: 000D39

translations.english: Good. Then let us see who truly has the soul of the Dov.
translations.chinese: 很好。那么我们来看看谁才有真的都瓦之魂。

translations.chinese: 废话就不多说了。

translations.english: I assure you, if I could convince Adril to do that, I'd be on the next ship back to Blacklight.
translations.chinese: 我可以保证，要是真能说服阿德尔这么做，我立马就搭船回黑光城了。

translations.english: Unfortunately, Adril and Councilor Morvayn are very close friends, and they will never abandon one another... despite my feelings.
translations.chinese: 可惜阿德尔和莫尔凡议员是非常要好的朋友，他们永远不会抛弃彼此……不论我的感受如何。

translations.english: I have to be. As Second Councilor, the security of Raven Rock is my primary concern.
translations.chinese: 我没得选。作为副议员，鸦石镇的安危是我最关心的问题。

translations.english: Well of course. With four other houses on the Council, someone has to keep the rabble organized.
translations.chinese: 当然了，议会也包括其他四个大家族，总得有人把这群乌合之众组织起来。

translations.english: Our house leads the Council by virtue of our preeminence in battle, wisdom, and ancestral glory.
translations.chinese: 我们家族领导议会凭的是战场上的卓越表现、智慧以及自古以来的荣耀。

translations.english: They embody a council made up of five Great Houses: Telvanni, Dres, Indoril, Sadras and Redoran.
translations.chinese: 五个大家族组成了议会：泰瓦尼、德莱斯、因多瑞尔、萨德拉斯和瑞多然。

translations.english: This isn't Skyrim, outlander. A group of powerful and influential Dunmer families have been ruling Morrowind for millennia.
translations.chinese: 这里不是天际，外地人。强大且具有影响力的丹莫家族们已经统治了晨风几千年了。

translations.english: When I fall asleep at night, all I can do is hope he'll still be there when I awaken.
translations.chinese: 我每晚入睡时，唯一能做的就是祈祷醒来后他还在身边。

translations.english: He's in grave danger, and yet he continues to place himself in harm's way.
translations.chinese: 他的处境已经很危险了，但他还是继续将自己置于危险之中。

translations.english: This island was never meant for us. There's too much death here.
translations.chinese: 我们不该来这座岛的，这里随时笼罩于死亡之下。

translations.english: We're the mightiest of the Great Houses and we lead the Council, the ruling body of Morrowind.
translations.chinese: 我们是最强盛的丹莫大家族，我们主导着晨风的统治机构————议会。

translations.english: You've never heard of House Redoran?
translations.chinese: 你没听说过瑞多然家？

agentText:
