- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: You've never heard of House Redoran? | ZH: 你没听说过瑞多然家？ | SID: 002311

translations.english: It's fashioned from actual bone that's been reinforced with a resin-like material and then shaped to form the armored plating.
translations.chinese: 它是由真的骨头以树脂状材料加固后，塑性形成装甲板。

translations.english: Ah, this is bonemold armor... quite impressive, wouldn't you say?
translations.chinese: 啊，这是骨模盔甲……看了就忘不掉，对吧？

translations.english: It might appear brittle, but I'd wager it could stop the blow of a weapon better than iron or steel.
translations.chinese: 可能看起来很脆，但我打包票它比钢铁更能抵抗武器击打。

translations.english: Adril Arano, Second Councilor of Raven Rock.
translations.chinese: 阿德尔·阿拉诺，鸦石镇的副议员。

translations.english: How I hate that title... damn fool's going to get himself killed over it someday.
translations.chinese: 我恨这个头衔……那个傻子迟早会为它丧命。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02023FCC]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: How I hate that title... damn fool's going to get himself killed over it someday. | ZH: 我恨这个头衔……那个傻子迟早会为它丧命。 | SID: 000E68

translations.english: Other than that, I'm not at liberty to discuss it.
translations.chinese: 除此之外，我不便透露。

translations.english: He has quite a few friends on the Council back in Morrowind and they wanted to ensure his safety while he was here.
translations.chinese: 他在晨风的议会有不少朋友，他们希望确保他在这里安然无恙。

translations.english: To protect Councilor Morvayn, of course.
translations.chinese: 当然是为了保护莫尔凡议员。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02023FCE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Other than that, I'm not at liberty to discuss it. | ZH: 除此之外，我不便透露。 | SID: 002260
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: He has quite a few friends on the Council back in Morrowind and they wanted to ensure his safety while he was here. | ZH: 他在晨风的议会有不少朋友，他们希望确保他在这里安然无恙。 | SID: 002262
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: To protect Councilor Morvayn, of course. | ZH: 当然是为了保护莫尔凡议员。 | SID: 002288

translations.english: Regardless, I hope to return there someday... which doesn't seem likely given my husband's commitment to Councilor Morvayn.
translations.chinese: 无论如何，我希望某天能回到那里……虽然看起来违背了我丈夫向莫尔凡议员作出的承诺。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02023FCF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Regardless, I hope to return there someday... which doesn't seem likely given my husband's commitment to Councilor Morvayn. | ZH: 无论如何，我希望某天能回到那里……虽然看起来违背了我丈夫向莫尔凡议员作出的承诺。 | SID: 000EEE

translations.english: We've fought quite a few battles together, and saved each other's lives on more than one occasion.
translations.chinese: 我们多次一同上战场，互相不止一次救过对方的命。

translations.english: Our bond is our strength. We've always been at each other's side and nothing will ever change that.
translations.chinese: 我们的纽带就是我们的力量，总是在彼此身边，没什么可以把我们拆开。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Our bond is our strength. We've always been at each other's side and nothing will ever change that. | ZH: 我们的纽带就是我们的力量，总是在彼此身边，没什么可以把我们拆开。 | SID: 000DAB

translations.english: Then there's Tel Mithryn to the east. The Telvanni live over there... sort of a strange lot, but since we're both from Morrowind, we get along.
translations.chinese: 然后东边儿是泰尔·米斯瑞恩。泰瓦尼家住那儿……他们有点奇怪，但既然我们都来自晨风，相处得也还行。

translations.english: Other than that, Solstheim is crawling with bandits and Reiklings, but that's to be expected living on the frontier like this.
translations.chinese: 除此之外，索瑟海姆到处都是强盗和瑞克灵，但毕竟是在边疆地区，也可以理解。

translations.english: Well, there's a small enclave of Nords to the north at Skaal Village. They pretty much keep to themselves, and we both like it that way.
translations.chinese: 呃，北面有块很小的诺德飞地叫做斯卡尔村。他们几乎与世隔绝，这也正合我们的意。

translations.english: Hmph. Well, beauty's in the eye of the beholder, I suppose.
translations.chinese: 哼，好吧，我想每个人审美不同。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02023FD3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Hmph. Well, beauty's in the eye of the beholder, I suppose. | ZH: 哼，好吧，我想每个人审美不同。 | SID: 000D79

translations.english: When word arrived in Blacklight that the Councilor's father had passed, I was asked to sail to Raven Rock with him as his second.
translations.chinese: 当议员的父亲过世的消息传到黑光城后，我被邀请作为副手和他一起去鸦石镇。

translations.english: I've known the councilor since we were both quite young. We rose the ranks in House Redoran together.
translations.chinese: 我跟莫尔凡自幼相识，一起在瑞多然家内向上攀升。

translations.english: It meant passing on better opportunities at home, but I didn't want to leave his side.
translations.chinese: 那意味着放弃了家乡更好的机会，但我不想离开他的身边。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I've known the councilor since we were both quite young. We rose the ranks in House Redoran together. | ZH: 我跟莫尔凡自幼相识，一起在瑞多然家内向上攀升。 | SID: 000C84

translations.english: Solstheim is theoretically under my rule, but without revenue from the mine, I lack the resources to actually govern anything but Raven Rock itself.
translations.chinese: 理论上整个索瑟海姆都归我管，但是少了矿场的盈余后，我就没有统治鸦石镇以外地方的资源了。

translations.english: Not that there's much beyond the confines of our town anyway.
translations.chinese: 但其实除了我们的镇子，这儿也没什么了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

translations.english: I haven't seen the city in over fifty years. Even for a Dunmer, that seems like an eternity.
translations.chinese: 我已经五十多年没见过这座城了，即使是丹莫也感觉是一辈子那么久。

translations.english: If you're interested in pursuing the subject, help yourself to any of the historical volumes in my library.
translations.chinese: 如果对这个议题有兴趣，欢迎你来我的图书馆随意阅读历史书卷。

translations.english: I've spent quite a few years honing their skills and I can assure you they're not just your average city guard.
translations.chinese: 我花了好几年来磨练他们的技巧，可以向你保证他们不是什么普通的城市守卫。

translations.english: All of the soldiers in this town are Redoran Guard... some of the best warriors that House Redoran has to offer.
translations.chinese: 瑞多然家的精英战士。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

translations.english: Which is it? Yes or no?
translations.chinese: 到底是啥？有还是没有？

Addon: Dragonborn

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Which is it? Yes or no? | ZH: 到底是啥？有还是没有？ | SID: 000D1F

translations.english: I don't know why, but I'm thinking about a temple, here on the island. Maybe it was just a bad dream.
translations.chinese: 我不晓得原因，但是能想起来一座神殿，就在这岛上。可能就是场噩梦罢了。

translations.english: Is there anything you can tell me?
translations.chinese: 你能告诉我些什么？

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [020240F5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I don't know why, but I'm thinking about a temple, here on the island. Maybe it was just a bad dream. | ZH: 我不晓得原因，但是能想起来一座神殿，就在这岛上。可能就是场噩梦罢了。 | SID: 00113E
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Is there anything you can tell me? | ZH: 你能告诉我些什么？ | SID: 001082

translations.english: You have no idea how good it is to be back here. Thanks for your help, friend.
translations.chinese: 回到这儿的感觉太好了。感谢你的帮助，朋友。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0202410D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You have no idea how good it is to be back here. Thanks for your help, friend. | ZH: 回到这儿的感觉太好了。感谢你的帮助，朋友。 | SID: 000C4C

translations.english: The place still has some of the Riekling stink on it, but that'll wash out in time.
translations.chinese: 这地方还有瑞克灵的臭味呢，但我会马上洗干净。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0202410E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The place still has some of the Riekling stink on it, but that'll wash out in time. | ZH: 这地方还有瑞克灵的臭味呢，但我会马上洗干净。 | SID: 000FEB

translations.english: I definitely missed the forge. I wonder if it missed me.
translations.chinese: 真想念我的锻炉啊，不知道它想不想我。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0202410F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I definitely missed the forge. I wonder if it missed me. | ZH: 真想念我的锻炉啊，不知道它想不想我。 | SID: 000C1A

translations.english: Finally, I can get some sleep at night.
translations.chinese: 晚上终于睡得着了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02024110]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Finally, I can get some sleep at night. | ZH: 晚上终于睡得着了。 | SID: 000F04

translations.english: Keep away from me.
translations.chinese: 离我远点儿。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02024111]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Keep away from me. | ZH: 离我远点儿。 | SID: 000D3E

translations.english: I hate most of the travelers that come through here, but you've shown yourself as one of the better ones.
translations.chinese: 来这儿的大多数旅行者我都讨厌，但你已经证明自己是个好人了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02024112]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I hate most of the travelers that come through here, but you've shown yourself as one of the better ones. | ZH: 来这儿的大多数旅行者我都讨厌，但你已经证明自己是个好人了。 | SID: 000EF7

translations.english: You planning on sticking around for a while? Think about ways to make yourself useful.
translations.chinese: 打算在这儿多呆一会儿吗？先证明自己的价值吧。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02024113]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You planning on sticking around for a while? Think about ways to make yourself useful. | ZH: 打算在这儿多呆一会儿吗？先证明自己的价值吧。 | SID: 000F0A

translations.english: Getting a little antsy...
translations.chinese: 有点烦躁……

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02024114]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Getting a little antsy... | ZH: 有点烦躁…… | SID: 000E27

translations.english: Just warming up for a bit here, before I head out and take some revenge on those Rieklings.
translations.chinese: 还在热身，等我好了就去找那些瑞克灵报仇。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02024115]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Just warming up for a bit here, before I head out and take some revenge on those Rieklings. | ZH: 还在热身，等我好了就去找那些瑞克灵报仇。 | SID: 000FDE

translations.english: Just one more mug of mead, and then I'm off!
translations.chinese: 再来一杯蜜酒，然后就上！

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02024116]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Just one more mug of mead, and then I'm off! | ZH: 再来一杯蜜酒，然后就上！ | SID: 000FDF

translations.english: Once Halbarn's done sharpening my blade, those Rieklings are going to pay...
translations.chinese: 等哈尔巴恩把我的刀磨锋利，那些瑞克灵就得付出代价了……

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02024117]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Once Halbarn's done sharpening my blade, those Rieklings are going to pay... | ZH: 等哈尔巴恩把我的刀磨锋利，那些瑞克灵就得付出代价了…… | SID: 000EEC

translations.english: Make it quick. I won't be here much longer.
translations.chinese: 快说啊，我马上就离开这里了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02024118]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Make it quick. I won't be here much longer. | ZH: 快说啊，我马上就离开这里了。 | SID: 000ED4

translations.english: I was able to salvage most of the latest batch of mead. The rest was... fouled.
translations.chinese: 我抢救出了大部分新酿的蜜酒，剩下的都……脏了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02024119]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I was able to salvage most of the latest batch of mead. The rest was... fouled. | ZH: 我抢救出了大部分新酿的蜜酒，剩下的都……脏了。 | SID: 000E43

translations.english: Thanks for having my back, friend.
translations.chinese: 谢谢你的支持，朋友。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0202411A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Thanks for having my back, friend. | ZH: 谢谢你的支持，朋友。 | SID: 000D05

translations.english: Can't talk too much, I'm afraid.
translations.chinese: 恐怕说不了几句了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0202411B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Can't talk too much, I'm afraid. | ZH: 恐怕说不了几句了。 | SID: 000F02

translations.english: That's right, walk away while I'm still inclined to let you.
translations.chinese: 这就对了，趁我还同意你离开前走吧。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0202455D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: That's right, walk away while I'm still inclined to let you. | ZH: 这就对了，趁我还同意你离开前走吧。 | SID: 000D4D

translations.english: So you know my purpose here, then? I suppose you must have found that dullard of a blacksmith.
translations.chinese: 看来你知道我的目的了，对吧？我猜你找到那个笨铁匠了。

translations.english: Now, give me one good reason that I should not kill you where you stand.
translations.chinese: 现在，给我个理由，说服我不用当场杀了你。

translations.english: Unfortunately for you, my mission here is also a secret. To protect it, I have no choice but to silence you.
translations.chinese: 你运气不好，我这是趟秘密行动。为了保住秘密我别无选择，只能杀你灭口。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Now, give me one good reason that I should not kill you where you stand. | ZH: 现在，给我个理由，说服我不用当场杀了你。 | SID: 000FCF

translations.english: Tell the blacksmith whatever lie you will. We have no further need of him.
translations.chinese: 随便跟那个铁匠撒个谎。我们再也用不着他了。

translations.english: I might not trust you, but I will trust your greed. Very well, take the map.
translations.chinese: 我可能不信任你，但我相信你的贪婪。好吧，把地图拿去吧。

translations.english: Return here with Stalhrim weapons and armor, and I will pay you a fair price for them.
translations.chinese: 带着魔冰武器和盔甲回来，事成必有重赏。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0202455F]

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I might not trust you, but I will trust your greed. Very well, take the map. | ZH: 我可能不信任你，但我相信你的贪婪。好吧，把地图拿去吧。 | SID: 000C30

translations.english: You have made a grave miscalculation, and now you will pay the price!
translations.chinese: 你的算盘打错了，现在付出代价吧！

translations.english: You expect me to just hand you the map, so you can deliver it to the blacksmith and laugh at the foolish Thalmor you so easily outwitted?
translations.chinese: 你要我把地图给你，好让你给那个铁匠？然后你们俩就能嘲笑被你轻松骗到的梭默？

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: You expect me to just hand you the map, so you can deliver it to the blacksmith and laugh at the foolish Thalmor you so easily outwitted? | ZH: 你要我把地图给你，好让你给那个铁匠？然后你们俩就能嘲笑被你轻松骗到的梭默？ | SID: 000EE3

translations.english: And you will sell them to me. I suppose I'll have to give you the map first?
translations.chinese: 然后你会拿来卖给我。看来我该先把地图给你对吧？

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02024561]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: And you will sell them to me. I suppose I'll have to give you the map first? | ZH: 然后你会拿来卖给我。看来我该先把地图给你对吧？ | SID: 000FE9

translations.english: You are interfering with official Thalmor business. You will leave immediately if you value your well-being.
translations.chinese: 你在干涉梭默官方事务。想活命最好马上走开。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02024562]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You are interfering with official Thalmor business. You will leave immediately if you value your well-being. | ZH: 你在干涉梭默官方事务。想活命最好马上走开。 | SID: 000EA7

translations.english: Get out of here, before I lose my patience.
translations.chinese: 给我滚开，别等我不耐烦了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02024563]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Get out of here, before I lose my patience. | ZH: 给我滚开，别等我不耐烦了。 | SID: 000ED0

translations.english: Leave at once! Do not test me, or I promise that you will regret it.
translations.chinese: 立刻离开！别挑战我，不然我保证你会后悔。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02024564]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Leave at once! Do not test me, or I promise that you will regret it. | ZH: 立刻离开！别挑战我，不然我保证你会后悔。 | SID: 000C0F

translations.english: Here to make me an offer, then? Very well, what do you have in mind?
translations.chinese: 来和我做交易的？好啊，你怎么考虑的？

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02024565]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Here to make me an offer, then? Very well, what do you have in mind? | ZH: 来和我做交易的？好啊，你怎么考虑的？ | SID: 000E03

translations.english: Very well, you have convinced me. We will depart the island shortly and seek our weapons elsewhere.
translations.chinese: 好吧，你说服我了。我们很快会离开这座岛，去别的地方找我们的武器。

translations.english: I admit, we are not making the progress I'd hoped. Perhaps you are right, this venture might be more trouble than it's worth.
translations.chinese: 我承认，我们没能达到预期进展。也许你说得对，这趟冒险的麻烦可能比收益大得多。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02024566]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Very well, you have convinced me. We will depart the island shortly and seek our weapons elsewhere. | ZH: 好吧，你说服我了。我们很快会离开这座岛，去别的地方找我们的武器。 | SID: 000CE9
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I admit, we are not making the progress I'd hoped. Perhaps you are right, this venture might be more trouble than it's worth. | ZH: 我承认，我们没能达到预期进展。也许你说得对，这趟冒险的麻烦可能比收益大得多。 | SID: 000E9E

translations.english: You dare to question me? That insult will be your last!
translations.chinese: 你竟敢质疑我？没有下次机会了！

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02024567]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You dare to question me? That insult will be your last! | ZH: 你竟敢质疑我？没有下次机会了！ | SID: 000F87

translations.english: Here, give this map to the blacksmith. I have no further need of it.
translations.chinese: 拿着，把这张地图给那个铁匠。我不需要了。

translations.english: I can see that is no idle threat. Very well, we will depart the island once we have loaded the ship.
translations.chinese: 看得出来你不是在虚张声势。好吧，我们会把货物装上就走。

translations.english: No weapon is worth dying for, not even a weapon forged from Stalhrim.
translations.chinese: 为武器而死可不值得，即使是魔冰铸造的也不划算。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02024568]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: No weapon is worth dying for, not even a weapon forged from Stalhrim. | ZH: 为武器而死可不值得，即使是魔冰铸造的也不划算。 | SID: 000ED3

translations.english: You dare threaten me? For that insolence, I will flay the flesh from your bones!
translations.chinese: 你敢威胁我？这么狂妄我要把你的皮给扒了！

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02024569]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You dare threaten me? For that insolence, I will flay the flesh from your bones! | ZH: 你敢威胁我？这么狂妄我要把你的皮给扒了！ | SID: 000BFF

translations.english: I've been sailing the Northern Maiden across the Sea of Ghosts for nearly twenty years now.
translations.chinese: 我在幽灵之海上开北方少女号快二十年了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0202477D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I've been sailing the Northern Maiden across the Sea of Ghosts for nearly twenty years now. | ZH: 我在幽灵之海上开北方少女号快二十年了。 | SID: 000CAB

translations.english: The Dunmer have been growing food in the ashlands for thousands of years.
translations.chinese: 丹莫已经在灰地耕耘了几千年。

translations.english: And now, with the constant eruptions of the Red Mountain, it's more important than ever.
translations.chinese: 而现在，随着红山的不断喷发，它比以往时期都重要。

translations.english: It was born out of the necessity to survive in the harsh climate of our homeland.
translations.chinese: 我们家园的恶劣气候促成了它的诞生。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0202477E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: The Dunmer have been growing food in the ashlands for thousands of years. | ZH: 丹莫已经在灰地耕耘了几千年。 | SID: 000BDF
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: And now, with the constant eruptions of the Red Mountain, it's more important than ever. | ZH: 而现在，随着红山的不断喷发，它比以往时期都重要。 | SID: 000F3C
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: It was born out of the necessity to survive in the harsh climate of our homeland. | ZH: 我们家园的恶劣气候促成了它的诞生。 | SID: 001005

translations.english: Solsthiem is still rich in ebony ore. I know there's more down there... I can smell it.
translations.chinese: 索瑟海姆的黑檀矿依然很丰富，我知道那下面还有更多……我闻得出来。

translations.english: They just didn't want to spend the coin trying to find it.
translations.chinese: 他们只是不想花钱去找而已。

translations.english: I come from three generations of miners, and I'm telling you that the East Empire Company was wrong.
translations.chinese: 我是矿工家庭第三代人，我可以告诉你，东帝国公司搞错了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

translations.english: There's actually a funny story behind the name, friend.
translations.chinese: 背后其实有个有趣的故事，朋友。

translations.english: He was one of my patrons, and liked to drink heavily, so I wasn't exactly surprised.
translations.chinese: 他是我的常客，酒喝得很凶，所以我并不在意。

translations.english: A few years ago, I was walking down by the docks and I noticed a Dunmer staggering along with a bottle of sujamma in hand.
translations.chinese: 几年前，我沿着码头走路，看到个手拿一瓶苏贾玛的丹莫，走得跌跌撞撞。

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: He was one of my patrons, and liked to drink heavily, so I wasn't exactly surprised. | ZH: 他是我的常客，酒喝得很凶，所以我并不在意。 | SID: 000D23

translations.english: In all honesty, it came down to a disagreement between what I believe and what Elder Othreloth believes.
translations.chinese: 说实话，这归根结底是我和欧斯瑞罗斯长老之间的信仰对立。

translations.english: I'd prefer not to get into the details, but let's just say our opinions about the current status of the Tribunal vary widely.
translations.chinese: 我不想说的太复杂，简单讲就是对于审判席的看法大相径庭。

translations.english: The moment the ebony mine dried up, they pulled up stakes. Ridiculous!
translations.chinese: 当黑檀矿枯竭后，他们跑得比谁都快，太可笑了！

translations.english: Those cowards left decades ago. Every single damned one of them.
translations.chinese: 那些懦夫几十年前就走啦，没一个混蛋留下来。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02024783]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: The moment the ebony mine dried up, they pulled up stakes. Ridiculous! | ZH: 当黑檀矿枯竭后，他们跑得比谁都快，太可笑了！ | SID: 000C98
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Those cowards left decades ago. Every single damned one of them. | ZH: 那些懦夫几十年前就走啦，没一个混蛋留下来。 | SID: 000F82

translations.english: Far from it. In fact, I'm no longer welcome there.
translations.chinese: 远非如此，事实上我已经不被那儿欢迎了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02024784]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Far from it. In fact, I'm no longer welcome there. | ZH: 远非如此，事实上我已经不被那儿欢迎了。 | SID: 001007

translations.english: After he moved on to greener pastures, I decided to pack up, move out here and put those lessons to the test. Been here ever since.
translations.chinese: 他后来找到了更好的发展，我就打包行李，搬到这儿实际应用所学知识，一直到现在。

translations.english: I had a friend over there, a dark elf named Vanryth... a very talented armorsmith.
translations.chinese: 我在那边有个朋友，是个叫凡瑞斯的暗精灵……他是个很有才华的护甲匠人。

translations.english: Spent a lot of time with the guy swapping smithing techniques. Learned a heck of a lot, including how to repair bonemold.
translations.chinese: 我花了很长时间跟他交流锻造技术，学到了很多，包括修补骨模。

translations.english: According to Councilor Morvayn, my husband's been Raven Rock's most important food source for decades.
translations.chinese: 根据莫尔凡议员的说法，我的丈夫是鸦石镇几十年来最重要的粮食供给人。

translations.english: As you can imagine, the eruption of the Red Mountain took an awful toll on Solstheim.
translations.chinese: 你应该想得到，红山喷发对索瑟海姆造成了很严重的破坏。

translations.english: Hunting for game has been scarce, and the waters are apparently too tainted for fishing.
translations.chinese: 打猎获得的猎物变得稀少，水域污染严重，不再适合捕鱼了。

translations.english: I was a Temple priest at the time, and they had me use my healing arts to restore strength to his ailing body.
translations.chinese: 我那时候是神殿祭司，他们让我用治疗法术给他那副弱身子骨恢复体力。

translations.english: It was. After refusing to allow anyone to bring him food, Councilor Morvayn ordered his door to be knocked down before Crescius starved to death.
translations.chinese: 是啊，那会儿他拒绝任何人给他带食物。莫尔凡议员下令撞开他的家门，免得他把自己饿死。

translations.english: I stayed for a while and cared for him, then... I suppose we fell in love.
translations.chinese: 我留下来照顾他，之后……我想我们就爱上彼此了。

translations.english: A fine question, and the one that I hear most often from visitors to our town.
translations.chinese: 好问题，也是镇上访客最常问我的。

translations.english: I wish I had a more romantic tale to tell, but I was simply seeking my fortune and chose Raven Rock to ply my trade.
translations.chinese: 真想有个浪漫故事讲讲，但我只是想找个出路，然后选中了鸦石镇来做生意而已。

translations.english: Besides, knowing how to repair bonemold armor wasn't very useful in Riften.
translations.chinese: 另外，修补骨模的知识在裂谷城没什么用。

translations.english: Oh, Glover Mallory gets me a few things once in a while. He usually has the most amazing deals that I can't pass up.
translations.chinese: 哦，葛洛文·马洛里偶尔会给我一些东西。他的货一般都很棒，我每次都照单全收。

translations.english: Gjalund over at the docks brings me most of my supplies, and the rest comes from bartering with the people in town.
translations.chinese: 我的补给大多是码头那儿的加朗德带来的，其他的是通过和镇民交易来的。

translations.english: When word reached us that a settlement of Dunmer was forming on Solstheim, we were thrilled.
translations.chinese: 当我们听说有个丹莫聚落正在索瑟海姆形成时，感到非常兴奋。

translations.english: It's been difficult, but I'm not regretting it one bit. In fact, I'm glad we've been able to stay and help.
translations.chinese: 这是段苦日子，但是我一点都不后悔。实际上我很高兴能在这儿留下来帮忙。

translations.english: It wasn't long before we became homesick... we were the only Dunmer in Morthal.
translations.chinese: 我们不久后就开始想家了……毕竟整个莫萨尔就只有我们是丹莫。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: It's been difficult, but I'm not regretting it one bit. In fact, I'm glad we've been able to stay and help. | ZH: 这是段苦日子，但是我一点都不后悔。实际上我很高兴能在这儿留下来帮忙。 | SID: 000D28
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: It wasn't long before we became homesick... we were the only Dunmer in Morthal. | ZH: 我们不久后就开始想家了……毕竟整个莫萨尔就只有我们是丹莫。 | SID: 0022DE

translations.english: Instead, he stayed on Solstheim and spent most of his life prospecting for a new ebony source. Sadly, it never surfaced.
translations.chinese: 所以正相反，他留在索瑟海姆，花了半辈子来勘测新的黑檀矿源。可惜他一直没找到。

translations.english: Our home has been in his family for over two hundred years. Leaving would have been like abandoning precious memories.
translations.chinese: 我们住的是他的祖宅，有两百多年了。离开这里等于是抛弃那些珍贵的回忆。

translations.english: A decade ago, this drove him into a deep depression. He shut himself inside his home and refused to come out.
translations.chinese: 十年前，这件事儿让他陷入重度抑郁。他把自己锁在家里不愿出门。

translations.english: The question you should be asking is "what don't I sell here" because I have pretty much any supplies you might need.
translations.chinese: 你这问题该换成“有什么东西是你不卖的”，因为你需要的我这儿几乎都有。

translations.english: If it's not a weapon, potion or armor, then it's likely that I have it.
translations.chinese: 除了武器，药水还有护甲之外，我应该都有。

translations.english: True story, friend. True story.
translations.chinese: 真实的故事哦，朋友。全是真的。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02024793]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: True story, friend. True story. | ZH: 真实的故事哦，朋友。全是真的。 | SID: 000D1C

translations.english: The Dunmer don't believe that death is the end, we believe that it's the beginning.
translations.chinese: 丹莫并不认为死亡即是终结，我们认为那是开始。

translations.english: The Dunmer race doesn't bury their dead, or leave them to rot inside a stone sarcophagus.
translations.chinese: 丹莫并不埋葬死者，也不会让遗体在石棺中腐烂。

translations.english: When a Dunmer passes, his body is given to fire, so he might return to the ash from whence he came.
translations.chinese: 当一个丹莫过世后，尸体会被火化，以回归来处，即灰烬中。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: The Dunmer race doesn't bury their dead, or leave them to rot inside a stone sarcophagus. | ZH: 丹莫并不埋葬死者，也不会让遗体在石棺中腐烂。 | SID: 000E81
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: When a Dunmer passes, his body is given to fire, so he might return to the ash from whence he came. | ZH: 当一个丹莫过世后，尸体会被火化，以回归来处，即灰烬中。 | SID: 000FA7

translations.english: Mark my words... the East Empire Company will return to Raven Rock, and when they do, I'll be at the top of their list.
translations.chinese: 听着，东帝国公司迟早会回鸦石镇，到时候我就飞黄腾达了。

translations.english: Bah, you're just like the rest of the folks around here.
translations.chinese: 啧，你就跟这儿其他人一个样儿。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Mark my words... the East Empire Company will return to Raven Rock, and when they do, I'll be at the top of their list. | ZH: 听着，东帝国公司迟早会回鸦石镇，到时候我就飞黄腾达了。 | SID: 000D6A
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Bah, you're just like the rest of the folks around here. | ZH: 啧，你就跟这儿其他人一个样儿。 | SID: 000EAD

translations.english: But now that they've been destroyed, the light can finally shine upon the House of Reclamations.
translations.chinese: 但是如今他们已经被摧毁了，光明终于在收复者之家重新亮起。

translations.english: Sotha Sil, Almalexia and Vivec represent what was... beings who won the Dunmer people's hearts with their actions, but blinded them just the same.
translations.chinese: 是索萨·希尔、阿玛莱西亚和维威克过去所代表的……他们以行动赢得了丹莫的心，但又以同样的方式蒙蔽了我们。

translations.english: They were aberrations, false prophets. They used their status as heroes to shield the True Tribunal from our minds.
translations.chinese: 他们是异端、虚伪的先知，以自己英雄的身份阻止我们去了解真审判席。

translations.english: I was fascinated by her work, and over a period of a few years she taught me quite a bit.
translations.chinese: 她的工作把我们迷住了，往后的几年里她教了我很多。

translations.english: We wandered around a bit and ended up in Morthal where we took temporary residence with Lami, the town's alchemist.
translations.chinese: 先是到处流浪一阵子，然后暂时住在莫萨尔的炼金术师拉米那儿。

translations.english: After we left Morrowind, we found ourselves in Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 我们离开晨风后，来到了天际。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: After we left Morrowind, we found ourselves in Skyrim. | ZH: 我们离开晨风后，来到了天际。 | SID: 000E4D

translations.english: Finally, it stopped and began to quiver. A few moments later, the foulest liquid to ever assail your nostrils spewed from its maw.
translations.chinese: 最后，气母停下来开始颤抖。过了会儿，它嘴里喷出来了最难闻刺鼻的液体。

translations.english: Well, the bottle broke on the netch, and it must have swallowed its contents because it started floating sort of tilted.
translations.chinese: 嗯，那个酒瓶在气母身上裂开了，它肯定喝了里面的东西，因为它飘起来的时候歪歪扭扭的。

translations.english: I've seen plenty of drunks in my day, and I'll tell you right now that netch was sick.
translations.chinese: 我这辈子见过很多醉鬼，但那气母实在是醉翻天了。

translations.english: The Reclamations are the True Tribunal... the daedra that consecrate the Dunmer people: Azura, Mephala and Boethia.
translations.chinese: 收复者即为真审判席……丹莫百姓所崇拜的迪德拉：阿祖拉、梅法拉和波耶西亚。

translations.english: We call them the True Tribunal because they have reclaimed their place in our hearts from the false Tribunal that came before.
translations.chinese: 我们称真审判席为收复者，是因为他们从伪审判席手中夺回了以往在我们心中的地位。

translations.english: No. Only the Telvanni have the ability to weave living growth from the ash.
translations.chinese: 没有，只有泰瓦尼才有法子从灰烬中种出活的作物。

translations.english: This simply takes the right ingredients, the right tools and a lot of patience.
translations.chinese: 我只需要对的材料，合适的工具和大把耐心就够了。

translations.english: By the time Crescius came of age, the ebony mine in Raven Rock was shut down. He took that quite hard.
translations.chinese: 当克雷修斯成年后，鸦石镇黑檀矿场关了。他受到了很大的打击。

translations.english: Crescius is a third-generation miner... all his life, he's lived and breathed nothing else.
translations.chinese: 克雷修斯出身矿工家庭，他是第三代了……他这一生就知道采矿。

translations.english: To understand how we met one another, you have to appreciate what he's going through.
translations.chinese: 想知道我们怎么相遇的，就得先了解他的过往。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0202479D]
Translations:

translations.english: We lived in a settlement perhaps a league from the border of Black Marsh, the homeland of the Argonians.
translations.chinese: 我们住在距离黑沼泽边境几里外的地方，那边是阿尔贡的家园。

translations.english: Even though the Argonian Invasion ended a long time ago, there are still a few scale-skin clans that live within our borders.
translations.chinese: 尽管阿尔贡入侵很久以前就结束了，但还有一些鳞皮族住在边境附近。

translations.english: To put it simply, they attacked our settlement and slaughtered almost everyone. It was horrible.
translations.chinese: 简单地说，他们袭击了我们的聚落，几乎没留下任何活口，太恐怖了。

translations.english: You know, the lady who runs the East Empire Company Warehouse in Solitude... the biggest warehouse they have in Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 你认识她吗，那个独孤城东帝国公司仓库的管理人，那是他们在天际最大的仓库。

translations.english: Oh, absolutely. In fact, I've corresponded with Vittoria Vici herself more than once.
translations.chinese: 当然有了。实际上我还和维多利亚·薇齐通过信呢，不止一次。

translations.english: Ah, but you see this particular Dunmer was as naked as the day he was born and singing badly at the top of his lungs.
translations.chinese: 啊，但你要知道那丹莫跟刚出生一样啥都没穿，扯着嗓子唱得难听的要死。

translations.english: The man looks straight up at the netch... yells "have a drink" and tosses the bottle... and it never hit the ground.
translations.chinese: 他就直直地盯着气母看，吼了句“干一杯！”接着把瓶子甩出去了……瓶子甚至没掉在地上。

translations.english: As I'm watching this spectacle, a netch floats over the Bulwark towards him.
translations.chinese: 我看这个奇景的时候，刚好一只气母飘过防护堤到他旁边儿。

translations.english: Not at all. I used to fish the waters around Solstheim. Made a damn fine living at it, too.
translations.chinese: 不是，我以前在索瑟海姆附近捕鱼，过得也还挺快活。

translations.english: But over the years, the ash from Red Mountain poisoned the sea up there and the fishing became difficult.
translations.chinese: 但是过了几年，红山的火山灰污染了那里的水域，很难捕到鱼了。

translations.english: If it weren't for my supply runs to Raven Rock, I'd have likely sold my ship by now and moved back to Riften.
translations.chinese: 要不是现在还能给鸦石镇运物资，我可能早就把船卖掉回裂谷城去了。

translations.english: I've half a mind to contact my friends at the East Empire Company and see if they need an extra hand in Windhelm.
translations.chinese: 我已经想联系我在东帝国公司的朋友，没准儿他们在风舵城需要帮手。

translations.english: Those foul vermin... the abominations we call ash spawn have risen from the ashes of our own ancestors.
translations.chinese: 因为那些肮脏的寄生虫……被我们称为灰烬怪的可憎之物会从祖先的骨灰中重生。

translations.english: They're befouling the memories of our forefathers by defiling their remains.
translations.chinese: 它们亵渎了我们祖辈的遗骸，玷污了对他们的回忆。

translations.chinese: 对啊，我能自豪地说这是我亲手种出来或者收割的。

translations.chinese: 它们是我们埋葬逝者的地方。是神圣的，供我们缅怀他们的离去。

translations.english: Sadly, we've been unable to use the Ancestral Tomb beneath the Temple as of late, and have resorted to other locations to scatter the remains.
translations.chinese: 遗憾的是，我们最近没法用神殿底下的祖坟，只能在其他地方洒下他们的骨灰。

translations.chinese: 你能喝到最上等的苏贾玛，朋友。是由我的独家秘方调制成的，我称它为“萨德利的苏贾玛”。

translations.english: In fact, I've just added some new ingredients to the mixture that I think makes it taste better than ever.
translations.chinese: 实际上，我刚才加了些新的配料进去，觉得比以往的更很好喝了。

translations.english: Despise the stuff myself. It's powerful and tremendously addicting... I've seen men fail to finish even a single flask.
translations.chinese: 但我不喜欢。它劲儿大而且很容易上瘾……我见过有人甚至一瓶都喝不了。

translations.english: If I knew where they were stashing the bottles, I'd put an end to it myself.
translations.chinese: 要是知道他们把酒藏在哪儿，我就自己去解决了。

translations.english: Absolutely. Here's your payment.
translations.chinese: 当然。这是你的酬劳。

Translations:

translations.english: Tell her she'll welcome back anytime.
translations.chinese: 告诉她随时可以回来。

translations.english: I suppose you're right. If she wants to spend her life at the bottom of an ale mug, it's her right.
translations.chinese: 你说得对。要是她乐意饮酒度日，那也是她的自由。

translations.chinese: 那么，我想去做最擅长的事情了。

translations.english: Here. This was something I carried around in happier times. Maybe you can find a use for it.
translations.chinese: 拿着。这是我以前那段快乐时光里带着的。也许你用得上。

translations.english: Here's your coin. Keep bringing me more, and I'll keep paying you for them.
translations.chinese: 这是你的钱。再拿更多些来，我都会付钱的。

translations.english: I'll sell you some of mine. (Give East Empire Pendants)

translations.english: They could be anywhere on the island. The mines might be a good place to start.

translations.english: As much as I love making coin, I can't watch her do that anymore. I won't.
translations.chinese: 就算我喜欢挣钱，也实在看不下去了。我办不到。

translations.english: She used to be richer than Councilor Morvayn and she's spending it all drowning her sorrow.
translations.chinese: 以前她比莫尔凡议员还有钱，但她却全花在借酒浇愁上了。

translations.english: Have you seen the poor girl? She's a mess.
translations.chinese: 你见过那个可怜的女孩吗？她简直是糟透了。

translations.chinese: 那是专为东帝国公司制作的护符。

translations.english: They gave them to their workers as an incentive at one point... a kind of reward for extra effort.
translations.chinese: 以前是当做奖励机制发给工人的……用来鼓励额外工作。

translations.english: They're no longer being made, so they've become collectible. I'd love to get my hands on a few of them.
translations.chinese: 现在已经绝版了，所以就成了收藏品。我很想弄到一些。

translations.chinese: 相信我，比她麻烦的人我见多了，她还不至于走到这个地步。

translations.english: She could be someone again if she was given the chance.
translations.chinese: 如果给她机会，还是能重新做人的。

translations.chinese: 采矿工具？没有。以前我倒是有卖东帝国公司的吊坠，直到卖光。那小玩意儿销路很好。

translations.english: You can try...

translations.chinese: 告诉布拉尔萨她随时可以回来。

translations.english: Well, there's morals, and then there's money. In this case, money wins.
translations.chinese: 嗯，一边是道德，一边是钱财。这次是钱财胜出了。

translations.chinese: 我要是想把钱花来买醉，那也是我的选择。关他什么事啊？

translations.english: That fetcher Geldis won't even allow me inside. Said I was bad for business.
translations.chinese: 那个费彻吉迪斯甚至不让我进门了。说我影响了他做生意。

translations.english: If Bralsa wants to come back, she's welcome here... I swear.
translations.chinese: 要是布拉尔萨想回来，这儿是欢迎的……我发誓。

translations.chinese: 我可不怕你。这里就是不欢迎她，就这样。

translations.english: I used to be a miner, a good one too. I made more gold digging up ore in a month than some people earn in a lifetime.
translations.chinese: 我从前是个矿工，很能干的那种。我挖一个月矿挣的钱比有些人一辈子挣得还多。

translations.english: Doesn't everyone pity the hopeless? Look at me... I'm no better than a beggar.
translations.chinese: 大家不都同情无望之人吗？你看我……跟乞丐没什么两样了。

translations.english: When the mine dried up, I was lost. I have no other trade, so I spend my time drinking my fortune away at the Retching Netch... or I used to anyway.
translations.chinese: 但是当矿脉枯竭后，我就迷失了。我没别的门路，就把时光消磨在呕吐气母，把财富喝得一干二净……反正以前就那样。

translations.english: It seems the ancient Dwemer discovered this book and took it to study.
translations.chinese: 看来古代锻莫找到了这本书，然后仔细研读。

translations.english: But perhaps the two of us together will be able to get at the book.
translations.chinese: 要是我们合作或许就能拿到那本书。

translations.english: I found their "reading room" in the ruins of Nchardak. The book is there, but it's sealed in a protective case which I wasn't able to open.
translations.chinese: 我找到了他们在尼查达克的“阅读室”书就在那里，但是被锁在一个我打不开的保护装置里。

translations.english: To Nchardak, then. Follow me.
translations.chinese: 那么，去尼查达克吧。跟我来。

translations.chinese: 我们需要足够的控制方典来让水泵运作，以启动四个锅炉。

translations.chinese: 你为什么对艾穆斯那么严厉？

translations.chinese: 不。比起我们的需要，是你自己更应该去打猎。

translations.english: Even dragons submit to Miraak's Voice. Without that power, you cannot face him. So say I, Hermaeus Mora, master of the tides of Fate.
translations.chinese: 就连龙也会屈服于米拉克的吼声。没有那种力量，你是无法面对他的。这是我，赫麦尤斯·莫拉，命运潮汐之主的裁定。

translations.chinese: 这是他的笔迹，毫无疑问。

translations.english: If you happen to cross his path, be wary. He was a fierce warrior as a man. If he fell prey to his more bestial side, he could be deadly.
translations.chinese: 你要是遇见他了，要小心。他还是人的时候就已经是个强悍的战士了，如果被自己的野性一面所控制，那就更加危险了。

translations.english: He set off from here so long ago, it's hard to say. Could be in Hammerfell for all I know.
translations.chinese: 他很早以前就离开了，很难说得清。在落锤都有可能。

translations.english: They would hunt, they would fight, and the mightiest among them would rise up as leader.
translations.chinese: 他们会打猎，战斗，其中最强之人会担任首领。

translations.english: But those days are behind us, now.
translations.chinese: 但是那些日子离我们很遥远了。

translations.english: A long time ago, a man named Hrothmund left the Skaal to form his own tradition.
translations.chinese: 很久以前，一个叫哈洛斯蒙德的人离开了斯卡尔村，开创了自己的传统。

translations.english: Warriors in the wild, living like the Nords of old.
translations.chinese: 以古代诺德人的方式，成为在野外求生的战士。

translations.english: Twisted beasts, a curse of Hircine. True bears are noble and great creatures of the wild.
translations.chinese: 一种被扭曲的野兽，是海尔辛的诅咒。真正的熊是大自然高贵而强大的生物。

translations.english: But the daedra have no skill for creation, so they befile the All-Maker's workings.
translations.chinese: 但是迪德拉可没有创造之力，他们只能改造造物主的作品。

translations.english: I've heard tell of men who, by curse or by heart's desire, become transformed into one of those vile things.
translations.chinese: 我听说有些被诅咒，或是自愿的人就会变成那种邪恶的东西。

translations.english: It is a pitiable fate. And one that I fear has fallen to my brother.
translations.chinese: 多可悲的命运，恐怕我兄弟也是其中一员了。

agentText:

Translations:

translations.english: Thank you for setting my mind to rest. Now I can hope the All-Maker will show mercy to him in the beyond.
translations.chinese: 感谢你让我的心灵回归平静。现在我希望造物主在他往生的日子里赐予他仁爱。

translations.english: Let me impart some of the wisdom of the Skaal to you. You've done me a service; I will do you one in kind.
translations.chinese: 让我传授些斯卡尔人的智慧给你。你帮了我的大忙，我必须报答你。

translations.english: One at a time, they're pests, but with this many...
translations.chinese: 一次一只还好对付，但数量太多了就……

translations.english: And so here we are, out of our home.
translations.chinese: 然后我们就来这儿了，被赶出了家门。

translations.english: Those filthy vermin... they came in numbers. Waves of the things.
translations.chinese: 那些肮脏的害虫……他们数量太多了，成群结队的来。

translations.english: Rieklings.
translations.chinese: 瑞克灵。

translations.english: I didn't take you for a coward. But until we know the limits of our courage, we don't really know ourselves.
translations.chinese: 没想到你是个懦夫。但只有知晓了勇气的极限在哪儿，才算是真正的了解自己。

translations.english: I know that name... I found this near an old shrine. (Give journal.)
translations.chinese: 我知道这个名字……这是在某个古老祭坛附近发现的。（交出日志）

translations.english: In my darkest times, I fear he fell in among the werebears of the glacier.
translations.chinese: 在我最不幸的时候，我怕他加入了冰川熊人的行列。

translations.english: He had a wild gleam in his eye, more than most.
translations.chinese: 他眼睛里闪烁着狂野的光芒，比大多数人都强烈。

translations.english: I wish I could tell you.
translations.chinese: 我自己也想知道。

translations.chinese: 但我们过于沉浸在甜蜜的生活当中了，变得软弱了，还有……

translations.english: We used to be proud warriors of Thirsk Mead Hall. There, up on the hill.
translations.chinese: 我们曾是瑟斯科蜜酒大厅的骄傲战士。那儿，就在山上。

translations.english: Well, the truth is my brother really died long ago.
translations.chinese: 嗯，其实我兄弟很久以前就死了。

agentText:

translations.english: In days past, my brother Torkild and I would share the hunt, but that was... long ago.
translations.chinese: 从以前我兄弟托基尔德跟我一起打猎的时候开始，但那是……很久以前了。

translations.english: Good.
translations.chinese: 很好。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02026555]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Good. | ZH: 很好。 | SID: 001946

translations.english: Down here to catch our breath, and then we'll be back in the hall once I get the rest of these up to move.
translations.chinese: 我们在这下面喘口气，等其他人爬得起来，我们就会打回大厅去。

translations.english: I wouldn't call it that. We've just got a bit of an infestation, is all.
translations.chinese: 倒不是这个意思。我们只是遇到了一些麻烦，仅此而已。

translations.english: I hope you gave him a swift end.
translations.chinese: 希望你让他走得痛快。

translations.english: I... I understand. That's not an existence I would wish on anyone.
translations.chinese: 我……我明白了。我不希望有人这样活着。

translations.english: It's a lot of nonsense to me, but they seem to get by.
translations.chinese: 听起来都是胡说八道，但是他们似乎过得还不错。

translations.english: The Skaal is a group of Nords who live up to the north of here. They're always talking about their connection to the natural world.
translations.chinese: 斯卡尔人是一群住在北边的诺德人。他们总是谈论着自己和自然世界的纽带。

translations.chinese: 你在哪里找到的？

translations.english: It looks like I was right. He was taken in by that...
translations.chinese: 看来我猜对了，他被那东西给……

translations.chinese: 这是杀了斯托恩的那本臭书。把它带走，扔到海里去吧。太邪恶了。

translations.chinese: 很好。虽然我觉得他不会帮你。那些知识对我们来说无比神圣。

translations.chinese: 只有斯托恩才能解开你所求的秘密。

translations.english: You will not convince me to betray Storn's trust. Talk to him. He will decide the matter.
translations.chinese: 别想说服我背叛斯托恩的信任。自己跟他谈，由他来决定。

translations.chinese: 从这些文字来看，卡里乌斯将军还认为那座堡垒跟200年前一样活跃。

translations.chinese: 太遗憾了。这里流传着有卡里乌斯将军的很多功绩，包括鸦石镇的建立。

translations.english: These statues are clearly the focus of this area. There must be some way to interact with them.
translations.chinese: 这些石柱显然是这个区域的重点，一定有办法和它们互动。

translations.english: I'd wager that the statues are the key to opening the chamber beyond.
translations.chinese: 我敢赌这些石柱是打开下个房间的关键。

translations.english: Interesting that these statues are different. If they represent archery, magic and swordsmanship, then what does that tell us?
translations.chinese: 这些石柱互不相同，有意思。要是它们各自代表箭术、魔法和剑术，那么其中的含义是什么？

translations.english: No doubt there's some connection between these pressure plates and opening the next chamber.
translations.chinese: 毫无疑问，这些压力板和打开下个房间有关。

translations.english: Don't worry, most people can't tell we're related.
translations.chinese: 别担心，大部分人看不出我和她有血缘关系。

translations.english: But... she's always trying to be the one in charge, and feeling terrible when something goes wrong.
translations.chinese: 但是……她总是想成为领导者，要是事情出了问题心情就很差。

translations.english: All my life. She's my big sister.
translations.chinese: 一辈子了。他是我姐姐。

translations.english: Kuvar. He thinks we've all gotten a little too soft. I can see what he means looking at Elmus, but the rest of us still have our edge.
translations.chinese: 库瓦尔。他认为我们过得太安逸了。在艾穆斯身上确实能看出来这点，但我们其他人还是有底线的。

translations.english: And... don't tell Elmus I said that.
translations.chinese: 然后……别跟艾穆斯说我这么说他。

translations.english: At least, I think so.
translations.chinese: 至少我是这么想的。

translations.english: She's always been quick to shame.
translations.chinese: 她在丢脸这方面很敏感。

translations.english: You don't know the half of it.
translations.chinese: 你还不知道事情原委。

translations.english: Bujold's just embarrassed, I think. Doesn't help that her husband is one of the loudest complainers.
translations.chinese: 布约德的丈夫抱怨的很大声，我想她很尴尬吧。

translations.english: Longer than I would have liked.
translations.chinese: 比我想的要长。

agentText:

EDID: [02026C6E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Longer than I would have liked. | ZH: 比我想的要长。 | SID: 001AC6

translations.english: Rieklings. You must have passed by the hall on your way down here? Well, it's been overrun.
translations.chinese: 瑞克灵。你下来之前经过了一栋建筑吧？那儿的害虫泛滥了。

translations.english: We're just out here temporarily, to regroup.
translations.chinese: 我们只是暂时在这儿重整旗鼓。

agentText:

translations.english: I wouldn't be at Thirsk if I wasn't.
translations.chinese: 我要不是就不会待在瑟斯科了。

translations.english: It drives Kuvar mad, but someone has to do it or the place would be a little... cold.
translations.chinese: 这让库瓦尔很生气，但总得有人做这些，不然这地方就太……冰冷了。

translations.english: These days I focus a little more on the creature comforts of the hall, though. The food, the drink, the stories.
translations.chinese: 但是这些天里，我专注于安抚大伙儿的情绪。准备食物，饮料还有故事。

translations.english: I make it. I drink it. I share it with friends. Ha!
translations.chinese: 我酿。我喝。我分享。哈！

translations.english: But those gold-grubbers at the East Empire Company started charging more than their share for bringing it over.
translations.chinese: 但是后来那些东帝国公司的强盗们开始漫天要价。

translations.english: We still buy what we have to, but I make as much as I can.
translations.chinese: 我们仍会买些必需品，但酒我尽量自己酿。

translations.english: Thirsk didn't always make its own mead. No, we used to get by on shipments from Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 瑟斯科本来没有酿蜜酒。以前我们都是靠着天际来的物资过活的。

translations.english: But because I'd rather drink a mug of mead at night instead of training until I drop, Kuvar calls me a layabout.
translations.chinese: 但是就因为我晚上喝几杯小酒，而不是训练到抽筋，库瓦尔就叫我窝囊废。

translations.english: That depends on who you ask.
translations.chinese: 看你问谁了。

translations.english: Wish he would just lighten up.
translations.chinese: 希望他还是放松点。

translations.english: I fight. I protect the hall. I bring in meat. And I think I could take on most of the tree lovers up in the Skaal Village.
translations.chinese: 我会战斗、守护大厅还有打猎。而且我觉得斯卡尔那群自然守护者里没几个是我对手。

translations.english: Master Neloth grew one here to be his home. Don't ask me how.
translations.chinese: 内洛斯大师在这儿种了一棵自己的家。别问我怎么做到的。

translations.english: In Morrowind, the Telvanni grow buildings from special fungus spores.
translations.chinese: 在晨风，泰瓦尼家会用特殊真菌孢子种植建筑。

translations.english: Let's continue exploring, then.
translations.chinese: 那么，我们继续探索吧。

agentText:

translations.chinese: 很好，接着走吧。

translations.chinese: 我就在你身后。

translations.english: This place was a remarkable find!
translations.chinese: 这地方真是个大发现啊！

agentText:

Translations:

translations.english: This is most exciting, wouldn't you agree?
translations.chinese: 这真令人兴奋，你不觉得吗？

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: This is most exciting, wouldn't you agree? | ZH: 这真令人兴奋，你不觉得吗？ | SID: 001852

translations.english: Let's be extra careful.
translations.chinese: 我们要特别小心。

translations.english: Who knows what dangers await us in this place.
translations.chinese: 谁知道这里有什么危险等着我们呢。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02027104]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Who knows what dangers await us in this place. | ZH: 谁知道这里有什么危险等着我们呢。 | SID: 0014C0

translations.english: At times like this, history truly comes alive for me.
translations.chinese: 在这种时候，历史变得鲜活了起来。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02027105]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: At times like this, history truly comes alive for me. | ZH: 在这种时候，历史变得鲜活了起来。 | SID: 001AB6

translations.english: Walking in these chambers is like walking in the past.
translations.chinese: 走过这些墓室就像是走过历史。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02027106]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Walking in these chambers is like walking in the past. | ZH: 走过这些墓室就像是走过历史。 | SID: 001AB4

translations.english: There are other stones around Solstheim. I fear for what has happened to them...
translations.chinese: 索瑟海姆上还有其它的圣石。我担心它们也遭遇不测了……

translations.english: It is an ancient stone of power, a connection to the All-Maker.
translations.chinese: 一种古代的力量之石，它连结着造物主。

translations.english: It represents one of the aspects of nature, a part of the All-Maker's creation.
translations.chinese: 它代表着自然的一个方面，造物主创造的一部分。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: It is an ancient stone of power, a connection to the All-Maker. | ZH: 一种古代的力量之石，它连结着造物主。 | SID: 001AB0

translations.english: There are few of us left unaffected by this curse.
translations.chinese: 我们中只有几人没有受这诅咒的影响。

translations.english: My father Storn, the shaman, protects them in the village.
translations.chinese: 我的父亲斯托恩，作为萨满，负责在村里保护他们。

translations.english: If I cannot find a way to save them, there is no hope for our people.
translations.chinese: 要是我找不到救他们的办法，族人们就没希望了。

translations.english: I fashioned an amulet to guard me against whatever has taken hold of the Skaal, but it is the only one of its kind.
translations.chinese: 我制作了这个护符来保护我不像其他斯卡尔人那样被控制，但这也仅有一个。

translations.english: I do my best to counsel my people, but I cannot allay their fears.
translations.chinese: 我尽我所能去开导族人们，但无法减轻他们的恐惧。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [020271D7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I do my best to counsel my people, but I cannot allay their fears. | ZH: 我尽我所能去开导族人们，但无法减轻他们的恐惧。 | SID: 00168F

translations.english: So the dragons have returned. Well, the Skaal have survived worse.
translations.chinese: 看来龙族是回归了。嗯，不过斯卡尔还遭过更大的难，不过都挺过来了。

agentText:

translations.english: We must look to the All-Maker for guidance in these dark times.
translations.chinese: 在这段黑暗时期里，我们必须依循造物主的指引。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [020271D9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We must look to the All-Maker for guidance in these dark times. | ZH: 在这段黑暗时期里，我们必须依循造物主的指引。 | SID: 001674

translations.english: The Skaal will one day look to Frea. I hope she will be there for them.
translations.chinese: 斯卡尔人会有把目光投向芙瑞雅的那天。希望她那时能担起责任。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [020271DA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The Skaal will one day look to Frea. I hope she will be there for them. | ZH: 斯卡尔人会有把目光投向芙瑞雅的那天。希望她那时能担起责任。 | SID: 00162A

translations.english: It's no secret to me that Frea hesitates. Her path is not clear.
translations.chinese: 芙瑞雅会犹豫在我意料之中。她的未来还不明朗。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [020271DB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It's no secret to me that Frea hesitates. Her path is not clear. | ZH: 芙瑞雅会犹豫在我意料之中。她的未来还不明朗。 | SID: 0014C4

translations.english: The elders talk of great cities much bigger than our village, but why would anyone need so many buildings?
translations.chinese: 大人们在聊那些比我们村子大得多的城市，但是谁需要那么多建筑呢？

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The elders talk of great cities much bigger than our village, but why would anyone need so many buildings? | ZH: 大人们在聊那些比我们村子大得多的城市，但是谁需要那么多建筑呢？ | SID: 001B86

translations.english: Words reached us that the dragons have returned. I wonder if we'll see them on Solstheim?
translations.chinese: 听说龙族回归了，不晓得我们在索瑟海姆看不看得到。

translations.english: With the mines shut down, there's no telling how much longer Raven Rock's going to last. Hopefully, Councilor Morvayn has a plan.
translations.chinese: 矿场关闭后，不知道鸦石镇还能撑多久。希望莫尔凡议员有个计划。

translations.english: Nothing specific, but I'm hearing rumblings of assassins living among us. I think they intend to target Councilor Morvayn, but I can't be certain.
translations.chinese: 虽然没什么根据，但我感觉到我们中有刺客。他们的目标可能是莫尔凡议员，但我不确定。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

translations.chinese: 情况不妙。我们才刚进去几步就把尸鬼弄醒了。

translations.english: This is what I get for skimping on labor.
translations.chinese: 这就是我节省劳力费用的下场。

translations.english: You think I've got that kind of money? No, I only get paid on delivery. Can't afford to go out of pocket for a thousand septims on this.
translations.chinese: 你觉得我很有钱吗？错了，我是一手交钱一手交货的。没法一次性拿出一千塞普汀来。

translations.english: Why not hire some of the miners out of Raven Rock?
translations.chinese: 为什么不去鸦石镇雇佣矿工？

translations.english: His best work was buried with him, though. A set that my patron calls "the Relics" are supposed to be down in his tomb.
translations.chinese: 但是他的杰作随他一起下葬了。听我的赞助人说，他的墓穴里有一套“圣物”。

translations.english: You ever hear of Ahzidal?
translations.chinese: 你听说过阿兹达尔吗？

translations.english: He was the first great Nord enchanter, maybe even the first human to master elven methods.
translations.chinese: 他是第一个诺德大附魔师，甚至可能是第一个掌握精灵之术的人类。

translations.english: Now, they're old, and they're powerful. A combination like that makes them pretty valuable to certain people, and I happen to know certain people.
translations.chinese: 现在来看都是些古物，而且力量强大。那种系列组合让它们在特定人士眼中价值连城，而我刚好认识某些人士。

translations.english: So what's this treasure you were after?
translations.chinese: 你在找什么财宝？

translations.chinese: 啊。别再提那地方了。整个过程都是一场灾难。

translations.english: You're Ralis? I found your camp outside Kolbjorn Barrow.
translations.chinese: 你是拉里斯？我在寇泊琼古坟旁边看到了你的营地。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02027585]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Bah. Don't even mention that place to me. This whole trip has been a disaster. | ZH: 啊。别再提那地方了。整个过程都是一场灾难。 | SID: 0019F1
- INFO:RNAM | EN: You're Ralis? I found your camp outside Kolbjorn Barrow. | ZH: 你是拉里斯？我在寇泊琼古坟旁边看到了你的营地。 | SID: 0019A3

translations.english: They've only gotten louder since I've stayed. Pounding, driving. A couple of times I blacked out. It was...
translations.chinese: 我呆在这儿后声音变得更大了。它们猛烈敲打着我的耳膜，有好几次我都晕过去了。那是……

translations.english: I... I don't remember. Ever since I got here... to Kolbjorn... I've heard whispers. Voices. Thoughts. Imaginings.
translations.chinese: 我……我不记得了。自从我来了寇泊琼……就一直能听到那些低语，冒出那些想法，还见到那些幻象。

translations.english: It was just before the draugr woke up.
translations.chinese: 就是在尸鬼苏醒之前。

translations.english: What's going on here?
translations.chinese: 这里怎么了？

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02027586]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: They've only gotten louder since I've stayed. Pounding, driving. A couple of times I blacked out. It was... | ZH: 我呆在这儿后声音变得更大了。它们猛烈敲打着我的耳膜，有好几次我都晕过去了。那是…… | SID: 0014A9
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I... I don't remember. Ever since I got here... to Kolbjorn... I've heard whispers. Voices. Thoughts. Imaginings. | ZH: 我……我不记得了。自从我来了寇泊琼……就一直能听到那些低语，冒出那些想法，还见到那些幻象。 | SID: 001A75
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: It was just before the draugr woke up. | ZH: 就是在尸鬼苏醒之前。 | SID: 0022E9
- INFO:RNAM | EN: What's going on here? | ZH: 这里怎么了？ | SID: 001A72

translations.english: Sorry, I've just had a lot of hork-faced cowards coming by to mock my efforts.
translations.chinese: 抱歉，之前实在有太多的胆小鬼来嘲笑我的努力了。

translations.english: With me? What's the matter with you?
translations.chinese: 我？你才犯什么病了？

translations.english: What's the matter with you?
translations.chinese: 你犯什么病了？

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02027587]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Sorry, I've just had a lot of hork-faced cowards coming by to mock my efforts. | ZH: 抱歉，之前实在有太多的胆小鬼来嘲笑我的努力了。 | SID: 0022F2
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: With me? What's the matter with you? | ZH: 我？你才犯什么病了？ | SID: 00230F
- INFO:RNAM | EN: What's the matter with you? | ZH: 你犯什么病了？ | SID: 0019F3

translations.english: Who told you that? Was it Geldis? I told that idiot not to send me any more...
translations.chinese: 谁跟你说的？吉迪斯？我都告诉那白痴不要再派来更多的……

translations.english: I heard you were starting an expedition?
translations.chinese: 听说你在组织一个探险队？

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02027588]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Who told you that? Was it Geldis? I told that idiot not to send me any more... | ZH: 谁跟你说的？吉迪斯？我都告诉那白痴不要再派来更多的…… | SID: 00231E
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I heard you were starting an expedition? | ZH: 听说你在组织一个探险队？ | SID: 0019F0

translations.english: Well, don't just stand there! Go deal with the Draugr while I try to hold the survivors together.
translations.chinese: 喂，别光站在那儿啊！去搞定那些尸鬼，我去把幸存者召集起来。

translations.english: I'm still working on it.
translations.chinese: 我还没搞完呢。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02027589]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Well, don't just stand there! Go deal with the Draugr while I try to hold the survivors together. | ZH: 喂，别光站在那儿啊！去搞定那些尸鬼，我去把幸存者召集起来。 | SID: 001DBE
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I'm still working on it. | ZH: 我还没搞完呢。 | SID: 0017D8

translations.english: I think we're almost to the bottom of the Barrow, but... it's going to be everything I can do to find more miners.
translations.chinese: 我们就快挖到古坟底部了，但……我得找到更多的矿工才能接着挖下去。

translations.english: We've... developed quite the reputation. But for enough gold... I can do it. Just barely.
translations.chinese: 我们已经……声名狼藉了。但要是给够钱……我还是能勉强招够人。

translations.english: Good. I'm glad I can count on you, at least.
translations.chinese: 很好。很高兴至少你还靠得住。

translations.english: All the Draugr are dead.
translations.chinese: 所有尸鬼都死了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0202758A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I think we're almost to the bottom of the Barrow, but... it's going to be everything I can do to find more miners. | ZH: 我们就快挖到古坟底部了，但……我得找到更多的矿工才能接着挖下去。 | SID: 001519
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: We've... developed quite the reputation. But for enough gold... I can do it. Just barely. | ZH: 我们已经……声名狼藉了。但要是给够钱……我还是能勉强招够人。 | SID: 001A64
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Good. I'm glad I can count on you, at least. | ZH: 很好。很高兴至少你还靠得住。 | SID: 001A65
- INFO:RNAM | EN: All the Draugr are dead. | ZH: 所有尸鬼都死了。 | SID: 00156E

translations.english: Look, this can be a slow business. Digging takes time. Come around later, and I'll have something more interesting to show.
translations.chinese: 听着，这桩生意可能进展缓慢，挖掘需要时间。你之后再来，可能我就有些更有趣的玩意儿给你看看。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0202758C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Look, this can be a slow business. Digging takes time. Come around later, and I'll have something more interesting to show. | ZH: 听着，这桩生意可能进展缓慢，挖掘需要时间。你之后再来，可能我就有些更有趣的玩意儿给你看看。 | SID: 001459

translations.english: We've got a crew on it. They're not sharp, but they're working hard. Come back soon and see how they're doing.
translations.chinese: 我们有一队人马在忙活了。他们不太聪明，但是工作认真。过段时间再来看看他们的进度吧。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0202758D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We've got a crew on it. They're not sharp, but they're working hard. Come back soon and see how they're doing. | ZH: 我们有一队人马在忙活了。他们不太聪明，但是工作认真。过段时间再来看看他们的进度吧。 | SID: 001A80

translations.english: Aww, don't start holding out on me now. We're so close.
translations.chinese: 唉啊，别那么小气嘛。我们就要成功了。

translations.english: No, no I don't.
translations.chinese: 不，我没钱了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0202758E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Aww, don't start holding out on me now. We're so close. | ZH: 唉啊，别那么小气嘛。我们就要成功了。 | SID: 001A71
- INFO:RNAM | EN: No, no I don't. | ZH: 不，我没钱了。 | SID: 001A6F

translations.english: Well?
translations.chinese: 怎么了？

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0202758F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Well? | ZH: 怎么了？ | SID: 001A62

translations.english: Then why are you still talking to me?
translations.chinese: 那你怎么还在和我闲扯？

translations.english: No, not yet.
translations.chinese: 不，还没有。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02027590]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Then why are you still talking to me? | ZH: 那你怎么还在和我闲扯？ | SID: 001A54
- INFO:RNAM | EN: No, not yet. | ZH: 不，还没有。 | SID: 001A53

translations.english: That's good. But until we can account for all the miners, I won't be able to recruit more. Keep searching. It should be safe now.
translations.chinese: 很好。不过我们得先清点完所有矿工，才能招募更多人手。你继续找吧，里面应该安全了。

translations.english: I've dealt with the Draugr.
translations.chinese: 我把尸鬼都解决了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02027591]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: That's good. But until we can account for all the miners, I won't be able to recruit more. Keep searching. It should be safe now. | ZH: 很好。不过我们得先清点完所有矿工，才能招募更多人手。你继续找吧，里面应该安全了。 | SID: 001CEB
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I've dealt with the Draugr. | ZH: 我把尸鬼都解决了。 | SID: 001A4F

translations.english: That's a shame. I'll make sure to let their families know. In the meantime, finish off those draugr so it'll be safe when I bring in a fresh crew.
translations.chinese: 真是遗憾。我会通知他们的家属。同时你去干掉那些尸鬼，确保我带新队伍进去是安全的。

translations.english: I found the missing miners. Both dead.
translations.chinese: 我找到那俩失踪的矿工了，都死了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02027592]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: That's a shame. I'll make sure to let their families know. In the meantime, finish off those draugr so it'll be safe when I bring in a fresh crew. | ZH: 真是遗憾。我会通知他们的家属。同时你去干掉那些尸鬼，确保我带新队伍进去是安全的。 | SID: 001B7F
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I found the missing miners. Both dead. | ZH: 我找到那俩失踪的矿工了，都死了。 | SID: 00172D

translations.english: It's going to hit three thousand this time, I'm afraid. Have you got that on you?
translations.chinese: 这回恐怕得花三千金币。你身上带够钱了吗？

translations.english: I'm going to hire some mercenaries this time, too. Having some people around who know how to fight should...
translations.chinese: 这次我还打算招些佣兵。在周围留些战斗好手……

translations.english: Well, at least we can get back to work. But hazard pay keeps piling up, and this won't be getting any cheaper.
translations.chinese: 嗯，至少我们可以复工了。但是危险工资一直在上涨，这次得花更多的钱了。

translations.english: I should have figured. Damn.
translations.chinese: 我就知道，该死。

translations.english: Well, it'll set the miners at ease. And hopefully keep them alive. But they won't be cheap either.
translations.chinese: 这样矿工们就安心了。希望能让他们活下来。但那也要花大笔钱。

translations.english: I've defeated the Draugr and located the missing miners. They're dead.
translations.chinese: 我打败了尸鬼，也找到了失踪的矿工。他们死了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02027593]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [4/4] | EN: It's going to hit three thousand this time, I'm afraid. Have you got that on you? | ZH: 这回恐怕得花三千金币。你身上带够钱了吗？ | SID: 001812
- INFO:NAM1 [2/4] | EN: I'm going to hire some mercenaries this time, too. Having some people around who know how to fight should... | ZH: 这次我还打算招些佣兵。在周围留些战斗好手…… | SID: 0019B8
- INFO:NAM1 [1/4] | EN: Well, at least we can get back to work. But hazard pay keeps piling up, and this won't be getting any cheaper. | ZH: 嗯，至少我们可以复工了。但是危险工资一直在上涨，这次得花更多的钱了。 | SID: 001A49
- INFO:NAM1 [0/4] | EN: I should have figured. Damn. | ZH: 我就知道，该死。 | SID: 001A4B
- INFO:NAM1 [3/4] | EN: Well, it'll set the miners at ease. And hopefully keep them alive. But they won't be cheap either. | ZH: 这样矿工们就安心了。希望能让他们活下来。但那也要花大笔钱。 | SID: 0022D7
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I've defeated the Draugr and located the missing miners. They're dead. | ZH: 我打败了尸鬼，也找到了失踪的矿工。他们死了。 | SID: 001363

translations.english: "... but I can get it." Sure, sure. Listen, I've heard this song before and I'm already tired of it. Come back when you're not a waste of my time.
translations.chinese: “但我有办法弄到”好啦，听着，这些话我都听腻了。等你不会浪费时间的时候再回来找我。

translations.english: Not yet...
translations.chinese: 还没呢……

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02027594]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: "... but I can get it." Sure, sure. Listen, I've heard this song before and I'm already tired of it. Come back when you're not a waste of my time. | ZH: “但我有办法弄到”好啦，听着，这些话我都听腻了。等你不会浪费时间的时候再回来找我。 | SID: 001672
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Not yet... | ZH: 还没呢…… | SID: 001A13

translations.english: Ah, so you aren't just another wandering vagrant with a pocket full of stories. Apologies. That changes things.
translations.chinese: 啊，所以你不是个带着满口袋故事闲逛的流浪汉了。抱歉，我搞错了。

translations.english: You're short on gold? Maybe this will help a bit. Now talk. (<BribeCost> gold)
translations.chinese: 你缺钱吗？这些或许能有些作用。现在开讲吧。 (<BribeCost> 金币)

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02027595]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ah, so you aren't just another wandering vagrant with a pocket full of stories. Apologies. That changes things. | ZH: 啊，所以你不是个带着满口袋故事闲逛的流浪汉了。抱歉，我搞错了。 | SID: 0014C8
- INFO:RNAM | EN: You're short on gold? Maybe this will help a bit. Now talk. (<BribeCost> gold) | ZH: 你缺钱吗？这些或许能有些作用。现在开讲吧。 (<BribeCost> 金币) | SID: 001A08

translations.english: (Failed) Don't insult me. You don't have nearly enough for this to be worth my time, or yours.
translations.chinese: 别侮辱我了。你那点钱根本不值得咱们浪费彼此时间。

translations.english: Here's a little gold for your tale. (<BribeCost> gold)
translations.chinese: 故事不错，给你点儿。(<BribeCost> 金币)

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02027596]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: (Failed) Don't insult me. You don't have nearly enough for this to be worth my time, or yours. | ZH: 别侮辱我了。你那点钱根本不值得咱们浪费彼此时间。 | SID: 0015AC
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Here's a little gold for your tale. (<BribeCost> gold) | ZH: 故事不错，给你点儿。(<BribeCost> 金币) | SID: 001A06

translations.english: Good, good. This time, I'll spring for some more experienced muscle. That should do the trick.
translations.chinese: 很好，很好。这次我会雇佣一些更有经验的佣兵。应该没问题了。

translations.english: As a matter of fact, I do. (5000 gold)
translations.chinese: 事实上，我确实有这笔钱。（5000金币）

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02027597]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Good, good. This time, I'll spring for some more experienced muscle. That should do the trick. | ZH: 很好，很好。这次我会雇佣一些更有经验的佣兵。应该没问题了。 | SID: 0013AD
- INFO:RNAM | EN: As a matter of fact, I do. (5000 gold) | ZH: 事实上，我确实有这笔钱。（5000金币） | SID: 0012A6

translations.english: I feel like we've done this before, but that just means we're getting good at it.
translations.chinese: 这情况我们已经见识过了，但或许意味着我们越来越有经验了。

translations.english: Yes, well, the mercenaries did their jobs. Worth every septim. Of course, they might disagree... the dead ones, anyway. Gods, what a disaster.
translations.chinese: 是啊，那些佣兵们没白干，这笔钱花的值了。当然他们可能不这么想了……我是说那些死了的。天啊，真是场灾难。

translations.english: You go make the draugr dead again, and I'll keep the rest of these n'wahs from running off.
translations.chinese: 你再去杀光那些尸鬼，我来阻止剩下的恩'瓦们跑光。

translations.english: It looks like at least some of the miners survived this time.
translations.chinese: 看来至少这次矿工们有活下来的。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02027598]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I feel like we've done this before, but that just means we're getting good at it. | ZH: 这情况我们已经见识过了，但或许意味着我们越来越有经验了。 | SID: 00138F
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Yes, well, the mercenaries did their jobs. Worth every septim. Of course, they might disagree... the dead ones, anyway. Gods, what a disaster. | ZH: 是啊，那些佣兵们没白干，这笔钱花的值了。当然他们可能不这么想了……我是说那些死了的。天啊，真是场灾难。 | SID: 001A61
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: You go make the draugr dead again, and I'll keep the rest of these n'wahs from running off. | ZH: 你再去杀光那些尸鬼，我来阻止剩下的恩'瓦们跑光。 | SID: 00226B
- INFO:RNAM | EN: It looks like at least some of the miners survived this time. | ZH: 看来至少这次矿工们有活下来的。 | SID: 001A5E

translations.english: Draugr again. I mean... we should have expected it, right? What else do you find in these damn crypts, but waves and waves of draugr?
translations.chinese: 尸鬼又来了。我是说……也在预料之中，对吧？在这些天杀的地穴里除了一波波的尸鬼还能找到啥？

translations.english: You've had some luck with these things before. Do you think you could... go back in? See if anyone's still alive?
translations.chinese: 你在应付这种情况上运气不错。考虑一下能不能……进去看看？找找有没有活着的？

translations.english: At least six of the diggers are dead. The rest of them ran off, and I don't blame them.
translations.chinese: 已经死了至少六个挖掘工人。剩下的都跑了，但我一点都不怪他们。

translations.english: What is it this time?
translations.chinese: 这次又怎么了？

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02027599]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Draugr again. I mean... we should have expected it, right? What else do you find in these damn crypts, but waves and waves of draugr? | ZH: 尸鬼又来了。我是说……也在预料之中，对吧？在这些天杀的地穴里除了一波波的尸鬼还能找到啥？ | SID: 001969
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: You've had some luck with these things before. Do you think you could... go back in? See if anyone's still alive? | ZH: 你在应付这种情况上运气不错。考虑一下能不能……进去看看？找找有没有活着的？ | SID: 001D2F
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: At least six of the diggers are dead. The rest of them ran off, and I don't blame them. | ZH: 已经死了至少六个挖掘工人。剩下的都跑了，但我一点都不怪他们。 | SID: 0022C7
- INFO:RNAM | EN: What is it this time? | ZH: 这次又怎么了？ | SID: 001A46

translations.english: Oh... I was hoping I wouldn't see you quite so soon.
translations.chinese: 哦……没想到这么快又见面了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0202759A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh... I was hoping I wouldn't see you quite so soon. | ZH: 哦……没想到这么快又见面了。 | SID: 001567

translations.english: Ugh...

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0202759B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ugh... | ZH: 唔…… | SID: 001D74

translations.english: I don't suppose you have the gold yet?
translations.chinese: 我想你还没带够钱吧？

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0202759C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I don't suppose you have the gold yet? | ZH: 我想你还没带够钱吧？ | SID: 0012AE

translations.english: Just finish the job. If you aren't back in a couple of hours, I'll start packing up.
translations.chinese: 快去干活儿吧。要是几小时后你还没回来，我就要打包走人了。

translations.english: No, not yet.
translations.chinese: 不，还没有。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0202759D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Just finish the job. If you aren't back in a couple of hours, I'll start packing up. | ZH: 快去干活儿吧。要是几小时后你还没回来，我就要打包走人了。 | SID: 001A3A
- INFO:RNAM | EN: No, not yet. | ZH: 不，还没有。 | SID: 001A39

translations.english: Well, that's a start. Unless there's some way past that dead end, though, we're still stuck here.
translations.chinese: 至少开了头了。不过我们得找到穿过那条死路的办法，不然就得卡在这儿。

translations.english: I've dealt with the Draugr.
translations.chinese: 我把尸鬼都解决了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0202759E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Well, that's a start. Unless there's some way past that dead end, though, we're still stuck here. | ZH: 至少开了头了。不过我们得找到穿过那条死路的办法，不然就得卡在这儿。 | SID: 001D4F
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I've dealt with the Draugr. | ZH: 我把尸鬼都解决了。 | SID: 001C81

translations.english: Isn't that something. But I'm not heading down there, and there's no way anyone else will, until the draugr are gone. Keep at it.
translations.chinese: 真厉害，但我还不打算下去。其他人也是一样，你得先把尸鬼处理完才行。加油干吧。

translations.english: I found a way past the dead end.
translations.chinese: 我找到穿过死路的通道了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0202759F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Isn't that something. But I'm not heading down there, and there's no way anyone else will, until the draugr are gone. Keep at it. | ZH: 真厉害，但我还不打算下去。其他人也是一样，你得先把尸鬼处理完才行。加油干吧。 | SID: 001A32
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I found a way past the dead end. | ZH: 我找到穿过死路的通道了。 | SID: 00157C

translations.english: We'll have to sweeten the pot a bit, this time. I think I'll need... say, two thousand septims to hire replacements.
translations.chinese: 我们这次得把甜头给大点。我想有必要……花两千塞普汀来补充人手。

translations.english: Now, I'll have to go recruit some more miners... it won't be easy, seeing as none of their friends came back from the first attempt.
translations.chinese: 现在，我得招募些新的挖掘工人……可是谈何容易呢，毕竟其他工人也知道他们的朋友上次死了。

translations.english: Well, perhaps there's some hope for us yet.
translations.chinese: 好吧，或许我们还有些希望。

translations.english: I've dealt with the Draugr and found a way past the dead end.
translations.chinese: 我把尸鬼都处理了，通过死路的通道也找到了。

agentText:

translations.english: I'll head back to Raven Rock and round up some diggers. Once we've got something worth looking at, I'll send word to you.
translations.chinese: 我要回鸦石镇去找些挖掘工人。等我们发现了些有意思的东西，就派人送信给你。

translations.english: Hmm... it's all here. Well, then... looks like I have a good bit of work to start on.
translations.chinese: 嗯……钱够了，那么……看来我还有一堆活儿要干。

translations.english: Pleasure doing business with you, partner. I'll see you soon.
translations.chinese: 很高兴和你做生意，伙计。到时候见。

translations.english: Of course. (1000 gold)

agentText:

translations.english: No, please! I don't want to die!
translations.chinese: 不要，拜托！我不想死！

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [020275A2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No, please! I don't want to die! | ZH: 不要，拜托！我不想死！ | SID: 001507

translations.english: ...I suppose you're right. What can it hurt?
translations.chinese: ……我想你说得对。反正也不差什么。

translations.english: You can tell me. Come on, what's the harm? (Persuade)
translations.chinese: 你可以告诉我。来嘛，也不差什么吧？（说服）

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [020275A3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: ...I suppose you're right. What can it hurt? | ZH: ……我想你说得对。反正也不差什么。 | SID: 001365
- INFO:RNAM | EN: You can tell me. Come on, what's the harm? (Persuade) | ZH: 你可以告诉我。来嘛，也不差什么吧？（说服） | SID: 001A01

translations.english: (Failed) You've wasted enough of my time already. Just... just let me be.
translations.chinese: 你已经浪费了我太多时间。还是……走开吧。

translations.english: Spare me the walk. Just tell me. (Persuade)
translations.chinese: 别让我白跑一趟嘛。跟我说说吧。（说服）

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [020275A4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: (Failed) You've wasted enough of my time already. Just... just let me be. | ZH: 你已经浪费了我太多时间。还是……走开吧。 | SID: 0019CD

translations.english: Oh, gods... what happened? What have I done?
translations.chinese: 天啊……发生了什么？我做了什么？

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [020275A5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh, gods... what happened? What have I done? | ZH: 天啊……发生了什么？我做了什么？ | SID: 00131A

translations.english: Look, I appreciate your company, but that's not why you're here. You're the money in this operation. And I guess some of the muscle.
translations.chinese: 听着，你留在这儿我很感激，但你还有正事要办。你是这桩生意的金主，虽然偶尔也要出些力。

translations.english: But for now, I need you to be the money. So come back when you can do your job.
translations.chinese: 但是现在，我需要你出钱。所以等钱够了再回来吧。

translations.english: No, I don't.
translations.chinese: 不，我没钱。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [020275A6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Look, I appreciate your company, but that's not why you're here. You're the money in this operation. And I guess some of the muscle. | ZH: 听着，你留在这儿我很感激，但你还有正事要办。你是这桩生意的金主，虽然偶尔也要出些力。 | SID: 001CD7
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: But for now, I need you to be the money. So come back when you can do your job. | ZH: 但是现在，我需要你出钱。所以等钱够了再回来吧。 | SID: 002315
- INFO:RNAM | EN: No, I don't. | ZH: 不，我没钱。 | SID: 001CA6

translations.english: Any news?
translations.chinese: 有新消息么？

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [020275A7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Any news? | ZH: 有新消息么？ | SID: 001AA5

translations.english: Well, unless you want to deal with the draugr, this whole little venture of ours is over.
translations.chinese: 嗯，除非你解决那些尸鬼，不然我们这次探险就结束了。

translations.english: Might be over either way. It looked like a dead end before the place started crawling. We could have missed something, though. I don't know.
translations.chinese: 但也许本来就没希望了。好像在它们爬起来前我们就挖到了死路。但我们可能漏看了什么。

translations.english: What now?
translations.chinese: 现在怎么办？

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [020275A8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Well, unless you want to deal with the draugr, this whole little venture of ours is over. | ZH: 嗯，除非你解决那些尸鬼，不然我们这次探险就结束了。 | SID: 001366
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Might be over either way. It looked like a dead end before the place started crawling. We could have missed something, though. I don't know. | ZH: 但也许本来就没希望了。好像在它们爬起来前我们就挖到了死路。但我们可能漏看了什么。 | SID: 001A24
- INFO:RNAM | EN: What now? | ZH: 现在怎么办？ | SID: 0018A6

translations.english: Do you have the gold?
translations.chinese: 钱够了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [020275A9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Do you have the gold? | ZH: 钱够了吗？ | SID: 001A10

translations.english: Just leave me be.
translations.chinese: 别管我。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [020275AA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Just leave me be. | ZH: 别管我。 | SID: 001996

translations.english: Damn it, what am I going to do?
translations.chinese: 可恶啊，我该怎么办？

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [020275AB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Damn it, what am I going to do? | ZH: 可恶啊，我该怎么办？ | SID: 001B36

translations.english: The name's Ralis. Ralis Sedarys, out of Mournhold.
translations.chinese: 我叫拉里斯。拉里斯·瑟达瑞斯，来自哀伤之城。

translations.english: I've got a financier waiting for me back on the mainland. Sent me here in the interests of obtaining some rare antiquities. The "Relics of Ahzidal."
translations.chinese: 内陆有个赞助人在等我回去。他派我来取一些稀有文物。“阿兹达尔的遗物”。

translations.english: ... bah. It probably can't hurt to tell you. You look mostly honest.
translations.chinese: ……啊。可能告诉你也没关系，看起来还算老实。

translations.english: But this whole thing became a disaster right quick, let me tell you.
translations.chinese: 但是整件事儿很快变成了一场灾难，听我说。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [020275AC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: The name's Ralis. Ralis Sedarys, out of Mournhold. | ZH: 我叫拉里斯。拉里斯·瑟达瑞斯，来自哀伤之城。 | SID: 0019F9
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: I've got a financier waiting for me back on the mainland. Sent me here in the interests of obtaining some rare antiquities. The "Relics of Ahzidal." | ZH: 内陆有个赞助人在等我回去。他派我来取一些稀有文物。“阿兹达尔的遗物”。 | SID: 001AC5

- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: But this whole thing became a disaster right quick, let me tell you. | ZH: 但是整件事儿很快变成了一场灾难，听我说。 | SID: 002272

translations.english: Five thousand.
translations.chinese: 五千。

translations.english: How much?
translations.chinese: 到底多少？

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [020275AD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Five thousand. | ZH: 五千。 | SID: 001BA3
- INFO:RNAM | EN: How much? | ZH: 到底多少？ | SID: 001913

translations.english: I'll go hire a new crew, and some brawny types to keep them safe. Come back and check in on us. Nothing can stop us this time.
translations.chinese: 我去雇佣新的人手，再招些壮实的来保护他们。记得回来看看我们的进度，这次没什么能让我们停工了。

translations.english: We're going to be making this back fifty-fold, partner. Trust me on this.
translations.chinese: 我们会赚回五十倍的，伙计。这你可以相信我。

translations.english: Here. This had better be worth it. (3000 gold)
translations.chinese: 拿去吧。这笔钱最好花的值。（3000金币）

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [020275AE]
Translations:
