- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: We're going to be making this back fifty-fold, partner. Trust me on this. | ZH: 我们会赚回五十倍的，伙计。这你可以相信我。 | SID: 001B9B
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Here. This had better be worth it. (3000 gold) | ZH: 拿去吧。这笔钱最好花的值。（3000金币） | SID: 001A50

translations.english: And now you're back. Great, just great.
translations.chinese: 你也回来了。太好了，真是太好了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [020275AF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: And now you're back. Great, just great. | ZH: 你也回来了。太好了，真是太好了。 | SID: 001A44

translations.english: Any luck?
translations.chinese: 运气如何？

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [020275B0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Any luck? | ZH: 运气如何？ | SID: 001468

translations.english: What? Are you... are you serious? Well, I think I could make that work..
translations.chinese: 什么？你是……认真的？好吧，我想应该可行。

translations.english: We can sort out the details of our little arrangement later, but for now, I'll manage the dig if you can manage the coin.
translations.chinese: 我们以后再把协议里的细节定下来，现在的话，我负责动土，你负责出钱。

translations.english: I've got some money. Are you looking for a partner?
translations.chinese: 我有些钱，你要和我合伙吗？

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [020275B1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: What? Are you... are you serious? Well, I think I could make that work.. | ZH: 什么？你是……认真的？好吧，我想应该可行。 | SID: 001514
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: We can sort out the details of our little arrangement later, but for now, I'll manage the dig if you can manage the coin. | ZH: 我们以后再把协议里的细节定下来，现在的话，我负责动土，你负责出钱。 | SID: 0022D2
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I've got some money. Are you looking for a partner? | ZH: 我有些钱，你要和我合伙吗？ | SID: 00150E

translations.english: I'll go to Raven Rock and you... you won't mention this to anyone. If you see me there, just... give a nod and I'll lend a hand if you need it.
translations.chinese: 我要回鸦石镇去，但你……别跟任何人提起这事儿。你要是需要我的帮助，就在那儿找我，点个头就行。

translations.english: Of course! I don't even want to hear the word "barrow" again. Ever.
translations.chinese: 当然！我再也不想听到“古坟”这词儿了。永远也不想了。

translations.english: It's... it's the least I can do. Just... keep this quiet.
translations.chinese: 我……也只能做这些了。只是……别把这事儿说出去了。

translations.english: I believe you. Just... don't come back here.
translations.chinese: 我相信你。但是……别回这里来了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [020275B2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I'll go to Raven Rock and you... you won't mention this to anyone. If you see me there, just... give a nod and I'll lend a hand if you need it. | ZH: 我要回鸦石镇去，但你……别跟任何人提起这事儿。你要是需要我的帮助，就在那儿找我，点个头就行。 | SID: 001612

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: It's... it's the least I can do. Just... keep this quiet. | ZH: 我……也只能做这些了。只是……别把这事儿说出去了。 | SID: 00231A
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I believe you. Just... don't come back here. | ZH: 我相信你。但是……别回这里来了。 | SID: 001A7D

translations.english: What? No! You can't... I have his will on my side! He will command all of us!
translations.chinese: 什么？不！你不能……我只是被他控制了！他会控制我们所有人！

translations.english: I can't let you go unpunished.
translations.chinese: 我不能让你逃脱惩罚。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [020275B3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What? No! You can't... I have his will on my side! He will command all of us! | ZH: 什么？不！你不能……我只是被他控制了！他会控制我们所有人！ | SID: 0014CB
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I can't let you go unpunished. | ZH: 我不能让你逃脱惩罚。 | SID: 001791

translations.english: You come out to the northern ashlands, you don't expect things to go easy, you know? But this was something outside my particular expertise.
translations.chinese: 在这北方的灰烬之地，任何事情都不会顺利，知道吗？但是这件事完全不在我的专业范围内。

translations.english: What happened?
translations.chinese: 发生了什么？

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [020275B4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You come out to the northern ashlands, you don't expect things to go easy, you know? But this was something outside my particular expertise. | ZH: 在这北方的灰烬之地，任何事情都不会顺利，知道吗？但是这件事完全不在我的专业范围内。 | SID: 0015F4
- INFO:RNAM | EN: What happened? | ZH: 发生了什么？ | SID: 001DD7

translations.english: Have you got the money?
translations.chinese: 你有足够的钱吗？

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [020275B5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Have you got the money? | ZH: 你有足够的钱吗？ | SID: 00131C

translations.english: Those things had filled it up with slop for their beasts. Elmus helped me wash it out, but the fire still smells terrible.
translations.chinese: 那些家伙在里面放了泔水来喂他们的牲口。艾穆斯帮我洗干净了，但火闻起来还是很臭。

translations.english: It's not as good as it used to be, but I still am, at least.
translations.chinese: 没有以前那么好用了，但至少我的实力还在。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02027813]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Those things had filled it up with slop for their beasts. Elmus helped me wash it out, but the fire still smells terrible. | ZH: 那些家伙在里面放了泔水来喂他们的牲口。艾穆斯帮我洗干净了，但火闻起来还是很臭。 | SID: 001B69
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: It's not as good as it used to be, but I still am, at least. | ZH: 没有以前那么好用了，但至少我的实力还在。 | SID: 001E21

translations.english: Peace, and a warm drink.
translations.chinese: 保持平静，再来杯温酒。

translations.english: Kuvar isn't enough to frighten me off. He makes a lot of noise, but at the end of the day, he wants what we all want.
translations.chinese: 库瓦尔吓不到我，他吵了半天，但最终，他想要的和我们没什么区别。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02027814]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Peace, and a warm drink. | ZH: 保持平静，再来杯温酒。 | SID: 00132A

translations.english: Enough for now. But I'll either need to get some more barrels or start importing more if we're going to make it through next winter.
translations.chinese: 暂时还够，但要度过下个冬季的话，我还得再酿几桶，或者买些回来。

translations.english: Last thing you want is the mead to run out just as the fire dies!
translations.chinese: 最糟糕的就是火熄灭时，蜜酒也喝完了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02027815]

translations.english: I don't think we need that old ghost anymore.
translations.chinese: 我认为再也不需要那个鬼魂了。

translations.english: Whoever leads us next can go plead with him if they want to, but I'd rather make a tradition of my own.
translations.chinese: 下一位首领可以去寻求他的支持，但我宁愿开创自己的传统。

translations.english: Hrothmund was a great man, but he wasn't a god or a paragon. We're alive, he's not, and we'll look to ourselves for strength.
translations.chinese: 哈洛斯蒙德是个伟人，但他既非神，也不完美。我们是活人，而他死了，我们必须从自己身上获得力量。

translations.english: We're going to rebuild. The hall, and ourselves. In some form or another.
translations.chinese: 我们要重建。以某种形式重建大厅还有我们自己。

translations.english: I'll lead those who will follow. And most of these are the following sort. So yes, I think we'll be all right.
translations.chinese: 我会领导那些愿意追随我的人，而大多数人都会追随。所以是的，我想我们不会有事的。

translations.english: At least, that's my hope. We've all learned lessons at the expense of this recent unpleasantness.
translations.chinese: 至少，这是我的期望。最近发生的不愉快肯定让大家都学到了教训。

translations.english: We're colder than the snow and harder than steel. We wrap ourselves in both to remind us of the world we face.
translations.chinese: 我们比雪更冷，比钢更硬。我们置身于两者之间，提醒自己所面对的世界是什么模样。

translations.english: Now that we're back where we belong, I'm hoping we can get ourselves back to what Thirsk deserves.
translations.chinese: 既然我们回家了，我希望能回到瑟斯科该有的状态。

translations.english: Sad to see her go, of course. But Bujold wouldn't have gotten as far as she did if she wasn't strong. She'll... she'll be ok.
translations.chinese: 我当然不想看到她离开，但若是布约德不够坚强，她也不会有今天的成就。她……会没事的。

translations.english: I can't believe Kuvar would do that. To his own wife!
translations.chinese: 我不相信库瓦尔会那么做，那是他老婆啊！

translations.english: I'll head out looking for her eventually. We'll wander the wilderness together. Just have to get some things in order here, first.
translations.chinese: 我迟早会去外头找她，我们将一同在野外谋生。但首先要让这里恢复秩序。

translations.english: In the end, she was one of the better leaders we've had, but if she didn't deserve it anymore, I guess that's that.
translations.chinese: 最后来看，她比之前的首领们都做得好，但要是她失格了，我也只好接受。

translations.english: It's too dangerous out here. We can't waste time worrying about having a liar in our midst. Lying is the first step to cowardice, after all.
translations.chinese: 这里已经够危险了。我们不能浪费时间抱怨自己人中有骗子。毕竟，谎言是迈向懦弱的第一步。

translations.english: I hope she finds what she needs out there.
translations.chinese: 希望她在外面能找到她所求之物。

translations.chinese: 要是有人想制造这种武器，他们就得从鲍德尔那里得到那些知识。

translations.english: Baldor is the keeper of an ancient tradition, the forging of Stalhrim. It is an art we Skaal hold sacred.
translations.chinese: 鲍德尔守护着一项古老传统，魔冰的铸造技艺。那对我们斯卡尔人来说是神圣的。

translations.english: Well, there is one reason that comes to mind.

translations.english: Then I'm going to get on the first boat to the mainland.

translations.english: First I'm going to leave this place, as fast as I can.

translations.chinese: 我是最后一个了，其他人都死完了。

translations.chinese: 我们剩下的人都成了她的囚犯。

translations.english: She repaid our kindness by attacking us in the middle of the night.
translations.chinese: 她却在午夜袭击了我们，来回报我们的善意。

translations.english: We were digging in these mines when she found us.
translations.chinese: 她找到我们的时候，我们在挖这些矿坑。

translations.english: Miraak was trying to take power here, and protect himself in the process.
translations.chinese: 米拉克尝试在这里获得力量，以及保护自己。

translations.chinese: 造物主啊，没错！就是这张！我只能猜你是从安卡利昂的尸体上搜出来的。

translations.english: I must take this back to Skaal Village right away.
translations.chinese: 我必须马上把这个带回斯卡尔村去。

translations.english: When you return to the village, come and meet me at my forge. I will reward you for this great deed you have done.
translations.chinese: 等你回村子后，来我的锻炉找我。我会好好奖励你的功劳。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02027F98]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Did you really think our threats were idle? | ZH: 当真以为我们是在虚张声势吗？ | SID: 001860

translations.english: You will die on this island, interloper.
translations.chinese: 你要死在这岛上了，入侵者。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02027F99]

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02027F9A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You should have heeded our warnings. | ZH: 你该听听我们的警告的。 | SID: 00195A

translations.english: You'll remember the name Ancarion after this.
translations.chinese: 以后你最好记住安卡利昂这个名字。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02027F9B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You'll remember the name Ancarion after this. | ZH: 以后你最好记住安卡利昂这个名字。 | SID: 00126A

translations.chinese: 敢忤逆梭默，就得付出代价。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02027F9C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You cross the Thalmor, you pay the price. | ZH: 敢忤逆梭默，就得付出代价。 | SID: 0014C2

translations.english: Did you really think you could interfere with us and not suffer the consequences?
translations.chinese: 真觉得干涉我们后你能全身而退啊？

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02027F9D]

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Did you really think you could interfere with us and not suffer the consequences? | ZH: 真觉得干涉我们后你能全身而退啊？ | SID: 0013C1

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02027F9E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We will have that Stalhrim, and there's nothing you can do to stop us! | ZH: 我们迟早会得到魔冰，你阻止不了！ | SID: 001959

translations.english: Who sent you to stop us? It hardly matters, you're dead anyway.
translations.chinese: 谁派你来阻止我们的？不管了，你已经是个死人了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Who sent you to stop us? It hardly matters, you're dead anyway. | ZH: 谁派你来阻止我们的？不管了，你已经是个死人了。 | SID: 001958

translations.chinese: 你无法阻止我的计划！

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02027FA0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You will not stop my plans! | ZH: 你无法阻止我的计划！ | SID: 00142D

translations.english: I'll kill whoever I must, but I will see my plans fulfilled!
translations.chinese: 无论要杀多少人，我都要实现我的计划！

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02027FA1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'll kill whoever I must, but I will see my plans fulfilled! | ZH: 无论要杀多少人，我都要实现我的计划！ | SID: 0016CE

EDID: [02027FA2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Now you'll learn the folly of your mistake! | ZH: 现在你要为犯的错付出代价了！ | SID: 001956

translations.chinese: 我还不打算动你……至少这次。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02027FA4]

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'll allow you to leave in peace... this time. | ZH: 我还不打算动你……至少这次。 | SID: 0018EB

translations.english: Do not think we are now friends. I have tolerated you, nothing more.
translations.chinese: 别觉得我们是朋友了。我是在忍受你，没了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02027FA5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Do not think we are now friends. I have tolerated you, nothing more. | ZH: 别觉得我们是朋友了。我是在忍受你，没了。 | SID: 001957

translations.english: You are alive only at my pleasure. Do not forget that.
translations.chinese: 你还活着是因为我乐意。给我记住了。

translations.chinese: 你获得了这里的公民身份，希望你会考虑留下来，成为我们社区的一员。

translations.english: Since the Severin family... or whoever they were...turned out to be criminals, their property is now forfeit.
translations.chinese: 既然瑟佛林家……他们到底是谁都不重要了……他们的罪行已被揭露，财产现已充公。

translations.chinese: 每次红山喷发后，就会有更多的心石落在这里。去找找周围有没有陨石坑，裸露的岩石之类的东西。

translations.chinese: 萨洛塔尔，你这么轻易就换主子了吗？

translations.english: Miraak harbored fantasies of rebellion against me. Learn from his example. Serve me faithfully, and you will continue to be richly rewarded.
translations.chinese: 米拉克幻想着背叛我，从他那儿吸取教训吧，忠诚地服侍我，你将有拿不完的奖励。

translations.english: It's good to see you again, Skaal-friend. By saving Baldor, you helped to preserve our sacred traditions.
translations.chinese: 很高兴又见到你，斯卡尔之友。你救了鲍德尔，让我们得以维持神圣的传统。

translations.english: Tharstan hasn't stopped talking about the crypt you explored with him.
translations.chinese: 沙尔斯坦一直谈论着你和他一起探索的那个地穴。

translations.english: I welcome you, friend of the Skaal.
translations.chinese: 我欢迎你，斯卡尔之友。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I welcome you, friend of the Skaal. | ZH: 我欢迎你，斯卡尔之友。 | SID: 001262

translations.english: Perhaps I'll be the first Skaal to slay a dragon. That would be worthy of a tale!
translations.chinese: 也许我会是第一个屠龙的斯卡尔人。那可就是货真价实的传说了！

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

translations.english: The others call you a friend, but I still see an outsider.
translations.chinese: 其他人当你是朋友，但我看你依旧是个外人。

Addon: Dragonborn

translations.english: I came here to study the history of Solstheim, but it's the Skaal who intrigue me the most.
translations.chinese: 我来这儿研究索瑟海姆的历史，但最吸引我的是斯卡尔人。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

translations.english: There's really nothing remarkable in the letters. I don't know what he's so excited about.
translations.chinese: 其实信里没有提到什么特别的东西。我不明白为什么他那么兴奋。

translations.english: Crescius's great-grandfather worked for the East Empire Company. The letters mention some sort of discovery he was sent to investigate.
translations.chinese: 克雷修斯的曾祖父曾受雇于东帝国公司。这些信提到了他被派去调查的某种发现。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02029DAC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: There's really nothing remarkable in the letters. I don't know what he's so excited about. | ZH: 其实信里没有提到什么特别的东西。我不明白为什么他那么兴奋。 | SID: 00181C
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Crescius's great-grandfather worked for the East Empire Company. The letters mention some sort of discovery he was sent to investigate. | ZH: 克雷修斯的曾祖父曾受雇于东帝国公司。这些信提到了他被派去调查的某种发现。 | SID: 00181E

translations.english: He's convinced himself that there's some sort of conspiracy involving the East Empire Company and the mine's closure.
translations.chinese: 他认为矿场关门和东帝国公司的某种阴谋有关。

translations.english: We came across some old letters that belonged to his great-grandfather in our house and he believes every word written in them.
translations.chinese: 我们在家里找到了几封他曾祖父的信，他对其中的内容深信不疑。

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: We came across some old letters that belonged to his great-grandfather in our house and he believes every word written in them. | ZH: 我们在家里找到了几封他曾祖父的信，他对其中的内容深信不疑。 | SID: 001B34

translations.english: That foolish old man thinks he's thirty years younger than he is. He's going to get himself killed traipsing around the mine.
translations.chinese: 那个傻老头还以为他在三十年前呢。在矿场里闲逛迟早会害死自己。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02029DB0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: That foolish old man thinks he's thirty years younger than he is. He's going to get himself killed traipsing around the mine. | ZH: 那个傻老头还以为他在三十年前呢。在矿场里闲逛迟早会害死自己。 | SID: 001643

translations.english: Look, I know I don't have much to go on. I have that unsent letter, and that's really it.
translations.chinese: 听着，我知道没什么线索。我有一封没送出去的信，就这样了。

translations.english: I may sound like a crazy old man to you, but I'm telling you, the tunnels here are solid... they would never collapse like that.
translations.chinese: 可能我听上去像个疯老头，但是我告诉你，这里的隧道很坚固……绝对不会像那样坍塌。

translations.english: But I also have a miner's instinct that's run in my family from before Gratian was even born.
translations.chinese: 但我还有一种矿工的直觉，这种直觉在格瑞希安出生前就流传于我的家族中了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I may sound like a crazy old man to you, but I'm telling you, the tunnels here are solid... they would never collapse like that. | ZH: 可能我听上去像个疯老头，但是我告诉你，这里的隧道很坚固……绝对不会像那样坍塌。 | SID: 0014D7

translations.english: I love him dearly, and I support everything he does, but I can't let him chase this silly idea or he may end up joining Gratian in a rocky grave.
translations.chinese: 我真的很爱他，会支持他的任何作为，但我不能让他追求这个愚蠢的念头，否则他迟早会步格瑞希安的后尘，葬身石窟。

translations.english: My beloved is almost eighty years old and I think the shock of finding one of his ancestor's things has left his mind a bit... confused.
translations.chinese: 我的爱人已经快八十岁了，可能找到他祖先遗物的惊诧让他脑子有些……困惑。

agentText:

translations.english: They were never even able to go down there and recover the body... the East Empire Company sealed that section off to prevent any more tragedies.
translations.chinese: 他们甚至没能下去找回他的遗体……东帝国公司封锁了这一区域，以防再出事故。

translations.english: Crescius is convinced it's a story cooked up by the company to cover up something else, but I don't know.
translations.chinese: 克雷修斯坚信那只是东帝国公司编造的，为了掩盖其它事情的谎言，但我不清楚。

translations.english: There was a horrible accident, and he was killed when one of the tunnels collapsed.
translations.chinese: 发生了一场恐怖的意外，他死于一处隧道坍塌。

translations.english: Poor man... can you imagine doing all that dangerous work just to end up dying at your own doorstep?
translations.chinese: 可怜的家伙……你敢信他干那么危险的活儿，最后却死在自己家门口吗？

translations.english: He was an explorer for the East Empire Company. They'd send him all over Tamriel when they had difficulties in a mining operation.
translations.chinese: 他是个东帝国公司的探矿人员，被派到了全泰姆瑞尔任何采矿作业出问题的地方。

translations.english: Gratian Caerellius.
translations.chinese: 格瑞希安·凯利乌斯。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02029DB4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Poor man... can you imagine doing all that dangerous work just to end up dying at your own doorstep? | ZH: 可怜的家伙……你敢信他干那么危险的活儿，最后却死在自己家门口吗？ | SID: 001657
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: He was an explorer for the East Empire Company. They'd send him all over Tamriel when they had difficulties in a mining operation. | ZH: 他是个东帝国公司的探矿人员，被派到了全泰姆瑞尔任何采矿作业出问题的地方。 | SID: 001757
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Gratian Caerellius. | ZH: 格瑞希安·凯利乌斯。 | SID: 001822

translations.english: Much of what was known has been lost to the ages. He was Dragonborn, and yet he served the Dragons.
translations.chinese: 大部分事情都随时间流逝而消失了。他虽然是龙裔，却为龙族效力。

translations.english: Then he turned against them, becoming something they feared. He was defeated long ago, but it seems he was never destroyed.
translations.chinese: 后来他转而与拜龙教为敌，令他们畏惧。很久以前他就被打败了，但似乎并未被彻底摧毁。

translations.english: A priest in their order, highly esteemed and very powerful.
translations.chinese: 他是拜龙教里的祭司，备受尊敬且实力强大。

translations.english: Some dark influence wields power over them, forces them to forget themselves and act against their nature.
translations.chinese: 某种黑暗力量在控制他们，强迫他们迷失自我，违背天性。

translations.english: At first it was only during the night, but now every moment is spent building some strange shrine around the Wind Stone.
translations.chinese: 最初只在夜间才会这样，但现在他们每时每刻都在围绕着风石建造某种奇怪祭坛。

translations.english: I believe if the shrine can be destroyed, the Skaal will be free once more.
translations.chinese: 我认为要是能摧毁祭坛，斯卡尔人就会重获自由。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0202A576]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Some dark influence wields power over them, forces them to forget themselves and act against their nature. | ZH: 某种黑暗力量在控制他们，强迫他们迷失自我，违背天性。 | SID: 001F1B
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: At first it was only during the night, but now every moment is spent building some strange shrine around the Wind Stone. | ZH: 最初只在夜间才会这样，但现在他们每时每刻都在围绕着风石建造某种奇怪祭坛。 | SID: 001F87
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I believe if the shrine can be destroyed, the Skaal will be free once more. | ZH: 我认为要是能摧毁祭坛，斯卡尔人就会重获自由。 | SID: 001FB5

translations.english: Miraak is behind what is happening to our village, and so the knowledge he has gained as Dragonborn is at the heart of it.
translations.chinese: 我们村子里发生的事情的幕后是米拉克，他身为龙裔取得的知识也是关键。

translations.english: You are Dragonborn as well. You too can wield this power, perhaps to a better end.
translations.chinese: 你也是龙裔，也能掌握那种力量，或许能将其用于正道。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0202A577]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Miraak is behind what is happening to our village, and so the knowledge he has gained as Dragonborn is at the heart of it. | ZH: 我们村子里发生的事情的幕后是米拉克，他身为龙裔取得的知识也是关键。 | SID: 001E7B
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: You are Dragonborn as well. You too can wield this power, perhaps to a better end. | ZH: 你也是龙裔，也能掌握那种力量，或许能将其用于正道。 | SID: 001EA2

translations.english: Frea, my daughter, went to seek out the source of these dark magics. She traveled to the old temple at the center of the island.
translations.chinese: 芙瑞雅，我的女儿，试着找出这些黑暗魔法的源头。她去了岛中央的古代神殿。

translations.english: I did not wish her to risk herself, and I worry for her safety. If you could find her and see that she is safe, I would be grateful.
translations.chinese: 我不想让她一个人冒险，同时也担心她的安危。要是你能找到她，确保她的安全，我将不胜感激。

translations.english: We already owe you much, but I must ask you for one more thing.
translations.chinese: 我们欠你的太多了，但是我还有最后一个请求。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: We already owe you much, but I must ask you for one more thing. | ZH: 我们欠你的太多了，但是我还有最后一个请求。 | SID: 001FB0

translations.english: It is good to see you again.
translations.chinese: 很高兴再次见到你。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0202A579]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It is good to see you again. | ZH: 很高兴再次见到你。 | SID: 001F27

translations.english: And there is the one who has freed us.
translations.chinese: 这位是我们的解放者。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0202A57A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: And there is the one who has freed us. | ZH: 这位是我们的解放者。 | SID: 001EF6

translations.english: A strange thing, to lose control of oneself. We are lucky to be free.
translations.chinese: 意识被控制是件怪事。我们能重获自由是幸运的。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

translations.english: It would seem so. And you are to thank for it.
translations.chinese: 看来是这样。我们都会为此感激你。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0202A57C]

translations.chinese: 你赢了。我感觉得到。

Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0202A57D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You have prevailed. I can feel it. | ZH: 你赢了。我感觉得到。 | SID: 001EE8

translations.english: The air is different. We are safe, which means you have succeeded.
translations.chinese: 空气有所不同了，我们安全了，这代表着你成功了。

agentText:

EDID: [0202A57E]

translations.english: I cannot maintain the barrier for much longer.
translations.chinese: 我的屏障没法支撑太久了。

translations.english: My strength falters. We do not have much time.
translations.chinese: 我的力量正在衰减，时间不多了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0202A580]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: My strength falters. We do not have much time. | ZH: 我的力量正在衰减，时间不多了。 | SID: 001F22

translations.english: Put an end to this evil magic before it consumes us all.
translations.chinese: 在我们被这黑暗魔法完全吞噬之前终结它。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0202A581]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Put an end to this evil magic before it consumes us all. | ZH: 在我们被这黑暗魔法完全吞噬之前终结它。 | SID: 001FA9

translations.english: If anyone can help us now, it is you.
translations.chinese: 如果说有人能帮我们，那只能是你了。

agentText:

translations.english: We must tell Storn what we have seen.
translations.chinese: 得告诉斯托恩我们看到了什么。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [0202A584]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We must tell Storn what we have seen. | ZH: 得告诉斯托恩我们看到了什么。 | SID: 001F90

translations.english: I just hope both of you don't mistake my enthusiasm for insanity.
translations.chinese: 就是希望你们俩别把我的热心误解成发疯了。

translations.english: Then I'll settle down peacefully and never set foot in this mine again.
translations.chinese: 那我就定下心来安稳过日子，再也不踏进这矿场了。

translations.english: I've been waiting for this moment for a long time... even before I discovered Gratian's old things.
translations.chinese: 我已经等这天很久了……甚至在找到格瑞希安的遗物前就在等了。

agentText:

translations.english: I realize she cares about me, but she has to understand that I can't rest until I find out what happened to Gratian.
translations.chinese: 我知道她关心我，但她得明白我非得知道格瑞希安出了什么事儿才能安心。

translations.english: She thinks that old age has addled my mind... that I'm seeing things when there's nothing to be seen.
translations.chinese: 他觉得我老了就糊涂了……比如看到了一些其实不存在的东西。

translations.english: After Gratian died, he left behind a wife and a son... my grandfather, Rellicus.
translations.chinese: 格瑞希安死后留下了他老婆和儿子……我祖父，瑞里库斯。

translations.english: Our home has stood in Raven Rock since the colony was founded. Gratian helped build it with his own two hands.
translations.chinese: 我家安在这儿是鸦石镇聚落刚建立那会儿的事，格瑞希安也帮上了忙。

translations.english: Rellicus lived there for quite a long time, working in the other sections of the mine until he was slain by reavers.
translations.chinese: 瑞里库斯在这儿住了很久，也在矿场的其他地方干活儿，后来他被抢匪杀了。

translations.english: Until I met my darling Aphia, yes.
translations.chinese: 对，直到遇见我爱人阿菲娅。

translations.english: I suppose you could have called me a bitter old hermit... now I'm just old.
translations.chinese: 原本我就是个尖酸老头……现在我就是老了点儿。

translations.english: Unfortunately, yes.
translations.chinese: 对，真不走运。

translations.english: I wanted her to see her homeland before she died.
translations.chinese: 希望她走之前能看看故乡。

translations.english: I only had enough coin saved to send one of us back to the Imperial City, so I sent my mother alone.
translations.chinese: 我存的钱只够让一个人回帝都，所以就把老妈一个人送回去了。

translations.english: Well you know it as well as I do. Raven Rock Mine wasn't empty at all... it's still rich in ebony ore.
translations.chinese: 你我都知道，鸦石镇矿场还没挖完……里面还有大量的黑檀矿。

translations.english: I came from three generations of miners, and I couldn't get anyone to believe me.
translations.chinese: 我是矿工家庭的第三代人了，却没法取信任何人。

translations.english: Well we showed them, didn't we!
translations.chinese: 已经向他们展示过了，不是么！

translations.english: When I was old enough, I began working in the mine hoping to make my fortune and eventually move to the Imperial City.
translations.chinese: 当我到了岁数后，就开始在矿场里干活儿，希望挣大钱后搬回帝都去。

translations.english: I never knew my father... my mother and I always lived alone.
translations.chinese: 我没见过我爸……一直以来都跟老妈住一块儿。

translations.english: I asked her about him many times, but she seemed angry and refused to speak about him, so eventually I let it go.
translations.chinese: 我倒是问过很多次，但老妈总会发火儿，一个字儿都不说，后来就没提过了。

translations.english: You've gone far enough. Neloth is a fool to think he could send some low life to finish me off.
translations.chinese: 你走的够远了。内洛斯那傻子居然觉得派些渣子来就能解决我。

translations.english: Your thu'um is stronger than Miraak's. Vobalaan in. I serve you now.
translations.chinese: 你的吐'目比米拉克更强大。沃巴兰 因。我愿侍奉于您。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

translations.english: You've got yourself a ship. We'll cast off immediately.
translations.chinese: 准备上船吧，我们马上起航。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

translations.english: Still interested in heading over there?
translations.chinese: 你还想去那边儿吗？

translations.english: They still pay me for supplies and passage and I can always use the coin.
translations.chinese: 他们还是会付我物资和载客的钱，这笔钱我用的上。

translations.english: If you ask me, I can't blame them. Things aren't what they used to be out there.
translations.chinese: 我个人认为，这很正常。那边儿的情况跟以前比差的太远了。

translations.english: I'll give you a fair price. Not many people headed over there these days.
translations.chinese: 我开的价绝对合理，这年头没几个人想去那儿了。

translations.english: Well, here we are. This is Raven Rock. Can't say I'm all that glad to see it again.
translations.chinese: 嗯，我们到了。这就是鸦石镇，又看到它，实在叫人高兴不起来。

translations.english: Good luck. Maybe you can figure out what's going on around here.
translations.chinese: 祝你好运。也许你能搞清楚这里到底出了什么事儿。

translations.english: If you're looking for passage to Solstheim, you won't find a finer vessel than the Northern Maiden.
translations.chinese: 你在找去索瑟海姆的船吗？没有比北方少女号更合适的了。

translations.english: Some of the more powerful among them can exert their influence within our world, and when they do, men inevitably suffer.
translations.chinese: 强大的迪德拉可以对我们的世界造成影响，他们得手了，凡人就有难了。

translations.english: Powerful and malevolent entities who make their home on the plane of Oblivion.
translations.chinese: 它们是住在湮灭位面的强大而邪恶的实体。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

translations.english: Yes, that was a most disturbing experience. But to answer your question, the architecture was strange, almost otherworldly.
translations.chinese: 是的，那是一次非常令人不安的经历。言归正传，那建筑很奇怪，几乎像是其他位面的。

translations.english: Either that, or perhaps a daedra. If so, then may the nine protect us.
translations.chinese: 除此之外，也可能是迪德拉。如果真是的话，愿九圣灵保护我们。

translations.english: Given that, and the considerable power it must have taken to affect our minds so completely, it would suggest the work of a powerful mage.
translations.chinese: 再加上，其中蕴藏了足以完全控制我们心智的巨大力量，意味着它可能是某个强大法师的手笔。

translations.english: Well, not so far. They think I'm a bit strange, but they seem to tolerate me.
translations.chinese: 目前还好。他们觉得我有点奇怪，但似乎还容得下我。

translations.english: In fact, they've been very accommodating. Hospitable, even. They seem happy to talk about their traditions and history.
translations.chinese: 实际上，他们很随和，甚至相当好客。看上去他们很乐意讨论传统与历史。

translations.english: Surprised you've never heard of it.
translations.chinese: 你居然没听说过。

translations.english: People don't usually sail over there unless they have a particular reason. It can be a pretty rough place.
translations.chinese: 除非有特殊原因没人会去那儿，那地方条件很差。

translations.english: It's an island northeast of here. Has a small dark elf town called Raven Rock and a handful of Nords living in Skaal Village.
translations.chinese: 那是座岛，在这儿的东北方。岛上有个叫鸦石镇的暗精灵镇子，还有一群诺德人住在斯卡尔村。

translations.english: And I'm supposed to run my operation outside in a pile of ash? I don't think so.

translations.chinese: 找到了？

translations.english: You have no idea what this means to me... to my family. Reclamations bless you!
translations.chinese: 你不知道这对我……我的家族来说意味着什么。愿收复者们保佑你！

translations.english: Well, you've certainly proven your worth around here to me. Please, accept this gift as a token of my appreciation!
translations.chinese: 好吧，你已经向我证明了自己的价值。请收下这份礼物，聊表我的感激吧。

translations.english: Offer to help and then change your mind because I mentioned the reavers? Hmph, some sellsword you are.
translations.chinese: 你说要帮我，结果听到我说有抢匪就改变主意了？呵，你这佣兵不过如此啊。

translations.english: One of the sailors survived. Poor thing crawled all the way to Raven Rock on his hands and knees.
translations.chinese: 其中一个水手活下来了。那可怜虫一路爬到鸦石镇。

translations.english: Before he died, he told the Redoran Guard about the wreck and warned us that it was going to be crawling with reavers.
translations.chinese: 他死之前，把船难告诉了瑞多然卫兵，警告我们那边以后会爬满一堆抢匪。

translations.chinese: 那该死的船就在索瑟海姆海岸上搁浅了，你敢信？

translations.english: Yes, the "Strident Squall" or something like that.
translations.chinese: 是的，叫做“尖啸号”或者类似的名字。

translations.english: They sent it back to me recently, but it never arrived.
translations.chinese: 他们最近给我寄回来了，但是一直没有送达。

translations.english: A few months ago, I had sent an important folio to the First Edition Bookshop in the Imperial City to be rebound.
translations.chinese: 几个月前，我寄了一本重要的对开本给帝都的“初版书店”，请他们帮我重新装订。

translations.chinese: 瑞多然卫兵在山里看到一群狼人，霜月险崖的猎人也许还知道更多情况。

translations.chinese: 海岸最近很危险……到处都是抢匪。听说他们在找海贼王海科尼尔的宝藏。

translations.chinese: 斯卡尔村的铁匠好像失踪了，他们请我们帮忙注意一下。

translations.chinese: 听说疯老头儿克雷修斯又偷摸溜进鸦石镇矿场了。他这年纪，迟早会死在里面。

translations.english: Join you? You mean leave the village to journey with you and fight at your side?
translations.chinese: 和你同行？你是指让我离开村子和你并肩作战？

translations.english: I'm flattered, but the village is my home. It's very rare for one of the Skaal to leave, and I have responsibilities here.
translations.chinese: 我很荣幸，但斯卡尔村是我的家。很少有斯卡尔人会离开，何况我在这里有应尽的义务。

translations.chinese: 非常好。

translations.english: I also remind the Skaal to live as one with nature and to honor the will of the All-Maker, so that we'll be worthy to join him in death.
translations.chinese: 还要提醒斯卡尔人与自然和平共处，尊重造物主的意愿，这样死后才能与它合一。

translations.english: As shaman of Skaal Village, I serve as both a guide and a healer, as well as a keeper of traditions.
translations.chinese: 作为斯卡尔村的萨满，我既是向导又是医师，也是习俗的传承者。

translations.chinese: 我们斯卡尔与你不同。我们并不追求冒险，只想尊重传统安宁地过日子。希望你能理解。

translations.english: I am sorry, but I must refuse. I am grateful for your help, but my place is here, with my people.
translations.chinese: 抱歉，但是我得拒绝。我很感激你的帮助，但是我必须留在这儿，和族人在一起。

translations.english: And the book's power comes from the same dark source as that which corrupted the Wind Stone.
translations.chinese: 这书的力量与腐化风石的力量可以追溯到同一源头。

translations.english: Our traditions do not speak of them. But they and Miraak are connected. You read a Black Book, and saw him.
translations.chinese: 按我们的传统不会探讨它们。但它们与米拉克有联系。你读了一本黑暗经书后，就看到了他。

translations.english: But beware. You are now walking the same road as Miraak.
translations.chinese: 但要小心。你已经在步米拉克的后尘了。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Our traditions do not speak of them. But they and Miraak are connected. You read a Black Book, and saw him. | ZH: 按我们的传统不会探讨它们。但它们与米拉克有联系。你读了一本黑暗经书后，就看到了他。 | SID: 0020A2

translations.english: I was here alone then, and I find an assistant is absolutely essential for this kind of dirty, dangerous work.
translations.chinese: 原本我是一个人来的，但我发现还必须有一名助手来帮我干这些危险的脏活儿。

translations.english: He also is searching for them. In fact, he has already found one. He showed it to me when he came here.
translations.chinese: 因为他也在找它们，实际上已经找到一本了。他来这儿的时候给我看过。

translations.english: It was very like the one you found in Miraak's temple. A thing of dark magic, not of the All-Maker.
translations.chinese: 那本和你在米拉克神殿里找到的很像。属于黑暗魔法之物，而非源自造物主。

translations.english: But while the Tree Stone remains under Miraak's influence, the natural order remains out of balance.
translations.chinese: 但树石还在米拉克的控制下，自然秩序还没取得平衡。

translations.english: And all can be undone if Miraak exerts his will again. You must continue on your path, and gather the knowledge you need to defeat him.
translations.chinese: 如果米拉克再次施加他的意志，一切都将毁灭。你必须继续前行，收集打败他所需要的知识。

translations.english: I can feel it. The balance of the living land has nearly been restored.
translations.chinese: 我感觉得到。这片土地已经快要恢复平衡了。

translations.english: I've cleansed the other four Stones.
translations.chinese: 我已经净化了其他四座立石。

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: And all can be undone if Miraak exerts his will again. You must continue on your path, and gather the knowledge you need to defeat him. | ZH: 如果米拉克再次施加他的意志，一切都将毁灭。你必须继续前行，收集打败他所需要的知识。 | SID: 001FF9

- INFO:RNAM | EN: I've cleansed the other four Stones. | ZH: 我已经净化了其他四座立石。 | SID: 00206F

translations.english: But you may be able to cleanse the other Stones. Even if this does not stop Miraak, it surely will delay his return.
translations.chinese: 但也许你可以去净化其他圣石。就算这样做没法阻止米拉克，也能延缓他的回归。

translations.english: Frea saw that the Tree Stone now stands imprisoned in Miraak's new temple. I doubt you can free it until his power is broken.
translations.chinese: 芙瑞雅看到树石被困于米拉克的新神殿中。也不知你能不能在他的力量枯竭前解放它。

translations.english: Yes. There are six sacred Stones - Wind, Water, Earth, Beast, Sun, and Tree. Through them the Oneness of the land is maintained.
translations.chinese: 没错。共有六座圣石——风、水、地、兽、日和树。这片土地的一体性正是通过它们而维持的。

translations.english: Freeing the other Stones will diminish whatever dark influence is spreading across Solstheim.
translations.chinese: 解放其他的圣石可以减弱遍布索瑟海姆的黑暗控制力量。

translations.english: Your Shout broke whatever evil will controlled the Stone, and restored its true nature as a conduit of the All-Maker's gifts.
translations.chinese: 你的龙吼摧毁了控制圣石的不明邪恶力量，恢复了它真正的本质，即传递造物主赠予的媒介。

translations.english: The power of the Stone had been corrupted. It was the source of the influence that had taken control of the Skaal.
translations.chinese: 圣石的力量被腐化了。就是那股力量的影响控制了斯卡尔。

translations.english: She hasn't been in traveling condition for quite a while now. I've tried to let her go off on her own but she insists on staying here.
translations.chinese: 她的身体状况早就不适合旅行了。我试过把她放生，但她坚持待在这儿。

translations.english: This is Dusty. I personally trained her from a larva. Feels like a lifetime ago now.
translations.chinese: 这是小灰。在它还是幼虫时我就开始训练她，感觉有一辈子那么久了。

translations.english: We get by trading odds and ends with the locals. I've decided to stay here and make sure she passes in peace. It's the least I can do for her.

translations.english: Every once in a while a local makes it out here. Although, they usually just want to catch a glimpse of Dusty. Silt Striders are pretty rare now.
translations.chinese: 居民们偶尔会过来看看。但他们通常是为了看一眼小灰的。泥沙漫步者现在很稀有了。

translations.english: A Silt Strider carapace is so strong it can withstand the harshest of weather.
translations.chinese: 泥沙漫步者的外壳非常坚固，可以抵御最恶劣的天气。

translations.english: Mostly for transporting goods and people. They were pretty commonplace in Morrowind, but that was ages ago.
translations.chinese: 通常是运货和载人。以前在晨风很常见，但那是几百年前了。

translations.english: Even the legendary sandstorms of Vvardenfell's Molag Amur Region were said to barely make a dent in them. Of course, that's all ash now.
translations.chinese: 就连瓦登费尔的莫拉格·阿穆尔地区的著名沙尘暴，几乎都不能对它们造成伤害。当然，现在那里是一片灰烬了。

translations.english: Except for you. You are my last challenge. Only you can send me to Sovngarde with honor.
translations.chinese: 除了你，你就是我最后的挑战。只有你才能把我荣耀地送进松加德。

translations.english: No quests to be undertaken. No villains to be slain. No challenges to face.
translations.chinese: 没有任务可接。没有恶棍可杀。没有挑战可以面对。

translations.english: Make your preparations. When you are ready, come find me at my last vigil.
translations.chinese: 做好准备吧。好了以后去我的终末守灵处找我。

translations.english: I have done all that can be done. There is nothing left.
translations.chinese: 能做的事情我都做了。我失去目标了。

translations.chinese: 你让我感到暖心，外来者。我欠你一份人情。

translations.chinese: 告诉莫尔雯，我很乐意代劳。相信她在光界的父母会很高兴的。

translations.english: I'll be glad to oblige. What a touching gesture, to display the symbol of her devotion in such a way.
translations.chinese: 我很乐意效劳。多么感人的做法啊，以这种方式展现她的奉献。

translations.english: Ah yes, Bera's silver necklace. It was a wedding gift and she rarely took it off.
translations.chinese: 啊是的，贝拉的银项链。这是她几乎从不取下的结婚礼物。

translations.english: Morwen, you say? Now there's a name I haven't heard in a long time. Left to join her mother's people on Solstheim, as I recall.
translations.chinese: 你说莫尔雯？很久没听到过这个名字了。没记错的话，她离开这里去加入她母亲在索瑟海姆的族人了。

translations.english: Now, what can I do for young Morwen?
translations.chinese: 那么，我能为小莫尔雯做什么？

translations.english: I knew her parents quite well, you know. Bera and Ulfarr were good people, very much in love.
translations.chinese: 我跟她的父母很熟，知道吧。贝拉和乌尔法都是好人，恩爱得很。

translations.english: I don't have much to give in reward, but return to me when the task is done and I'll do what I can. Thank you, Skaal-friend.
translations.chinese: 我没什么能报答你的，但是完成任务后请回来找我，我一定尽我所能。谢谢你，斯卡尔之友。

translations.english: I believe she would want it placed upon her tombstone in Falkreath, as a symbol of her undying love and the great sacrifice she made for it.
translations.chinese: 她肯定也想把项链放在她佛克瑞斯的墓碑上，作为她永恒的爱和为此作出的巨大牺牲的象征。

translations.english: If you find yourself in Falkreath, please give this amulet to the priest Runil and tell him that I sent you. He will understand.
translations.chinese: 哪天你要是到了佛克瑞斯，请把这个护符交给鲁尼尔祭司，告诉他是我让你去的。他就懂了。

translations.english: I came across a few of my mother's old things not long ago. Among them was a necklace that my father gave to her when they were married.
translations.chinese: 我不久前翻到了一些母亲的遗物。其中有一条父亲在结婚时送给她的项链。

translations.chinese: 我的母亲爱上了其中一个水手，也就是我父亲。最终和他一起回天际了。

translations.chinese: 一艘天际来的商船在村子附近撞上了冰山，幸存的水手们被斯卡尔人收留了。

translations.english: It's Dunmer tradition for the ashes of the deceased to be placed in an ancestral tomb.
translations.chinese: 丹莫的传统就是让逝者的骨灰安放于祖坟中。

translations.english: Valin Ulen and his son's remains were both laid to rest there because that's what he'd requested.
translations.chinese: 瓦林·乌伦请求把他和儿子的骨灰合葬在这儿。

translations.english: The Ulen family being a part of House Hlaalu didn't matter.
translations.chinese: 乌伦家是不是哈拉鲁家的并不重要。

translations.english: When Valin died, his family provided the funds to construct the tomb.
translations.chinese: 瓦林死后，他家里出钱修了这个祖坟。

translations.english: Vilur Ulen wasn't the first Ulen to live in Raven Rock. His father, Valin Ulen, was one of the first Dunmer to settle here.
translations.chinese: 维勒·乌伦不是乌伦家在鸦石镇的第一代。他的父亲，是第一批在这里安家的丹莫。

translations.english: Unlike his son Vilur, Valin was a good man. He contributed to the community and was quite respected.
translations.chinese: 但是瓦林和他儿子不一样，他是个好人，为社区做了贡献，很受人尊敬。

translations.english: It would be fair to say that House Redoran literally saved the Dunmer people from destruction.
translations.chinese: 可以说，瑞多然家确实拯救了丹莫，免于灭族。

translations.english: When the Argonians invaded years later, House Redoran's army was able to prevent them from sweeping across all of Morrowind.
translations.chinese: 当数年后阿尔贡入侵，正是瑞多然家的军队阻止了他们横扫整个晨风。

translations.english: House Redoran took charge and was slowly able to build an army. It took years, but it became a force to be reckoned with.
translations.chinese: 瑞多然家接管了局面，慢慢组建起一支军队。花费了数年时间，使之成为了一股不容忽视的力量。

translations.english: During the Oblivion Crisis, gates to the plane of Oblivion opened all over Morrowind.
translations.chinese: 在湮灭危机期间，晨风遍地都开启了湮灭之门。

translations.english: The Empire pulled most of its forces out of Morrowind to deal with the gates in their own homeland, leaving us virtually defenseless.
translations.chinese: 帝国撤回了绝大部分的晨风驻军，去应对自己国土上的湮灭之门，几乎让我们毫无防御能力。

translations.english: We had no standing army at the time, just uncoordinated pockets of resistance.
translations.chinese: 当时我们没有正规军，只有缺少协调的小股抵抗军。

translations.english: I thought I remembered, but now I'm not sure. Is it important, or did I imagine that?
translations.chinese: 感觉明明记得，但现在又不确定了。也不知道它是真重要，还是我想多了？

translations.english: Can you tell me more about the shrine near town?
translations.chinese: 能告诉我关于镇子旁边祭坛的事儿吗？

translations.english: I am weary of living in this village. I want to do something with my life other than farm, fish and hunt deer.
translations.chinese: 我厌倦了住在这个村子里。这辈子除了干农活，打鱼和捕鹿我还想干点别的。

translations.english: That's right. I want to go out into the world and earn great glory. I want to hunt the deadliest creatures and claim vast riches.
translations.chinese: 没错。我想去外面的世界赢得荣耀，去猎杀最危险的猎物，夺取巨大的财富。

translations.english: I know it must be hard for an adventurer such as you to understand this, but we Skaal live very boring lives.
translations.chinese: 我知道你这个冒险家很难理解这点，但我们斯卡尔人的生活很无趣。

translations.english: Yes, perhaps you can convince him. I would be grateful if you would do this thing, outsider.
translations.chinese: 对，也许你能说服他。我会很感激的，外来者。

translations.english: You would do that? I know he would listen to you. You've been out there in the wide world. You know its perils.
translations.chinese: 你会吗？我知道他会听你的话。你见过世面，知道有多凶险。

translations.english: I've tried to tell him that the world beyond our lands is dangerous and cruel, but he won't listen.
translations.chinese: 我已经告诉他这方水土之外的世界是危险而残酷的，但他听不进去。

translations.english: His name is Nikulas. He's a good lad, strong and loyal. I only wish he wasn't so eager to leave the village.
translations.chinese: 他叫尼库拉斯，是个好小伙子，强壮而实诚。我只希望他别那么急着离开村子。

translations.english: You are?
translations.chinese: 你愿意？

translations.english: I admit, I was not expecting to hear that.
translations.chinese: 我得承认，没料到你会这么说。

Addon: Dragonborn

translations.english: I can see that in my eagerness for adventure, I have forgotten my duties as a son and as a Skaal.
translations.chinese: 我明白了，对冒险的渴望让我忘记了作为一个儿子和斯卡尔人的责任。

translations.english: You have helped me to see wisdom, and I thank you for that, Skaal-friend.
translations.chinese: 你让我有了新的领悟，谢谢你，斯卡尔之友。

translations.english: Well, I know there is some danger, of course, but I didn't think it would be that bad.
translations.chinese: 嗯，我明白会有危险，这是当然的，但没想到会那么糟。

translations.english: If the risk is truly so great, I will train with Wulf Wild-Blood and hone my skills. Perhaps in three or four winters, I will truly be ready.
translations.chinese: 要是真的那么危险，我会跟着“野血”沃弗磨练我的技巧。也许再过三四个冬季我就真的准备好了。

translations.english: There is no fear in my heart. My father's blood flows in my veins, and he was a mighty warrior. I will face any danger.
translations.chinese: 我心里没有恐惧。父亲的血在我体内流淌，他可是个强大的战士。我会直面任何危险。

translations.english: You have my oath that I will not leave the village until my mother is ready to let me go.
translations.chinese: 我答应你，在我妈没准备好放我走前不会离开村子。

translations.english: Yes, you're right. She still mourns for my father, and having me near brings her comfort.
translations.chinese: 嗯，你说得对。她还在哀悼我爸，我在身边能安慰她。

translations.english: I am grateful for your offer, outsider, but I am Skaal. All that I need, I was born with.
translations.chinese: 感谢你的给予，外来者。但我是个斯卡尔人，天生就有需要的一切。

translations.english: There is truth in your words. She has not been herself since my father's death.
translations.chinese: 你说的有道理。父亲过世后她就变了。

translations.english: I know that it would be difficult for her, at least for a time, but I am a man now. I have the right to choose what life I will.
translations.chinese: 我知道这对她而言会很困难，至少暂时如此，但我已经成年了。我有权决定自己的生活。

translations.english: I do not know this word Thalmor, but if you mean the elves, they were trying to learn the secrets of forging Stalhrim.

translations.english: Yes, I think you're just the adventurous sort I need. I have a job offer for you.
translations.chinese: 嗯，我认为你就是我需要的冒险家，有份工作给你。

translations.english: Modest as well as brave. Most admirable! I can see why the Skaal think highly of you.
translations.chinese: 谦逊而勇敢。太令人敬佩了！我明白为什么斯卡尔人对你评价很高了。

translations.english: There are some sealed doors up ahead. Perhaps you can figure out how to get them open.
translations.chinese: 前面有几道锁住的门。也许你能找到开门的方法。

translations.english: Remarkable, isn't it? This tomb has been hidden for... well, who knows how long. Many centuries, I would think.
translations.chinese: 很惊人，对吧？这座墓穴被埋藏了……嗯，天晓得有多久。几百年吧，我猜。

translations.english: Quite right! Quite right! This, however, is paying work. Allow me to explain.
translations.chinese: 没错，没错！这个，无论如何，我都会付钱的。请听我解释。

translations.english: I believe it was the ancient ancestors of the Skaal who built this tomb for their master, the Dragon Priest they called the guardian.
translations.chinese: 我认为是斯卡尔人的古代祖先为他们的主人建造了这座墓穴，也就是被称为守护者的龙祭司。

translations.english: Of course this is all just theory and conjecture. It is likely we will never know the truth.
translations.chinese: 当然，这些都只是理论和猜想。我们可能永远不会知道真相。

translations.english: I've been thinking about that, and I believe it does.
translations.chinese: 我想过这个问题，我觉得有。

translations.english: In all likelihood, these people were ancient Nords who came with the Dragon Priest to live here on Solstheim.
translations.chinese: 这些人很可能是跟随龙祭司来索瑟海姆定居的古诺德人。

translations.english: Separated from their people on the mainland, they developed a distinct culture that became the Skaal we know today.
translations.chinese: 他们与内陆的族人分离后，逐渐发展起了独特的文化，最终演变成我们今天所知的斯卡尔。

translations.english: After his defeat, Miraak was banished to Solstheim and the guardian was made his jailer.
translations.chinese: 在被击败后，米拉克被放逐到索瑟海姆，而这位守护者成了他的狱卒。

translations.english: Perhaps Miraak was also a Dragon Priest, probably a contemporary of this guardian. He must have turned against his own order.
translations.chinese: 也许米拉克也曾是位龙祭司，和这个守护者是同一时代的人。他肯定是背叛了自己的教义。

translations.english: It seems he was held in high regard by both men and dragons, because he defeated a traitor named Miraak.
translations.chinese: 看来人和龙都很尊敬他，因为他击败了一个叫米拉克的叛徒。

translations.english: This is clearly a tomb, if a rather elaborate one. I would guess it was built for a Dragon Priest who achieved great fame in his time.
translations.chinese: 这显然是座墓穴，而且还相当宏伟。我猜是为一位享誉盛名的龙祭司而建的。

translations.english: A good question. Partly to keep unwanted intruders away, I suppose.

translations.english: They might also have been meant as tests, to ensure that only the truly worthy can reach the main burial chamber.
translations.chinese: 或许也是某种试炼，为确保能进主墓室的人都不是等闲之辈。

translations.english: Who can say, really? The motives of the Dragon Priests are as inscrutable as those of the Dragons they worshipped.
translations.chinese: 但谁敢肯定呢？龙祭司们的意图和他们崇拜的龙一样难以理解。

translations.english: Unlike most of my fellow miners, I was too foolish to save enough coin for that day. The rest I spent on sujamma to drown my sorrows.
translations.chinese: 和其他矿工不一样，我没有存够钱。只能把剩下的拿去买酒消愁。

translations.english: Councilor Morvayn was kind enough to allow Rirns and I to live in one of the abandoned buildings. At least it keeps the ash out of our eyes.
translations.chinese: 莫尔凡议员好心让我和瑞恩斯住在一间废弃房屋里，至少眼睛不会吃灰了。

translations.english: I was one of the wealthiest miners in town... I could haul up almost three or four times what the average digger could.
translations.chinese: 我以前是镇子里最有钱的矿工……我挖的矿比别人多三到四倍。

translations.english: I never saw the end coming like it did... the mine running out of ebony.
translations.chinese: 从没想过事情会那样发展……黑檀矿脉居然枯竭了。

- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: Councilor Morvayn was kind enough to allow Rirns and I to live in one of the abandoned buildings. At least it keeps the ash out of our eyes. | ZH: 莫尔凡议员好心让我和瑞恩斯住在一间废弃房屋里，至少眼睛不会吃灰了。 | SID: 00266F

translations.english: I was one of the Redoran Guard under Captain Veleth's command.
translations.chinese: 以前我是维黎斯队长手下的瑞多然卫兵。

translations.english: Unfortunately, I'd left the other guardsman behind and he never made it. Captain Veleth discharged me from service.
translations.chinese: 不幸的是，另一个被我丢下的卫兵没能活下来。维黎斯队长就把我开除了。

translations.english: A few years ago, I was out on patrol with two other men when we were attacked by some ash spawn.
translations.chinese: 几年前我和几个同袍巡逻时，遭到灰烬怪袭击。

translations.english: They sprung from the ground with no warning and killed one of my companions instantly. I was so frightened, I ran all the way back to Raven Rock.
translations.chinese: 它们毫无预警地从地下跳出来，瞬间杀了我的一个同伴。我吓坏了，就一路跑回鸦石镇。

translations.english: There isn't a single night that passes where I don't regret what I did, but it's too late for that now.
translations.chinese: 我每天都为所作所为后悔不已，但是已经太迟了。

translations.english: Old Crescius has a nose for exactly where to dig. If they'd only listened to him years ago, the town wouldn't have been in such dire straits.
translations.chinese: 克雷修斯老头对于在哪儿开挖的嗅觉特别灵。要是大家几年前就听他的，镇上就不会陷入这种危急困境了。

translations.english: At this rate, I'll be able to put a roof over my head in just a few months.
translations.chinese: 照这个速度，我再过几个月就能把屋顶盖上了。

translations.english: Couldn't be better. The sections that are being opened up have revealed some huge deposits of ebony.
translations.chinese: 再好不过了。已经开放的区域能看到一些巨型黑檀矿脉。

translations.english: Bralsa's been nice enough to show me how to swing a pickaxe. She's an old hat when it comes to digging up ebony.
translations.chinese: 布拉尔萨在使用鹤嘴锄上教了我很多，她可是个挖黑檀矿的老手。

translations.english: I may not be an expert at it yet, but it's good to be back to work and have some coin in my pockets.
translations.chinese: 虽然我还不是个采矿行家，但能回到工作岗位，包里有钱总是件好事。

translations.english: With the mines open, Raven Rock has become a significant colony of the Dunmer people again.
translations.chinese: 矿场开张后，鸦石镇再次成为了丹莫人民的一个重要聚落。

translations.english: I've been able to convince my superiors at House Redoran to send me the resources they've been denying now that we're deemed more important.
translations.chinese: 我已经说服了瑞多然家的高层们把物资送来，之前他们一直拒绝，但现在我们受到重视了。

translations.english: Soon, we'll have a steady supply of workers and materials to keep things going for years to come.
translations.chinese: 很快，我们就有稳定的工人和材料供应，以维持未来几年的运转。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: With the mines open, Raven Rock has become a significant colony of the Dunmer people again. | ZH: 矿场开张后，鸦石镇再次成为了丹莫人民的一个重要聚落。 | SID: 0025F1
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I've been able to convince my superiors at House Redoran to send me the resources they've been denying now that we're deemed more important. | ZH: 我已经说服了瑞多然家的高层们把物资送来，之前他们一直拒绝，但现在我们受到重视了。 | SID: 00261D

translations.english: Things are picking up... for now.
translations.chinese: 情况正在好转……至少现在如此。

translations.english: All I'm wondering is how long it'll take for House Redoran to begin ignoring us again if the mine runs out of ore for a second time.
translations.chinese: 我纳闷的是，要是矿场又枯竭了，瑞多然家是不是又会无视我们。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

translations.english: It's good to get the old nose working again. I missed sniffing out the ebony deposits and getting my hands dirty.
translations.chinese: 我的嗅觉能再次派上用场还不赖，好怀念边闻着矿脉边抬矿的感觉。

translations.english: I've been made the foreman of the mine thanks to everything you did down there.
translations.chinese: 多亏了你在矿井下做的一切，我当上工头了。

translations.english: Best of all, Aphia isn't so cross when I go down there any more!
translations.chinese: 最安逸的是，现在我下矿阿菲娅再也不那么发火儿了！

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02034F89]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: It's good to get the old nose working again. I missed sniffing out the ebony deposits and getting my hands dirty. | ZH: 我的嗅觉能再次派上用场还不赖，好怀念边闻着矿脉边抬矿的感觉。 | SID: 00262E

translations.english: You might think it's all perfume and roses now that the mine's open, but all I see is a new security problem on our hands.
translations.chinese: 可能你觉得矿场开张后美好纷呈，但我却看到了一个新的安全隐患。

translations.english: Making sure those shipments of ebony make it safely from the mine to the shipping docks is my new order of the day.
translations.chinese: 确保那些黑檀矿从矿场安全运到码头是我新的日常任务。

translations.english: And with Solstheim crawling with reavers and Azura-knows what else, I can't risk any attacks on Raven Rock.
translations.chinese: 而且索瑟海姆到处爬满了抢匪，鬼晓得还有什么东西，我不能让鸦石镇冒着被袭击的风险。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: You might think it's all perfume and roses now that the mine's open, but all I see is a new security problem on our hands. | ZH: 可能你觉得矿场开张后美好纷呈，但我却看到了一个新的安全隐患。 | SID: 002668
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Making sure those shipments of ebony make it safely from the mine to the shipping docks is my new order of the day. | ZH: 确保那些黑檀矿从矿场安全运到码头是我新的日常任务。 | SID: 0026C0
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: And with Solstheim crawling with reavers and Azura-knows what else, I can't risk any attacks on Raven Rock. | ZH: 而且索瑟海姆到处爬满了抢匪，鬼晓得还有什么东西，我不能让鸦石镇冒着被袭击的风险。 | SID: 0026C6

translations.english: How do you think? It's a blessing.
translations.chinese: 你觉得呢？当然是好事儿啊。

translations.english: I've got regular paying customers again, thirsty workers at the end of the day, and more coin than I can count.
translations.chinese: 我又有了稳定的回头客了，他们是辛苦一天后饥渴难耐的工人们，我的钱都数不过来了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02034F8B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: How do you think? It's a blessing. | ZH: 你觉得呢？当然是好事儿啊。 | SID: 002686
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I've got regular paying customers again, thirsty workers at the end of the day, and more coin than I can count. | ZH: 我又有了稳定的回头客了，他们是辛苦一天后饥渴难耐的工人们，我的钱都数不过来了。 | SID: 0026C3

translations.english: However, I've seen the smile on people's faces and there's hope around here once again... something we've been lacking for a long time.
translations.chinese: 但是，我看到了人们脸上的笑容，这里又有希望了……这是我们长久以来缺乏的东西……

translations.english: I've always had a steady stream of work thanks to the Redoran Guard, so it hasn't affected me much.
translations.chinese: 多亏了瑞多然卫兵，我一直都有源源不断的活儿干，所以对我来说变化不大。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02034F8C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: However, I've seen the smile on people's faces and there's hope around here once again... something we've been lacking for a long time. | ZH: 但是，我看到了人们脸上的笑容，这里又有希望了……这是我们长久以来缺乏的东西…… | SID: 0025F0
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I've always had a steady stream of work thanks to the Redoran Guard, so it hasn't affected me much. | ZH: 多亏了瑞多然卫兵，我一直都有源源不断的活儿干，所以对我来说变化不大。 | SID: 00260C

translations.english: I've had to muster some more men to protect the mine, but I don't really have a problem with that.
translations.chinese: 我不得不召集更多人手来保护矿场，但我真的不介意。

translations.english: I say let them try. My men are ready for them.
translations.chinese: 我说让他们放马过来。我的手下准备好迎接了。

translations.english: Second Councilor Arano is concerned that once word reaches the reavers that the mine has reopened, they might think about paying us a visit.
translations.chinese: 副议员阿拉诺担心一旦矿场重新开张的消息传到抢匪耳朵里，他们可能会上门拜访。

agentText:

translations.english: The, uh... the lab is too small. Also, I need the ashy soil.

translations.english: Master Neloth has tasked Elynea with repairing the tower.

translations.english: It's not a fate I would wish on anyone. And not what I wanted for my brother.
translations.chinese: 我不希望任何人落得如此下场，更不希望我兄弟如此。

translations.english: We seek to live in peace with the land, but he had an eye for dominance and strength.
translations.chinese: 我们追求与这方水土和平共处，但是他的眼中只有征服和蛮力。

translations.english: For unnatural strength, you need look no further than the beasts of this island, mangled by the daedra.
translations.chinese: 想了解那些非自然的力量的话，你只消看看这岛上的被迪德拉腐化的野兽。

translations.english: He never felt the call of the All-Maker as I do. As we all should.
translations.chinese: 他从没像我们大家那样，感受到造物主的召唤。

translations.english: I'm just having trouble deciphering Master Neloth's handwriting.
translations.chinese: 我没法辨认内洛斯大师的笔迹。

translations.english: I don't mean to be rude, but I need to concentrate.
translations.chinese: 无意冒犯，但我现在需要专心。

translations.english: Yes. I'm trying to summon an Ash Guardian.
translations.chinese: 对。我在尝试召唤灰烬守卫。

translations.english: Another border...no, aetheric order. I think that's right.
translations.chinese: 另一种界限……不，光界秩序。这样应该没错。

translations.english: Two fingers pronated...what's pronated? Oh. Rotated. That might work.
translations.chinese: 两根手指外翻……啥是外翻？哦，旋转。应该有用了。

translations.english: Tart bones? That doesn't even make sense. I'll just ignore that part.
translations.chinese: 酸骨头？完全看不懂啊。我直接忽略这段吧。

translations.english: I fear there is too much we do not yet know.
translations.chinese: 恐怕我们不知道的还多着呢。

Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02035673]

translations.english: But how is that possible? After all this time...
translations.chinese: 但怎么可能呢？过了这么久了……

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02035674]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: But how is that possible? After all this time... | ZH: 但怎么可能呢？过了这么久了…… | SID: 0026F6

translations.english: Something feels wrong. Brace yourself!
translations.chinese: 我感觉有些不对劲，打起精神来！

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02035A05]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Something feels wrong. Brace yourself! | ZH: 我感觉有些不对劲，打起精神来！ | SID: 0026E0

translations.english: It is no wonder the dragons razed his temple to the ground. Seeing the remains hung up like trophies must have enraged them to no end.
translations.chinese: 难怪龙族会把他的神殿夷为平地，看到这些尸骸像战利品一样吊起来肯定让它们怒不可遏。

agentText:

translations.english: I had heard Miraak had turned against the Dragon Cult, but to display the remains in such a manner as this...
translations.chinese: 我曾听说过米拉克背叛了拜龙教，但像这样把尸骨展出在大厅里……

translations.english: It is eerily quiet. I do not suspect that will be the case the further we go. Be on your guard.
translations.chinese: 安静的令人发毛，我想要找的东西应该没多远了，保持戒备。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

translations.english: It looks like there is only one way to proceed.
translations.chinese: 看来只有一条路可选。

translations.english: I leave the honor of pulling that handle to you. I do not want to put my hand anywhere near the mouth of that statue.
translations.chinese: 拉那个把手的荣耀给你了，我一点儿都不想摸那雕像的嘴巴附近。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

translations.english: I do not like this place. It almost looks as if these statues will come to life at any moment.
translations.chinese: 不喜欢这个地方，这些雕像就像随时会活过来一样。

translations.english: I do not recognize this statuary. We passed by a few of them earlier, but they are becoming more frequent as we get further in.
translations.chinese: 我认不出来这些雕像是啥，我们之前路过了几个，但是越往里走它们出现的越频繁。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I do not recognize this statuary. We passed by a few of them earlier, but they are becoming more frequent as we get further in. | ZH: 我认不出来这些雕像是啥，我们之前路过了几个，但是越往里走它们出现的越频繁。 | SID: 00270A

translations.english: Nothing but ruined books.
translations.chinese: 都是些毁了的书。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02035A0B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Nothing but ruined books. | ZH: 都是些毁了的书。 | SID: 002708

translations.english: I wonder if there is something here that tells the story of Miraak...
translations.chinese: 我想知道这儿有没有讲米拉克传说的东西……

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02035A0C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I wonder if there is something here that tells the story of Miraak... | ZH: 我想知道这儿有没有讲米拉克传说的东西…… | SID: 002710

translations.english: I sense his favor on you. For you... I will part with them, if you can pay my price.
translations.chinese: 我感觉到他对你的眷顾。是你的话……只要价钱到位，我就愿意割爱。

translations.english: There is one more thing... Since the days of the Great Hunt, our pack has kept a set of rings, blessed by Lord Hircine himself.
translations.chinese: 但是有一样东西……自从大狩猎以来，我们留下了一套戒指，是由海尔辛大人亲自赐福过的。

translations.english: Meat. Furs. Bone. Trophies of the hunt. But those are of little use to you.
translations.chinese: 肉、毛皮、骨头，都是我们狩猎的战利品。对你没什么用。

translations.english: Do you have anything to trade?
translations.chinese: 有什么要交易的吗？

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02035AED]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I sense his favor on you. For you... I will part with them, if you can pay my price. | ZH: 我感觉到他对你的眷顾。是你的话……只要价钱到位，我就愿意割爱。 | SID: 002768
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: There is one more thing... Since the days of the Great Hunt, our pack has kept a set of rings, blessed by Lord Hircine himself. | ZH: 但是有一样东西……自从大狩猎以来，我们留下了一套戒指，是由海尔辛大人亲自赐福过的。 | SID: 00277A
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Meat. Furs. Bone. Trophies of the hunt. But those are of little use to you. | ZH: 肉、毛皮、骨头，都是我们狩猎的战利品。对你没什么用。 | SID: 00277E
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Do you have anything to trade? | ZH: 有什么要交易的吗？ | SID: 00275B

translations.english: Since I was born. My parents were members of the pack, back when Majni's father was Alpha.
translations.chinese: 自我出生以来，我父母就是这个狼群的一份子，那会儿头狼还是马吉尼的父亲。

translations.english: After they died, Majni and Akar took care of me, taught me to hunt. I'm not as good as they are, but... I do my best.
translations.chinese: 他们去世后，是马吉尼和阿喀尔照顾我，教我怎么狩猎。我不像他们那么厉害，但……已经尽力了。

translations.english: Do you live out here?
translations.chinese: 你要在这儿过一辈子吗？

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02035AEE]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: After they died, Majni and Akar took care of me, taught me to hunt. I'm not as good as they are, but... I do my best. | ZH: 他们去世后，是马吉尼和阿喀尔照顾我，教我怎么狩猎。我不像他们那么厉害，但……已经尽力了。 | SID: 002781
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Do you live out here? | ZH: 你要在这儿过一辈子吗？ | SID: 002757

translations.english: Hold, traveler. You have no business here.
translations.chinese: 站住，旅行者。这儿没你的事。

translations.english: You might find a few others. Strays. Lone hunters. But ours is the last true pack that remains.
translations.chinese: 你可能找得到其他流浪的孤独猎人。但我们是真正仅剩的狼群了。

translations.english: Are there other werewolves on Solstheim?
translations.chinese: 索瑟海姆岛上还有其他狼人吗？

translations.english: Deer. Sabers. Rieks. Boar. Bear.
translations.chinese: 鹿、刀猫、瑞克灵、野猪还有熊。

translations.english: I hunt soon. Go bother Majni.
translations.chinese: 我要去打猎了，找马吉尼去吧。

translations.english: You hunt? What do you hunt?
translations.chinese: 你会狩猎？都捕猎些什么？

translations.chinese: 站住，旅行者。这儿没你的事，快走。

translations.english: ...Wait. You... you're one of us, aren't you? A werewolf?
translations.chinese: ……等等，你……是我们的同类，对吧？你也是狼人？

translations.english: Last warning.
translations.chinese: 最后一次警告了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02035AF3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Last warning. | ZH: 最后一次警告了。 | SID: 002742

translations.english: You know it well. The speed and strength of the beast. The thrill of the hunt. The triumph of the kill. This is our purpose, our way of life.
translations.chinese: 你自己也清楚吧，野兽的速度与力量，狩猎的快感，杀戮的成就感。这就是我们的追求和生活方式。

translations.english: So it was for my father, and his father before him. And I welcome any who walk that path.
translations.chinese: 我们的父辈都选择了这样的生活，也欢迎任何选择这条路的人。

translations.english: Aye. The blood still runs true among some on Solstheim, as it has for centuries. We have chosen to embrace Lord Hircine's blessing.
translations.chinese: 没错。几百年来这种血液依然在索瑟海姆岛上流传。我们选择拥抱海尔辛大人的赐福。

translations.english: Are you all werewolves?
translations.chinese: 你们都是狼人吗？

translations.chinese: 我是马吉尼，霜月狼群的首领。我们欢迎你留下来，只要遵守这儿的规矩。

translations.chinese: 欢迎你，兄弟。我们很久没见过流着相同血液的人了。

translations.chinese: 阿喀尔，马吉尼的兄弟。

translations.english: I hunt. He talks. Go talk to him.
translations.chinese: 我负责打猎，他负责沟通。你找他谈。

translations.english: Who are you?
translations.chinese: 你是谁？

translations.english: Majni offered to help me reclaim my territory. I hunt with him until then. After that... we'll see.
translations.chinese: 马吉尼答应帮我夺回领地，那之后我就先跟着他一起狩猎。至于以后……走着瞧吧。

translations.english: For now. My pack lived in the mountains northeast of here, 'till they were wiped out. Damn werebears.
translations.chinese: 现在是的。我原本属于东北边儿那个山上的狼群，后来他们被干掉了。该死的熊人。

translations.english: Are you part of this pack, too?
translations.chinese: 你也是这个狼群的一份子，对吧？

agentText:

translations.english: No, I'd rather be here. Free to hunt, free to live my life as I choose.
translations.chinese: 不，我宁可留在这儿。自由地打猎，自由地生活。

translations.english: Why? Have you seen how they live? They cower behind their walls, afraid of every ash hopper, every netch!
translations.chinese: 为什么？你见过他们怎么过日子的吗？躲在墙后，无论是灰烬跳虫还是气母都能吓着他们！

translations.english: Have you ever thought about moving to a city?
translations.chinese: 你有想过到城市里住吗？

translations.english: I don't trust you, whelp. Keep that in mind.
translations.chinese: 给我记住，小狗，我信不过你。

translations.english: Then perhaps you do have business here... Forgive me. I'm Rakel, of the Frostmoon Pack. Welcome, brother.
translations.chinese: 那么你在这儿确实不是外人……原谅我。我是霜月狼群的拉克尔。欢迎你，兄弟。

translations.english: That is our name for him - the Demon of Knowledge. He has always been our enemy.
translations.chinese: 那就是我们给他的名字——知识的恶魔。他一直都是我们的敌人。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02035BC8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: That is our name for him - the Demon of Knowledge. He has always been our enemy. | ZH: 那就是我们给他的名字——知识的恶魔。他一直都是我们的敌人。 | SID: 0027B6

translations.english: The very fact that the Skaal have kept knowledge from him has merely increased his desire to have it.
translations.chinese: 斯卡尔人决不对他公开秘密，这只会加深他的掠夺欲望。

translations.english: We know him as Herma-Mora, the Demon of Knowledge. It is in his nature to hoard secrets to himself. Their value to him is of no consequence.
translations.chinese: 我们称他为赫玛-莫拉，知识的恶魔。他的天性就是聚藏秘密，秘密的价值对他来说无关紧要。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: We know him as Herma-Mora, the Demon of Knowledge. It is in his nature to hoard secrets to himself. Their value to him is of no consequence. | ZH: 我们称他为赫玛-莫拉，知识的恶魔。他的天性就是聚藏秘密，秘密的价值对他来说无关紧要。 | SID: 0027D3

translations.english: It may. It should. And I will think on what you ask of me, to decide if it is necessary, or just another of Herma-Mora's tricks.
translations.chinese: 应该有用。我也会认真考虑你要我做的到底是势在必行，还是赫玛-莫拉的另一个诡计。

agentText:

translations.english: The land is out of balance. Miraak's power still corrupts the sacred Stones.
translations.chinese: 这片土地失去了平衡。米拉克的力量依旧腐化着圣石。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02035BCB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The land is out of balance. Miraak's power still corrupts the sacred Stones. | ZH: 这片土地失去了平衡。米拉克的力量依旧腐化着圣石。 | SID: 0027AC

translations.english: But he is subtler than most of the other Daedric Princes, as you would expect of the prince of knowledge and fate.
translations.chinese: 但是他比其他的迪德拉君王更狡猾，正合你对知识与命运之主的期待。

translations.english: You seem to have escaped the fate of many who find themselves ensnared forever by the lure of his secrets. Or... perhaps not.
translations.chinese: 看来你逃脱了那个命运，很多人被他的秘密所诱惑而永远地掉入了陷阱。或者……你还没有逃脱。

translations.english: Have you? The actual Oghma Infinium? That's... I've searched for it myself for many years without success...
translations.chinese: 是吗？真正的无限智典？那是……我花了很多年来找它，却一筹莫展……

translations.english: Well then, you should know better than anyone that Hermaeus Mora is not to be trifled with.
translations.chinese: 好吧，那你应该比任何人都清楚赫麦尤斯·莫拉是不容小觑的。

translations.english: I've dealt with Hermaeus Mora before. I've read the Oghma Infinium.
translations.chinese: 我跟赫麦尤斯·莫拉交易过，我读了无限智典。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02035BCC]
Translations:

translations.english: With Miraak's corruption of the Stones... the Oneness of the land is disrupted, and our connection to the All-Maker is broken.

translations.english: So it falls to me to be the one to give up the secrets to our ancient enemy. I do not know if I have the strength to face him.
translations.chinese: 看来，我就是那个向宿敌交出秘密的人。不知道我的力量是否足以面对他。

translations.chinese: 我希望能给你与我心中快乐同等的回报，但你已有太多，我没什么好东西给你了。

translations.english: Nikulas is all that I have left in this world. I know it is selfish of me to say so, but I cannot lose him. Not while I still grieve.
translations.chinese: 我在这世上只有尼库拉斯了。我知道这么说很自私，但是我不能没有他。至少在这悲痛时刻。

translations.english: Perhaps someday I will have to, but for now I need Nikulas here. You see, his father, my husband, was recently lost to us.
translations.chinese: 可能将来某天我必须放手，但是现在我需要尼库拉斯留在这儿。你看，他父亲，也就是我丈夫最近才离我们而去了。

translations.english: Also, I know his heart. Nikulas is reckless and foolish, like most young men. He cannot understand what awaits him in the wide world.
translations.chinese: 而且，我懂他的心性。尼库拉斯跟所有年轻人一样莽撞而愚笨。他不知道外面的世界有什么在等着他。

translations.english: Oh, that's the stuff all right. You're a good friend to Thirsk, and to me. I thank you.
translations.chinese: 哦，就是这个。你是瑟斯科还有我的好朋友。谢了。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02038EBB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh, that's the stuff all right. You're a good friend to Thirsk, and to me. I thank you. | ZH: 哦，就是这个。你是瑟斯科还有我的好朋友。谢了。 | SID: 002A55

translations.english: If you could... somehow... get up there and grab a bottle, I'd be a long way towards forgetting how miserable it is down here.
translations.chinese: 如果你能……不管怎样……上去拿一瓶下来，我很快就会忘记这下面有多惨。

translations.english: Well, the easy answer, of course. Mead!
translations.chinese: 嗯，很简单，当然是蜜酒了！

translations.english: Actually, now that I think of it, I have been missing the Ashfire. It's a special brew that we make at Thirsk.
translations.chinese: 其实，说到这个，我真的很怀念灰焰蜜酒。那是我们以前在瑟斯科酿的特殊口味。

Addon: Dragonborn

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: If you could... somehow... get up there and grab a bottle, I'd be a long way towards forgetting how miserable it is down here. | ZH: 如果你能……不管怎样……上去拿一瓶下来，我很快就会忘记这下面有多惨。 | SID: 002A1D
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Well, the easy answer, of course. Mead! | ZH: 嗯，很简单，当然是蜜酒了！ | SID: 002A5D

translations.english: Oh, perfect. Just the right ripeness, too. Good work, friend.
translations.chinese: 哦，太好了。熟度也恰到好处。干得好，朋友。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02038EBD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh, perfect. Just the right ripeness, too. Good work, friend. | ZH: 哦，太好了。熟度也恰到好处。干得好，朋友。 | SID: 002A49

translations.english: You can't find them on Solstheim, but if you find yourself back in Skyrim, I wouldn't mind you bringing some juniper berries.
translations.chinese: 调料在索瑟海姆岛上找不到，但可以回天际去找找。希望你能帮我带些刺柏浆果回来。

translations.english: They add a different kind of sweetness. Tart. Makes the flavor more round.
translations.chinese: 它们能添加一种不一样的甜酸味。能让口感变得更润。

translations.english: One is just ready to take its turn, though, and it's about time to add some of the flavorings.
translations.chinese: 但有一桶快好了，是时候加些调料了。

translations.english: We lost most of the batches we had brewing when... before those things were here.
translations.chinese: 我们失去了大部分快酿好的酒……在那些东西来之前。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn
EDID: [02038EBE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: You can't find them on Solstheim, but if you find yourself back in Skyrim, I wouldn't mind you bringing some juniper berries. | ZH: 调料在索瑟海姆岛上找不到，但可以回天际去找找。希望你能帮我带些刺柏浆果回来。 | SID: 002A80
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: They add a different kind of sweetness. Tart. Makes the flavor more round. | ZH: 它们能添加一种不一样的甜酸味。能让口感变得更润。 | SID: 002A84
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: One is just ready to take its turn, though, and it's about time to add some of the flavorings. | ZH: 但有一桶快好了，是时候加些调料了。 | SID: 002A85
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: We lost most of the batches we had brewing when... before those things were here. | ZH: 我们失去了大部分快酿好的酒……在那些东西来之前。 | SID: 002A88

translations.english: The only problem is, I'm going to need a lot of spears. A lot. So, if you could find a bunch of them for me, that would make it easier on me.
translations.chinese: 唯一的问题是，我需要很多根长矛，非常多。所以，你要是能帮我找来一大堆，我就省了很多麻烦。

translations.english: I want to ring the whole hall with their little spears. Mocking us, from the past. Making us work harder. Fight better.
translations.chinese: 我要用它们那些小长矛来警醒整个大厅。用过往来嘲讽我们。使我们干活更努力，战斗更拼命。

translations.english: I want to make a reminder. So we never forget what happened the last time we got soft.
translations.chinese: 我想做个提示物，这样我们就永远不会忘记上次变软弱后发生了什么。

translations.english: To tell you the truth, I've been a little distracted. I've got this... idea.
translations.chinese: 说实话，我有点烦了。我想到了一个……主意。

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: The only problem is, I'm going to need a lot of spears. A lot. So, if you could find a bunch of them for me, that would make it easier on me. | ZH: 唯一的问题是，我需要很多根长矛，非常多。所以，你要是能帮我找来一大堆，我就省了很多麻烦。 | SID: 002A6A
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: I want to ring the whole hall with their little spears. Mocking us, from the past. Making us work harder. Fight better. | ZH: 我要用它们那些小长矛来警醒整个大厅。用过往来嘲讽我们。使我们干活更努力，战斗更拼命。 | SID: 002A6B
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: I want to make a reminder. So we never forget what happened the last time we got soft. | ZH: 我想做个提示物，这样我们就永远不会忘记上次变软弱后发生了什么。 | SID: 002A6C
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: To tell you the truth, I've been a little distracted. I've got this... idea. | ZH: 说实话，我有点烦了。我想到了一个……主意。 | SID: 002A74

translations.english: You come back if you ever want some fancier armor yourself, now.
translations.chinese: 如果你想要更漂亮的护甲，随时来找我。

translations.english: Just in time, too. Kuvar was starting to give me some grief about his new armor. This will do the trick nicely.
translations.chinese: 正是时候。库瓦尔才跟我抱怨他的新护甲呢。这样就没问题了。

agentText:

translations.english: And I can't forge air.
translations.chinese: 我也没法锻造空气。

translations.english: Cleaning out the forge was the easy part. But those blasted rieklings made off with most of my materials.
translations.chinese: 清理锻炉是最容易的部分，但是那些该死的瑞克灵把我大多数的材料都顺走了。

translations.english: You tend to wander around, don't you? If you come across any stalhrim or ebony in your travels, bring them back to old Halbarn. Help each other out.
translations.chinese: 你正要去周围转转，是吧？要是你在旅途中遇到了魔冰或者黑檀，就把他们带给老哈尔巴恩。就当是助人为乐吧。

translations.chinese: 还有别的事吗？

translations.english: What did you need?
translations.chinese: 你需要什么？

translations.english: I don't care how much you're paying me, there's no way I'm doing that.
translations.chinese: 不管你开价多少，我都不会这么干。

agentText:

translations.english: They left the town a shambles... but when House Redoran took over, we turned it around and it became ours.
translations.chinese: 他们遗留的镇子简直是废墟，瑞多然家接管后，大肆翻修后就成了我们的。

translations.english: Raven Rock started out as an Imperial settlement, but the Empire decided to abandon it just as my people were first setting foot here.
translations.chinese: 鸦石镇一开始是个帝国人聚落，但后来帝国决定放弃这里，就在我族人民刚踏足时。

translations.english: And even if it's been a struggle to make this island livable, we're proud to call it home.
translations.chinese: 尽管在岛上讨生活很难，我们仍然可以骄傲说这里是我们的家。

translations.english: When it comes to being chieftain, she is like a wolf with her jaws clamped tight upon a fresh kill.
translations.chinese: 谈到首领的位子时，她就像匹紧咬着猎物不放的狼。

translations.english: But that's alright. The Skaal need a shaman and I know that is my place.
translations.chinese: 但是没关系。斯卡尔人需要一个萨满，我知道这是我的职责。

translations.english: Hah! Not if Fanari has anything to say about it.
translations.chinese: 哈！法娜丽可不这么想。

translations.english: It is not right that I should say this, because I must honor my father's wishes, but this is a path I never chose.
translations.chinese: 或许我不该这么说，因为我得遵从父亲的遗愿，但是这条路从来就不是我自己选的。

translations.english: I always thought that I would be a great hunter, or even the village chieftain.
translations.chinese: 我一直认为我会是个好猎人，甚至成为村子首领。

translations.english: He was a great man and a good leader. I miss him dearly.
translations.chinese: 他是个很好的人，也是个好首领。我很想他。

translations.english: It was Skaf the Giant, our former chieftan, who taught me the ways of battle.
translations.chinese: 是“巨人”斯卡夫，我们的上任首领，他教导我战斗的方式。

translations.english: He was a great bear of a man, and a fearsome warrior. I used to be terrified of him when I was a little girl.
translations.chinese: 他是个巨熊般的男人，一个令人心生恐惧的战士。小时候我很怕他。

translations.english: I was a restless and angry child, and Skaf taught me swordplay so that I could, as he used to say, "put that fire to good use."
translations.chinese: 以前我是个好动且脾气暴躁的小孩儿，所以斯卡夫就教我剑术，他说这是“物尽其用”。

translations.english: I have been preparing for it all my life. There is no question that I'm ready, but...
translations.chinese: 我已经为这天准备了一辈子。当然准备好了，但是……

translations.english: Life never truly ends. Death is just a passage from one form to the next.
translations.chinese: 生命永远不会真正的结束。死亡只是从一段到另一段的过程。

translations.english: We Skaal do not fear death. We know we will return to the All-Maker and be born anew.
translations.chinese: 斯卡尔人不惧死亡。我们知道我们会回归造物主的怀抱然后重获新生。

translations.english: We are bound to this land, like a great pine with roots that run as deep as the tree is tall.
translations.chinese: 我们和这片土地紧密相连，就像一颗巨松那样根深蒂固。

translations.english: I know it must seem strange to you, but for us, the thought of leaving our village is equally strange.
translations.chinese: 我知道这对你看来很奇怪，但是对我们来说，离开村子的念头也很奇怪。

translations.english: The land and the Skaal are one. There is no other way to say it.
translations.chinese: 斯卡尔与这片土地一体同心。没有别的说法了。

translations.english: My heart is still heavy with the loss of my father.
translations.chinese: 父亲逝世仍使我感到心情沉重。

translations.chinese: 我们接下来去哪儿？

translations.chinese: 不管路通往何方，我的心总是向着家。

translations.english: Is it good to see more of the world, for wisdom is the child of experience.
translations.chinese: 多看看这个世界也好，毕竟智慧来源于经验。

translations.english: Your fearlessness never ceases to impress me.
translations.chinese: 你的无畏令我惊叹。

agentText:

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Your fearlessness never ceases to impress me. | ZH: 你的无畏令我惊叹。 | SID: 002B4D

translations.english: You face danger without hesitation.
translations.chinese: 面对危险，你毫不犹豫。

agentText:
Addon: Dragonborn

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You face danger without hesitation. | ZH: 面对危险，你毫不犹豫。 | SID: 002B22

translations.english: She was caught in a terrible snowstorm while returning home from gathering firewood.
translations.chinese: 在收集柴火回来的路上，她被一场可怕的暴风雪吞噬了。

translations.english: She died when I was very young.
translations.chinese: 她在我很小时去世了。

translations.english: Between the wolves, the weather and the threats in the south, even a simple task like gathering wood for the fire can turn deadly in an instant.
translations.chinese: 除了狼群、天气还有南边儿来的威胁，即使是像收集柴火这样的小事儿也可能让人突然离世。

translations.english: You must understand that, for the Skaal, life is a constant hardship. We take nothing for granted. We cannot afford to.
translations.chinese: 你得理解这点，对斯卡尔人来说，生命面临着不断的挑战。我们不会认为任何事情是理所当然的，我们付不起这样的代价。

translations.english: That's definitely safer. I'm not sure I'll risk summoning an Ash Guardian again myself. Too easy to forget about the heart stone!
translations.chinese: 那确实更安全。我不确定还会不会冒风险召唤灰烬守卫了。一不小心就会把心石忘了！

translations.chinese: 好吧。但是记住，不要在没有心石的时候召唤！否则灰烬守卫会攻击任何人，包括你。

translations.chinese: 求你了，你一定得帮我。内洛斯大师既没有耐心也没有同理心。完全没有。

translations.english: That's right. Don't be like me and have to learn the hard way. Here's the spell tome, and a heart stone so you can try it safely.
translations.chinese: 没错。别像我这样学教训。这本法术书给你，还有一颗心石，这样你可以放心试一试。

translations.english: Um. Well, he is a very great wizard. It's a great honor for him to have taken me as his apprentice.
translations.chinese: 嗯。其实，他是个很伟大的法师，收我当学徒是我的荣幸。

translations.english: To be honest, it's horrible. He's very unpleasant and hardly teaches me anything. Sometimes he uses me in his experiments.
translations.chinese: 但是老实说，糟透了。他很难相处，几乎没教我什么。有时还拿我做实验。

translations.english: Even so, I pick up a lot from just watching him.
translations.chinese: 尽管如此，我单看着他还是学到了很多。

translations.english: At that moment, I knew I'd never see him again. No amount of money would ever be worth that kind of death.
translations.chinese: 那会儿我就知道再也见不到他了。给再多的钱也不值得那样送死。

translations.english: Until we ended up tracking him to one of the largest bandit encampments I'd ever seen.
translations.chinese: 直到我们追踪到了一个强盗营地，是我这辈子见过的最大之一。

translations.english: My patron took one look at me, and made the most menacing grin I'd ever seen.
translations.chinese: 我的雇主看了我一眼，脸上露出最凶狠的狞笑。

translations.english: Any questions?
translations.chinese: 还有问题吗？

translations.english: Just remember, Raven Rock is sovereign territory of House Redoran. This is Morrowind, not Skyrim. While you're here you will be expected to abide by our laws.
translations.chinese: 记住了，鸦石镇是瑞多然家的主权领土。这里是晨风，不是天际。在这里必须遵从我们的法律。

translations.english: Well, my boss wasn't about to let him get away, so we pursued... on foot, for three days.
translations.chinese: 我老板不打算放过他，所以我们就追上去了……徒步追了整整三天。

translations.english: Anyway, we'd just cleared a ruined fort somewhere outside of Whiterun and when we got outside, we saw one of them galloping away on horseback.
translations.chinese: 总之，我们刚清理完白漫城外的一个废弃堡垒。出来时看见其中一个人骑马飞奔而去。

translations.english: Simple... he paid well. Very well.
translations.chinese: 很简单……他开价很高，非常之高。

translations.english: Long story, but I don't see the harm in sharing it with you.
translations.chinese: 说来话长，不过分享给你也没什么坏处。

translations.english: He had an insatiable bloodlust and was extremely stubborn... one of the toughest employers I've ever had.
translations.chinese: 他嗜血成性，而且顽固到了极点……是我遇到的最难相处的雇主之一。

translations.english: My last patron was a true Nord. He was dressed in animal skins, had tattoos on his face... a real traditional type, if you know what I mean.
translations.chinese: 我的上一个雇主是个真正的诺德人。身披兽皮，脸上刺青……非常的传统，这么说你应该懂吧。

translations.english: Now, we're barely holding on out here. Without the mine, Raven Rock doesn't feel like it can last much longer.
translations.chinese: 现在我们只是在苦苦撑着，少了矿脉，鸦石镇应该撑不了多久了。

translations.chinese: 多亏你把它带来，我也不知道该怎么表达感谢。

translations.chinese: 给，拿着这个吧。以前我都随身带着以求好运，现在你比我更需要这个了。

translations.chinese: 晨风主要由瓦登费尔这座大岛，和沿岸的内陆组成。

translations.chinese: 那里是丹莫家乡。那些低等种族称我们为暗精灵。

translations.english: We built great works there, like Vivec and Ald'ruhn. Many of them are destroyed now, either by Red Mountain or the argonian invasion.
translations.chinese: 我们在那里建造了几座大城市，比如维威克城和奥德·鲁恩。现在大多被摧毁了，要么是红山，要么是阿尔贡入侵。

translations.english: With skill and patience. It's very much like working ebony.
translations.chinese: 要有技巧和耐心。就跟处理黑檀一样。

translations.english: You can find some in Raven Rock Mine, as well as that new source of Stalhrim on the map you recovered from the elves.
translations.chinese: 鸦石镇矿场能挖到一些，另外，从精灵手里拿回来的地图上也有新的魔冰矿源。
